name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Will you add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the Youth Voting Rights Act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Do you know which Constitutional amendment got ratified the fastest?

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=97%2E4032634%2E-2WpqU)
---
Here’s a question for you: do you know which Constitutional amendment got ratified the fastest? No need to go to Wikipedia or crack open a textbook: it was the 26th Amendment, which said that Americans aged 18 or older couldn’t be denied the right to vote based on their age. That was ratified in 1971. But even now, more than 50 years later, **young Americans who are eligible to vote still face too many barriers on their way to the ballot box.** Their provisional ballots get rejected at high rates. They don’t have accessible enough polling places. They’re up against restrictive residency and voter ID requirements. They even face age-based restrictions on access to vote-by-mail. And Republicans in state legislatures across this country remain hellbent on passing voter suppression laws that silence youth voices and make it harder for them to exercise their constitutional right to vote. **So I just reintroduced a bill alongside Representative Nikema Williams — the Youth Voting Rights Act of 2023.** It’s a comprehensive piece of legislation that would enforce the 26th Amendment, expand youth access to voting, and make sure young people can have a say in their own future. [**To get this done, we need to show Washington that the American people are demanding action. Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of our Youth Voting Rights Act, and help get this over the finish line?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-youth-voting-rights/?source=EMZ17C_POL_E_20231009_V1S1&t=8&akid=97%2E4032634%2E-2WpqU) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-youth-voting-rights/?source=EMZ17C_POL_E_20231009_V1S1&t=9&akid=97%2E4032634%2E-2WpqU)
---
Here’s some of what this legislation would accomplish:
* Allow young people in every state to pre-register to vote before they turn 18, ensuring that they can cast their ballots as soon as they’re eligible.
* Require an on-campus polling place at every institute of higher education.
* Expand voter registration services at colleges and universities.
* Guarantee that people can use their student IDs to meet states’ voter ID requirements in federal elections.
* Prohibit restrictive residency requirements for voting in federal elections, and codify the right to vote from the place where you’re attending college.
* Create a grant program for states to encourage youth involvement in elections.
* Prevent states from placing age limits on no-excuse vote-by-mail ballots.
* Allow individuals to sue if their 26th Amendment rights have been violated.

Voting is the beating heart of our democracy, and young people shouldn’t be left out of our democratic process.
**By passing the Youth Voting Rights Act, and by working to root out every voter suppression law that’s been enacted around the country, we can defend our democracy.**
[**But it’s going to take a grassroots movement. Add your name to say you’re in this fight all the way.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-youth-voting-rights/?source=EMZ17C_POL_E_20231009_V1S1&t=10&akid=97%2E4032634%2E-2WpqU)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

---

name: Hilary Franz
subject: Indigenous People's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)
body:
On Indigenous Peoples' Day, we gather to pay heartfelt tribute to the enduring legacy of those who have faithfully stewarded the bountiful lands and pristine waters of Washington since time immemorial.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71266976/431664674/2121138121?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20231009-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU4N2U3ZjctZmY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FUd8OXeY_q573cgxSeYEYzylW8c619kmlnzzoH8_c8w=&emci=318f71a1-f566-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1587e7f7-ff66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=11003312)
---
| Peter,

On Indigenous Peoples' Day, we gather to pay heartfelt tribute to the enduring legacy of those who have faithfully stewarded the bountiful lands and pristine waters of Washington since time immemorial.

As the state lands chief, one of the most profound and cherished aspects of my role has been the privilege of collaborating closely with and gaining profound insights from tribal leaders and vibrant Indigenous communities of our diverse state.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71266977/431664675/2121138121?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20231009-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU4N2U3ZjctZmY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FUd8OXeY_q573cgxSeYEYzylW8c619kmlnzzoH8_c8w=&emci=318f71a1-f566-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1587e7f7-ff66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=11003312)
Today, as we come together to commemorate this special day, let us reflect upon and celebrate the invaluable contributions and resiliency of our Indigenous neighbors. It is a moment to recognize and honor their inherent sovereignty, a fundamental element of our shared history and future.

In honoring the past and present, we also look forward to a future where we can continue working together, learning from one another, and fostering even stronger bonds of understanding and cooperation.

With gratitude and respect,

Hilary

* * *
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71266978/431664676/2121138121?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20231009-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU4N2U3ZjctZmY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FUd8OXeY_q573cgxSeYEYzylW8c619kmlnzzoH8_c8w=&emci=318f71a1-f566-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1587e7f7-ff66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=11003312)

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Re: the mainstream media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,
Before I was a member of Congress, I spent my career on TV as a journalist. I interviewed some of the most dangerous men in the world - from Nicolas Maduro to Fidel Castro - and I even earned five Emmy Awards for my work. Back when I started in the news, it wasn’t about partisan messaging or “helping” one party or another. It was about keeping the American people informed with honesty and truth. _But when I look at the mainstream media today, EVERYTHING has changed._ **These big networks don’t care about giving you the truth...** **They do nothing but bury stories like Hunter Biden’s corruption or the crisis at our border.** **Today’s mainstream media’s goal isn’t to inform the people: it’s to defeat Republicans.** **[With the Liberal media working against us, I need all the help I can get to fight back against their lies so we can defend one of the most vulnerable districts in Florida. body:
It's ridiculous, Peter [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71267860/431672751/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGM5NTIwYS0wMjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LsyjY74r6YBcAYaNSUy1vyD00r0yu3EL1PiaWvWbqQw=&emci=b2d69b6a-d266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=4dc9520a-0267-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

House Republicans led us to the brink of a reckless government shutdown. Then, MAGA Republicans voted to oust Kevin McCarthy – the first time in our history that the House of Representatives has voted the speaker out.

**Now, the National Republican Congressional Committee has the audacity to claim Kim and House Democrats are creating the chaos in Washington:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71267862/431672753/1835742155?refcode=em23_231009_CCFR_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231009_CCFR_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=4dc9520a-0267-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGM5NTIwYS0wMjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LsyjY74r6YBcAYaNSUy1vyD00r0yu3EL1PiaWvWbqQw=)
It's laughable that the party of Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Lauren Boebert is calling Kim part of the "chaos caucus." – especially after Republicans were the ones who initiated the motion to vacate McCarthy, leaving Congress without a speaker!

But in all seriousness, the real chaos and dysfunction will not stop as long as the Republicans have the majority. We can take back the House next year, but not without re-electing the most vulnerable Democratic incumbents – like Kim.

clean_body: It's ridiculous, Peter Peter, House Republicans led us to the brink of a reckless government shutdown. Then, MAGA Republicans voted to oust Kevin McCarthy – the first time in our history that the House of Representatives has voted the speaker out. Now, the National Republican Congressional Committee has the audacity to claim Kim and House Democrats are creating the chaos in Washington: = It's laughable that the party of Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Lauren Boebert is calling Kim part of the "chaos caucus." – especially after Republicans were the ones who initiated the motion to vacate McCarthy, leaving Congress without a speaker! But in all seriousness, the real chaos and dysfunction will not stop as long as the Republicans have the majority. We can take back the House next year, but not without re-electing the most vulnerable Democratic incumbents – like Kim. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer (via DLCC.org)
subject: Abortion is legal in Michigan, but across the country, thatisn’t the case →
body:
Gov. Whitmer here – Republicans are pouring money into Virginia in an effort to expand their power in the statehouse and ban abortion. With only 29 days until Election Day in Virginia, we need to step up and defeat them. | | |

But across the country, that isn’t the case. Virginia – where Democrats are facing key elections in just 29 days – is now the **only southern state without an abortion ban**. We have got to fight like hell to protect the Virginia Senate majority and flip the House, because the future of abortion in the Commonwealth depends on it. I’m all in on protecting abortion rights, in Michigan and across the country. I hope I won’t have to spend the rest of my life fighting to defend abortion rights,**but if I have to, I will.** **Virginia is the next battleground for abortion – and with voters already starting to cast their votes, we need to come together now.** [I’m counting on you. clean_body: Gov. Whitmer here – Republicans are pouring money into Virginia in an effort to expand their power in the statehouse and ban abortion. With only 29 days until Election Day in Virginia, we need to step up and defeat them. | | | | | ---|--- Right now, thanks to the Democratic trifecta that you helped elect in Michigan last year, abortion is legal. But across the country, that isn’t the case. Virginia – where Democrats are facing key elections in just 29 days – is now the only southern state without an abortion ban. We have got to fight like hell to protect the Virginia Senate majority and flip the House, because the future of abortion in the Commonwealth depends on it. I’m all in on protecting abortion rights, in Michigan and across the country. I hope I won’t have to spend the rest of my life fighting to defend abortion rights,but if I have to, I will. Virginia is the next battleground for abortion – and with voters already starting to cast their votes, we need to come together now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let's fight like hell, Gretchen Gretchen Whitmer 49th Governor of Michigan | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . name: Crystal Cavalier via ActionNetwork.org
subject: Come out and enjoy food and community networking
body:
Come out and enjoy food and community networking with this frontline community impacted directly by MVP and MVP Southgate. Hope to see you on Saturday! | | | Meku:Huk, I didn't want to miss this opportunity to engage with our members on this Indigenous Peoples’ Day. We encourage our friends and partners to educate themselves through Indigenous-led resources. Your support to amplify Indigenous voices is invaluable. There is an opportunity to meet and engage in two communities where we are trying to stop the MVP Southgate Pipeline. We need your help filling these 24 spots. 7DS has sponsored three tables in Virginia and North Carolina for Saturday, October 14, 2023. The **Freedom Fund Banquet** is the major fundraising event for all branches of the NAACP. Please join us and help educate Alamance County and Pittslvania County, VA communities about the Mountain Valley Pipeline Southgate coming through the area. We have 16 seats available for anyone who is interested in attending the event in Ringgold, Virginia, at 2 p.m. [SIGN UP HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRLLMdwq5BnZ_E26i2DQmToXNBSRoPhhTFREVCm86Q4kXB03db_GCN9WKT-b1w-8HvklccXSacn6-s5i5f521wG5NGErZi_dgBvR5TSTIGpDHUdH-ae_KArSfWepgUdipRD9C7jirFU01tGP9h3KAzE5eLpW3rkrx6KqlWbtXv2dH6qs_7NQaA1ycwwCYOTT3gtk_iIxGX8IrAScTRAYGv2okJO8Cez3UVUI0JdfFtj7eZIjfOzqoRghBLIt-hXsJkaDFFeZOtJBbRVjY8onPamFWxB-9VWBgGW2TIDz8vNzJp40hBWmldf-jRgknVic1nA/40b/D0C1uZYqQcukPKr1SHYAtg/h0/-vAeC3B4B1Rktrw-nMX-U4S8aOTwaIfkbYfkjVQ4f_I), and 8 seats are available for anyone who is interested in attending the NAACP event in Alamance County, which will be at 6 p.m. in Haw River, NC. [SIGN UP HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRLLMdwq5BnZ_E26i2DQmToXNBSRoPhhTFREVCm86Q4kXLRH1ZxPquq2QZG7wA5WNHIl5RVL1EubZ7OHpdUVEGTQeTqSPkWZPfS65TqWwrnVVu5FuFZ7tQihJOSehzzkRR3QpwD8sciTdPDVulOAFgpEm1nfyxD3XyqFfGSlA2Wb5ANoGjqkbnytb_6VnsJC6RH9-7zpBdSgM_fk6y1ASfF59O6spG0NztJa3Y2wFCrs0Zvwgevdm54wqD2hwKj9elhLqcSmPU2Ft9wHT4gOmqwGl60lbT3e4vPSybiJ6lnYIlwSgZfYtLzG2poBWAWNhfQ/40b/D0C1uZYqQcukPKr1SHYAtg/h1/R505F39KM0W5kMEguTBOuDwM_Aqpk4F3tnIsk8TuggA) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRLLMdwq5BnZ_E26i2DQmToXNBSRoPhhTFREVCm86Q4kXVu1SXixa4Hn3RX5PMYaMa5lGdJ87xMlZov8dZZuXW8l6eTh8PUxhya9bkBs-rcAVdFc-m3HNGRp0vwc8-GA6uogAZf8StqOMpEfTrPaqC_-rGSRfqYMAqQomZEO3yVqQ4-mhwNobFuL2JKfQ3-67B_wDcXStCkIIR6twi2sutaoflNgbf1CBx1XEV2xVAHcqxF09A9_FFyhWjZNLWuCHElVqoE3k7-PdQg3LJfku9iV2p4qiJPsYQWHLqfN8R0qKC91ecq8iR-qiaSFLzbFfvA/40b/D0C1uZYqQcukPKr1SHYAtg/h2/fCIkG24sIJ8cXcUqDVkXnG4RG-LDGRJKA_E-yN3QoS0) Come out and enjoy food and community networking with this frontline community impacted directly by MVP and MVP Southgate. name: From the Desk of Tim Scott
subject: We faced our demons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Yes, America has suffered because of slavery. But we chose to be better.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm1q81nvb4j53bcp01d4c8p7e1qpb04hf1d7ug60_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o35c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

I looked America in the eye and said, **" There is no redeeming quality in slavery."**

Yes, America has suffered because of slavery. We should never attempt to sweep this under the rug. But we chose to be better.

We faced our demons in the mirror, and we made a decision. So often, we think issues like crime, education, and healthcare always go back to slavery.

Here's the challenge: Black families survived slavery. We survived poll taxes and literacy tests. We survived discrimination being woven into the laws of our country.

But this was not the only other challenge Black families have faced. We've also had to survive the impact of Johnson's Great Society, which incentivized broken households over strong families. You can now measure that devastation in crime and unemployment.

Restoring hope means restoring the family, restoring capitalism, and getting Americans back to work, together as one American family.

I believe our nation continues to go in the right direction. It's why I can say I have been discriminated against, but America is not a racist country. It's time to look through the windshield of America's future, not in the rearview mirror of America's past.

Never doubt who we are. We are the greatest country on God's green earth.

I know America can do for anyone what she's done for me. I am living proof that the American Dream is alive, it is well, and it is healthy. It's why I'm focused on restoring hope, creating opportunities, and protecting the America we all love.

**The city on the hill needs a brand new leader, and I'm ready.**
**_[Will you help me lead America in the right direction? I can't do this without your support!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zujm6t414hs5qrp16p7o9f9835cn10kcr0r9q9r8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o35c5h2bs "Will you help me lead America in the right direction? I can't do this without your support!")_**

---
| | | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN FOR PRESIDENT HERE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrac52i2chrqvbsur39omkr0lcb056tad25i2k7o_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o35c5h2bs)
---

God Bless,

Tim Scott

| **" Mike, it is so hard to see what this nation has come to. I don't know what this next cycle will look like, but I do know I wish you would consider running for the presidency. You would have my vote - no question."** **Keith from Austin, TX** **" I wish you would just run for POTUS!!!!! The work you and Trump did was the BEST that I have seen since Reagan. I miss having a true leader in the White House and I seriously hope you'll reconsider your candidacy. Praying!!!"****Linda from Fresno, CA**

---

Friend, I have been touched by everyone's heartfelt messages asking me to run for President, and I am truly humbled and honored to have so many Pipehitters consider my skill set for this position.

But I have another critical mission for 2024... and I hope that you will continue to stand with me as you always have.

**[Will you take 30 seconds to read this special memo about my plans for next year's elections?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za2mmhk3oq081blk7a3jenqrkk9dho3ptpedodjo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs "Will you take 30 seconds to read this special memo about my plans for next year’s elections?")**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: BRING IT!
body:
Chip in $5 & I’ll send you this shirt. >>

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4lje8r1hsl7qu6tbnt3ds3p2g39bu3vunsopg90_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs)
---

Friend,

**The results of Wednesday's debate meant two things: **
1\. A _**SURGE**_ of support from freedom-loving Americans across the country.
2\. A _**TARGET**_ on my back.
Now that our momentum is surging, and polls show me as the ONLY candidate who can decisively defeat Joe Biden, I have a major target on my back.

But I won't back down. Instead, I say _**BRING IT.**_

**[If you're with me, chip in just $5 or more to fuel my fight and I'll send you your very own "BRING IT" shirt.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4vfi8tp5cv9p5tdks9sjb6u12aqhpvs8qgnm1mg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs "If you’re with me, chip in just $5 or more to fuel my fight and I’ll send you your very own “BRING IT” shirt. ")**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdhns1nmfohvd3ush9nmjcbucfm8he8v9s87eico_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs)
---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SHIRT TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znuolfgl6ddvh06t4861ao5mact2gq4aqun22cb0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs)
---
_**I 've NEVER lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now.**_

When I launched my very first campaign against a 30-year incumbent, no one thought I had a shot. But, I never gave up.

_**I fought and I WON.**_

When I ran for governor against better-funded and better-known candidates, I was told I was too brown, too female, too young, and too conservative. I was the outsider and the underdog. But that never stopped me.

_**I fought and I WON.**_

Friend, I know what it takes to win, and I will never shy away from a fight.

We will win this fight to save our country, but I need you on my side.

**[Chip in just $5 or more to support my fight and get your own"BRING IT" shirt today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp5an1ju2s314u5qiappeo9vbq2di1p2qnvevu4g_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs "Chip in just $5 or more to support my fight and get your own “BRING IT” shirt today!")**

Let's win this!

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjn6ga6qeqgern517cmrh3h5c5sf3ic11de77g1g_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SHIRT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3n1in4edjvikppr98lns8gk2dov01k04if6mupg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjvb11l323anj8ap3pi5hqeolb7qkoskg9890kpg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za28n6i6ji0i93spemjcmgmn2f79fgas21abajp0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zro6iamqmfv0vuomcathf86dv42h2d3ia9nhr6k8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp5s2svbjl5ntksqkn6vnm2la8bl7cen52mrv480_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---

---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoc78hav74ouaos647424ur65admet0gd5jika2o_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cth2bs)

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: Hi, did I miss your response?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a few notes to share with you:

| |

---
| | | Hi there, this is Steve Scalise.

The response rate to my _**[Official Grassroots Check-In](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg5gesei7c4iq93aamh1bo0pks6hknfescouhgl0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cdh2bs "Official Grassroots Check-In")**_ was OVERWHELMING! Nearly everyone filled it out within a few hours of it going live. I scrolled through as many responses as I could and jotted down a few notes from the initial data. Take a look:
1) Just about everyone is deeply concerned about our border (I am too)

2) Joe Biden's economy is crushing the American People (I hear it all the time)

3) Election integrity needs to be addressed immediately (I agree)
**I couldn 't agree more. **

But while I was reviewing these responses, I noticed we didn't quite hit a 100% response rate. There were a few holdouts and I believe you were one of them. _That 's completely fine, I know you're busy. Also, if you filled it out and I missed it, feel free to ignore this message!_

I just wanted you to know that I deeply value your insight and since you're representing the thoughts and opinions of your community, I would like to give you another chance to respond.

_**[I'm reattaching your access link here for your convenience.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6r3m7o7bffid1otrkno6jpij2ljantiuu7t96o_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cdh2bs "I’m reattaching your access link here for your convenience.")**_

I would be honored if you'd be willing to take my Official Grassroots Check-In. It will take me a while to get through all the responses, so I only ask that you fill it out as soon as you can.

I make my best decisions when I know what my best supporters think. Can I tell my team to look out for your response tonight? It would mean the world to me.
---
| | | [TAKE MY OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS CHECK-IN >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ip6g82f5vp8g5e3a40enpllasqh04s2v7d4qo8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cdh2bs "TAKE MY OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS CHECK-IN")
---
Thanks for all you do. I mean that.

For America,
Steve Scalise

---
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zucabpjtkmqur6rq31suildkbsh1ecm1ousrbj78_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj64o31cdh2bs)
---

AMAZING news! You're only 1 GIFT AWAY from receiving a coveted spot in Steve Scalise's Majority Leader Founding Circle!

There is no minimum donation to join, even $5 will snag your place in this premier digital membership of elite grassroots supporters.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Unveil the extraordinary leaders of military history in this free eBook
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5prgg8dsjlg61r6gjb1rl3ngpmevqs9tvbs0pug_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6co76c9h2bs)

| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvlm1c2u4lbgh5kjbmqdkffvi6k30126bpisp14g_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6co76c9h2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg2122uhb3mk4gkas9439ao7q1pcp0q2u6kb0kk8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6co76c9h2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcjo3fhjgkjd36djvne07sbpd75aa55mcoidco1g_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6co76c9h2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

Laying out the evidence, clear as day:
* **The truth about the origins of Covid** _(and why it was covered up)_
* **The truth about the Wuhan lab** _(and who was funding it)_
* **The truth about the coordinated campaign to stifle dissent** _(and how it almost worked)_

---

name: Don Huffines
subject: Why Should Border States Foot The Bill For Illegal Immigration?
body:
This week, I published a commentary in the Daily Caller on the billions of dollars that taxpayers spend annually to educate illegal aliens in Texas.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-yk/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-r/) FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Noah Betz; 281-928-2089
[noah@bluestonecreatives.com](mailto:noah@bluestonecreatives.com) Hello patriots!This week, I published a commentary in the Daily Caller on the billions of dollars that taxpayers spend annually to educate illegal aliens in Texas.I discussed the wide-open Texas Border and failed impeachment on The Mark Davis Show, and discussed passing school choice in Texas and removing Speaker Dade Phelan with Kenny Webster. **Huffines: Why Should Border States Foot The Bill For Illegal Immigration?** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-y/) "The Huffines Liberty Foundation, in a newly [published report](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-j/) on the cost of illegal immigration, estimates that the cost of educating illegal aliens in Texas public schools was $6.6 billion for the 2022-23 school year. Texas' border security costs are about $2.6 billion, while criminal justice costs run about $1.7 billion.These costs make it clear that the lack of control of the Texas-Mexico border by both the federal and Texas governments must be addressed.But they must be addressed at the root cause, and this first requires a clear-sighted understanding of the issue."[_Click here to read my commentary in the Daily Caller._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-t/) **Huffines Slams Impeachment, Wide-Open Border on The Mark Davis Show** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-h/) Don Huffines and Mark Davis discuss the failed impeachment, the Democrat-controlled Texas House, and the wide-open Texas Border._[Click here to watch my interview with Mark Davis.](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-k/)_ **Huffines and Webster discuss removing Dade Phelan, passing school choice, and the DC Speaker fight** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-u/) Can the Texas House remove Dade Phelan? Will Texas finally pass school choice? Huffines and Webster discuss.[_Click here to watch my interview with Kenny Webster._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-o/) May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. See you on the battlefield!For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines
_Father, papa, businessman, and former TX Senator_ P.S. Follow me on [Facebook](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-b/), [Instagram](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-n/), and [Twitter](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-p/) for updates. Your family and friends can join this email list by [clicking here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-x/).Want me to speak at your event? Join your podcast? [Click here to fill out my request form.](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-c/) [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT TO SAVE TEXAS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-q/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-a/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-f/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-z/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-v/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-e/) | **[ABOUT](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-s/) | [NEWS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-g/) | [EVENTS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-w/) | [SPEAKER/MEDIA REQUEST](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-yd/) | [DONATE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-yh/)** [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-vvhuly-17329976-yuddtktydi-yu) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-vvhuly-yuddtktydi-jl/)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: BRING IT!
body:
Chip in $5 & I’ll send you this shirt. >>

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7i529u574k8t81t5ucir16ibrsct082g67p3rf0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6aor6c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

**The results of Wednesday's debate meant two things: **
1\. A _**SURGE**_ of support from freedom-loving Americans across the country.
2\. A _**TARGET**_ on my back.
Now that our momentum is surging, and polls show me as the ONLY candidate who can decisively defeat Joe Biden, I have a major target on my back.

But I won't back down. Instead, I say _**BRING IT.**_

**[If you're with me, chip in just $5 or more to fuel my fight and I'll send you your very own "BRING IT" shirt.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zggilfhds7qdptgu6j4m6jr7ple1lvjg2jispv98_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6aor6c5h2bs "If you’re with me, chip in just $5 or more to fuel my fight and I’ll send you your very own “BRING IT” shirt. ")**

| | [CLAIM YOUR SHIRT TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z29refeabhv4msm8c4sbh5ahs9gdfofam5guucso_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6aor6c5h2bs)
---
_**I 've NEVER lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now.**_

When I launched my very first campaign against a 30-year incumbent, no one thought I had a shot. But, I never gave up.

_**I fought and I WON.**_

When I ran for governor against better-funded and better-known candidates, I was told I was too brown, too female, too young, and too conservative. I was the outsider and the underdog. But that never stopped me.

_**I fought and I WON.**_

Friend, I know what it takes to win, and I will never shy away from a fight.

We will win this fight to save our country, but I need you on my side.

**[Chip in just $5 or more to support my fight and get your own"BRING IT" shirt today!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zntn22e4paide9n995tf8od3se00np03vkt4vsog_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6aor6c5h2bs "Chip in just $5 or more to support my fight and get your own “BRING IT” shirt today!")**

Let's win this!

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zumoj41i4otq6kj67b2d4ncifo3v47tmi5043nuo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj6aor6c5h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Defend Columbus Day against Cancel Culture
body:
Peter,

Today is Columbus Day, a crucial day to honor the contributions of Christopher Columbus and recognize its importance to not just the Italian-American community but the world.

Unfortunately, this day is under siege by cancel culture.

Cancel culture doesn't just remove a statue or rename a holiday—it erases complex histories and silences dialogues that should be had. It's a shortcut to division, offering no room for nuanced discussions about our past, which is essential for meaningful progress. HELP US DEFEND → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Defend+Columbus+Day+Email]

Christopher Columbus was a pioneering explorer who significantly impacted the formation of the modern world. To dismiss this is to ignore a part of our shared history.

We stand firm against this tide but can't do it alone. Your financial support is urgently needed.

Chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, $200, or any amount. We can't waste another minute. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Defend+Columbus+Day+Email]

DONATE $10 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Defend+Columbus+Day+Email] DONATE $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Defend+Columbus+Day+Email] DONATE $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Defend+Columbus+Day+Email] DONATE $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Defend+Columbus+Day+Email] DONATE $200 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=200&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Defend+Columbus+Day+Email] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Defend+Columbus+Day+Email]

name: John James
subject: No room for error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
There's no room for error when you’re in a combat zone.

| | | Friend, **There's no room for error when you’re in a combat zone.**

You can’t give half-effort. You can’t afford to be skeptical of your fellow soldiers. You have to be laser-focused on the mission because it’s not just your life that’s on the line \- it’s your whole team’s.

My name is John James. I flew Apache Helicopters in some of the most dangerous combat zones in the world. And even though my feet are now firmly on the ground, I still take the same work ethic and dedication I took to my missions in the air to my mission in Congress.

**America’s combat veterans get the job done because we don’t know what it’s like to _not_ give 110% to everything we do. **

_But we also know that no great mission can be achieved alone._

Right now, I’m in one of the hardest fights of my life. Last year, my Congressional race was one of the closest in the country. **I won by less than 1% of the total vote.**_This year, it could be even closer._

The road to defending our House majority runs right through this district, and I’m counting on my team at this critical moment.

**[Can you pitch in now and help us defend this district for Republicans and hold onto our House majority?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679330%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0dxsb9VQIqQd6fxOsRuP%2fg&sysid=1)**

clean_body: There's no room for error when you’re in a combat zone. | | | Friend, There's no room for error when you’re in a combat zone. You can’t give half-effort. You can’t afford to be skeptical of your fellow soldiers. You have to be laser-focused on the mission because it’s not just your life that’s on the line \- it’s your whole team’s. My name is John James. I flew Apache Helicopters in some of the most dangerous combat zones in the world. And even though my feet are now firmly on the ground, I still take the same work ethic and dedication I took to my missions in the air to my mission in Congress. America’s combat veterans get the job done because we don’t know what it’s like to not give 110% to everything we do. But we also know that no great mission can be achieved alone. Right now, I’m in one of the hardest fights of my life. Last year, my Congressional race was one of the closest in the country. I won by less than 1% of the total vote.This year, it could be even closer. The road to defending our House majority runs right through this district, and I’m counting on my team at this critical moment. Today’s Democrats aren’t just failing America’s veterans; they’re failing ALL Americans. Our country needs leaders who understand that freedom isn’t free - it’s something we need to work for every single day. I know what it’s like to put America’s needs before my own, and that’s something I’ve never backed down from. name: SmartAsset
subject: Is Roth IRA Conversion Really Worth It?
body:
*|MC:SUBJECT|*
Have you considered a Roth IRA conversion?

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zllftbl99kh5ql67i9djddhusarqqsb9ghkkpbng_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj69oj4c1h2bs)
---
|
## Is Roth IRA Conversion Really Worth It?
---
| _Have you considered a Roth IRA conversion? Here’s a primer on the potential benefits, as well as the drawbacks_
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaln0tjm9v05ftvq6q26gq0of1vftfg1e2eosav8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj69oj4c1h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9fpnbgl1q4bmns70oqpuadj5qeuitn09mum44c8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj69oj4c1h2bs)
---
|
---
| Have you considered converting a pre-tax retirement account into a Roth account as you approach retirement? Converting pre-tax retirement accounts such as IRAs to after-tax Roth IRAs could allow you to keep growing funds tax-free and then make withdrawals in retirement without paying taxes. Is this the right retirement savings strategy for you? To find out, it could be a good idea to [speak with a financial advisor.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt4qikuem0f1rpra2ssiv69ntaqgq3l60uts9750_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj69oj4c1h2bs) Research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.2
### **Roth IRA Conversion Basics**
The difference between a Roth IRA and other types of IRAs is that the Roth account is funded with after-tax dollars. That means you pay taxes on funds before contributing them to the Roth, and you can’t deduct contributions from your taxable income. However, the money in the Roth account grows tax-free and you can withdraw funds after you retire without paying taxes. You can convert funds in pre-tax IRA accounts to a Roth IRA. This includes traditional IRAs, SEP IRAs and Simple IRAs. When you convert pre-tax money in a regular IRA to a Roth IRA, you have to pay taxes on it at your current rate. The conversion amount is treated as regular income, which can bump you into a higher tax bracket and cause a high tax bill for the conversion year.

Despite the tax bill, a Roth IRA conversion can be worth it for a couple of reasons. [Learn about the potential benefits here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlvbbbfp55rj6prmvrdujnd24sntitehf83hvjto_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj69oj4c1h2bs)
### **What to Consider Before a Roth Conversion**
Deciding whether or not to convert regular IRA assets to a Roth IRA calls for careful evaluation of your financial and tax situation. That’s where a [financial advisor](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4fobe0t5viu846ies7htv6nftolfqttld5ckf78_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj69oj4c1h2bs) can be invaluable. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. Try SmartAsset's [no-cost tool](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1r5rroqvllg1d6457fhksva6ept7sj8qkpupado_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj69oj4c1h2bs) to get matched with up to three vetted financial advisors serving your area, each obligated to work in your best interest. It only takes a few minutes, and you earn a free consultation to compare and decide on one who fits your needs.
## [Learn about the pros and cons of Roth IRA conversion »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsp9uvenpahff9chm490j3va8ij6h2n9jmc0ctp8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cjj69oj4c1h2bs)

name: Your America
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24802%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QqIZqgn%2brD0BApz3XJuwCw&sysid=1)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24803%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xs4a4VhXWP6Rm9LMebshZA&sysid=1)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24804%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=22SadV4muTfOHqOF8rnN7g&sysid=1)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24804%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=22SadV4muTfOHqOF8rnN7g&sysid=1)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: From the Desk of Tim Scott
subject: We faced our demons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Yes, America has suffered because of slavery. But we chose to be better.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24811%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sqoj1keC%2baOTLL6asbs6Rw&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

I looked America in the eye and said, **“There is no redeeming quality in slavery.”**

Yes, America has suffered because of slavery. We should never attempt to sweep this under the rug. But we chose to be better.

We faced our demons in the mirror, and we made a decision. So often, we think issues like crime, education, and healthcare always go back to slavery.

Here's the challenge: Black families survived slavery. We survived poll taxes and literacy tests. We survived discrimination being woven into the laws of our country.

But this was not the only other challenge Black families have faced. We've also had to survive the impact of Johnson's Great Society, which incentivized broken households over strong families. You can now measure that devastation in crime and unemployment.

Restoring hope means restoring the family, restoring capitalism, and getting Americans back to work, together as one American family.

I believe our nation continues to go in the right direction. It's why I can say I have been discriminated against, but America is not a racist country. It's time to look through the windshield of America's future, not in the rearview mirror of America's past.

Never doubt who we are. We are the greatest country on God's green earth.

I know America can do for anyone what she’s done for me. I am living proof that the American Dream is alive, it is well, and it is healthy. It's why I’m focused on restoring hope, creating opportunities, and protecting the America we all love.

**The city on the hill needs a brand new leader, and I'm ready.**
**_[Will you help me lead America in the right direction? I can't do this without your support!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24812%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mi6LxQcP%2frOmg8rQGTwZyg&sysid=1 "Will you help me lead
America in the right direction? I can't do this without your support!")_**

---
| | | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN FOR PRESIDENT HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24813%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f0ksBEa0pSZmUpp3IuXNMw&sysid=1)
---

God Bless,

Tim Scott

---

---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call to Action Oct. 10: Jim Jordan for Speaker & Pro-Israel events
body:
| | |
---
First, I’d like to ask you to pray for Israel and for the innocent life that has been taken by Hamas terrorists. Join me in praying for those murdered or kidnapped, and for their families who are grieving and waiting in anguish to find out what has happened to them. What Hamas has done and is doing is evil. Pure evil.
---
---
**Our first action item** today is related to the horrific attack on Israel. As you have probably seen, there have already been celebratory rallies and street parties in our own country, where supporters of the attacks are literally celebrating the murder, torture, rape, and kidnapping of innocent civilians. In response, there are now some pro-Israel events that have been organized, and we have added them to a website so that you can easily find out if there is one going on near you. Just go to [usastandswithisrael.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and browse the listed events. If you know of one that is not listed, please let us know. You can also [**repost my X post**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-7nUTdLVBYr3Q) supporting Israel if you are on X.
---
|
---
---
**Our second action item** today is for those of you who have Republican representatives. We polled our members and supporters and the response was overwhelming – the grassroots wants us to endorse Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House. We need constituents of Republican representatives to call their Republican member and tell him or her to support Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House. Thank you, and please keep an eye on your email for any updated calls to action over the course of the week. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---

As you have probably seen, there have already been celebratory rallies and street parties in our own country, where supporters of the attacks are literally celebrating the murder, torture, rape, and kidnapping of innocent civilians. In response, there are now some pro-Israel events that have been organized, and we have added them to a website so that you can easily find out if there is one going on near you. Just go to and browse the listed events. If you know of one that is not listed, please let us know. You can also supporting Israel if you are on X. | Our second action item today is for those of you who have Republican representatives. We polled our members and supporters and the response was overwhelming – the grassroots wants us to endorse Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House. We need constituents of Republican representatives to call their Republican member and tell him or her to support Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House. Thank you, and please keep an eye on your email for any updated calls to action over the course of the week. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. | | © 2023 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 | mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org?subject=Unsubscribe%20Request "support@teapartypatriots.org"

# TUESDAY, OCTOBER 10, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1985, legendary filmmaker Orson Welles passed away. His film _Citizen Kane,_ released three months before the attack on Pearl Harbor, is considered one of the best ever made. Check out the original trailer [here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtlgHXJzzwFCp8pZ27GhhcwQqHCKHmObvq3Tu-p70pPd1ns4u5XS9fLiVbQ1lcktNO08KDgoO2kwovQ3Mmo1kq_qhH1Afe5TRBpwVYVDsiBSBQk0ECBTAaD94L5PVoI0CBTAcjwAdUEByoMgADXyaBQL7VMvWfZd0rZFDfpadt24pq8w21nq7C_Mm9Cj02FrrnuVRHzO__Iu4ukRhxl2Yd_I_0eTmP8cmN-tvLeWc7v1JIFxWl_Jfsv5_-BsAAP__FcxQcw) in all its grainy black-and-white glory. ## Death Count Rises in Israel, Gaza
At least [11 Americans were killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuwzAMAL_G3hRQb2nQ0CVbunY0GIuKVcgPWESC_n2Rzh0Ptxzu6zbdsLa6PT5xpcRln3Dm-qRJgpAglJ7MmFMhUqRHStJFF42yzoxLykCIRuds5uKClgpm5aQP9xKsVUGONSlQWoIEiNYCXCAUExBk0BAi-ftggHLl_bx873XjhUr72Z90XuZ9HVtamI8-6I9BXQd1xWOjV3-rN5xc50aDutZ-IjVxYKPOdau4dbHgil10RiaR6cCTV9pY6HiP5Iu0WptSvHUFlPJgSrTSBefHM-XjVVur3fnBwGPF2v5a-P81vwEAAP__t2ljKQ) in the surprise Hamas attack on Israel, the State Department said on Monday. Over [900 Israelis and 687 Palestinians have died](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GOqzAQAL_GdKD12oApXLzGXV57JVrCOuzJxJGxQu6-_pSrrx5pRvNxmS8kSe63_7SzrzHPdK3y5FlDq6FFM9tm9ZEZ2TTs9TANk8V-sM3me7eAdstqotNRryYukzOEFpBgxFE34hHQaNAAU98DdOCidQTaGXATj4uywKvUXLrPLPe6cUxf-cmlu-a9SX6r9XEo809hUBjO8-zoJfl4U4Xh7VYYNCgM4BQGOQpxam_0Te1GOx3tSaXl1yOR3Lk0xa-PU1KSYxiVhdtOkn5L9e_xnwAAAP__TONXPg), and tens of thousands of others have been displaced in the subsequent fighting. The conflict continues to escalate; [Hamas is threatening](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu9CAUhJ_G7rAOGF8oKP5mu_3blNbxcrBJuKwALcnbR9467Xz6pJn5uG93dN7F4z8G0tWmDR_VvWjjwDgwMW6yN9oSCRp70nxWs5JimmV_agvKSiS0k1onZUe5LNMupNg5KANm7Z0WIEYOHEBNE8AAq5UrAl9HWBUteyeBjKspD5_JxXqS9T_pRXl4pNB7fdb6LN34rxO3Ttxaa4NN35FaufiVpOxNJ24nBiwMcyDDmosHa5hjYaViruzL-WsfcyUjecfOVCoeVNiewn6BMwUqb8XFo8_aPNullHnpJBwBnX_XqX-_8xsAAP__JnFo3g) to execute a hostage for each Israeli bomb that hits a Palestinian home without warning. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu told President Biden on Sunday that Israel doesn't have any choice but to unleash a ground operation in Gaza. The [Israeli leader said](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OszAQAJ_GdEbrH4hduPgaunztlWgT1rAnY0fgwOWe_pSrrx5pRpqP63hFTpzn_7hSqLGMeK980KhAKpDajLaZQiTSZBoKqve9t7rrbbOEC0Uw3qpOqWhivDnQ5Dx2PaAm713DQYM2ChSA7zqAFly0DkE5A87T5SYs0MS1bO1n4VwXiulVDtrae1mbFJZaH7sw_4QehB7O82zxi8v-pkIPb7fQgwKhB_BCD5kq5hcuTzlv5ZknyfnAnUuWM36j5H1DSnLBFXd544lys4XpcXJKvPcXYWFekdNvu_694icAAP__CJteZg), "We have to go in," according to sources briefed on the call. The Israeli military has activated [300,000](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uwyAYAJ8GNqyP38DA0CVbuna0CHwEWmwigxLl7at07nzD3X1d1kuore63z7Chn7mvIc76wJUD48CEXBVNPiMKlBQ9N844JbRRtPishUzJQNKAMkZntQKIPOmUzVWho9ULEJIDB3BaAyxgs7IBuJVgHZ6uRAGmOvuxfPe6z4K5vfoDjyX2jTZf5rwPIj-IOBNx3vE5llcovb8xEecStjDYLAeGiftgP7U1FsP93T9YHUfAxoQEI4W0ailza_Tw6f6srdVhTkTBbQu1_dnm__O_AQAA___y71rJ) reservists and is mobilizing troops along the border with Gaza.
## RFK Jr. Goes Independent
Yesterday, Robert Kennedy Jr. announced he's dropping his Democratic primary bid and instead will run for president [as an independent](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL_GbEbnwzZ48NCFLV07IsMdyaVgEHFD-_dVOnd-0nvS-7gMlySL5Ot7WjmWeRvSVOTJgwFtQGMz2IrizIzcVByNDz5YdN5Wt-gQvZ-oHX2wiZFaax0ZCuRGds42lUQEbAwYgOAcQA3dbLsEpmugC9yOygKTlO2o75vkcuN5-dmefNTTtlZLvJWyP1TzprBX2J_nWadv2R4vqrB_uRX2BhT2EBT2x_yp74dGQKslE--ciXPRU8oklArrUYizLsfXuldHpP2UZZGHb5WF65pk-euW_zf8BgAA__9CYVvs) in the 2024 election. He's been critical of the DNC's rules that he views as rigging the Democratic primary election against him. Kennedy has the potential to [play spoiler](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAUBb8Gd1gXDNgUFK9xl9duaWG4xGQxWJiNlb9fJfWWR0cajebrttxsTDHf_9sdTQtlsa7FJy4MKAPKh0V03gREjkOHhimttOBSiW4z0ocgV-WkUF46kIAhjJZpzZSz3k9dNBz4wIABaCkBepiCmCywaYBJ47gSAehjK7V_lJjbhiG9yhNr78reJbO1dpxk-Ef4TPh8XVfv8ureJ-HzG034zIDwGTThcy0r1kYD_cac0b_oo9JWaP3JNJRKj4pn9JgbtSeN2eOB-TNzadTjXly1rd_anrpq_HHFlOKpRiLgvtuYPkrt70K_AQAA___HZGek) in a close 2024 election, and many of his family members are [denouncing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOpCAURp8GO8wFFaWg2IZutt3SoFz1ziIYYMbM229m67__ku-c8-cxPxwFivtvd6KpW5rdWumNswAugMtu7htvNkSJXYNGKK10LwfVN4fBTSoBWulJrCv2y-RB6NF50GrU46AaMhJkJ0AA6GEAaGHa-smBmDqYNI4L6wE91ZTbZ6JYD9zCJ70xt2s6m2COWq_Cul9MWibtfd9tPXB_uezJxe-GSfsqPOJdmLTfLyZtWiuTFjSTNqcFc-Ub_4sxov_wZ-aFlq9u4VfGQh5jJRf46s7L0R6bbPx1UwhU1Mh62E9H4T9N_TnOvwAAAP__PohlZw) his candidacy. According to an [Ipsos/Reuters poll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79yrCAUgPGnwQ7n8EfBguI2dnvblA7CYT0ZFEfYdfL2maRO_RXf_D4ey8NTpuP53-_oWiqLD43euAjgArhUi-6iS4gSVYdOjNM4aTmMuttcSlpGE7Q2KqlgMa7G4hoQFQgDCjtyEqQSIACmYQDowSZtPQirwE5oVqYBI7Vy9Z-FjrZhyl_ljVcfyt5lt7V2Vqb-MTkzOd_33dNZS_2pTM548Fdlcm7Xaz_5ShEPfuHuW9h4bZQzb6XwkEtFHnzO3eXieVPOVEfDNDx3T_n31P6GfwcAAP__BeFazQ), 14% of respondents plan on voting for Kennedy.
## Mack Trucks Workers Reject Contract
Union workers at Mack Trucks [went on strike Monday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAQRp_G7oiGX0NBcZt0ue2WFoYhIcYmwpNE-_arbL3d9-k0R-frMl9CqWW__g8besptDpHKC2cOjAMTclZj8hlRoBzRc-OMU0IbNd58Ck5rgQKdC9G5RVk3WRVTnlIKGXAsXoCQHDiA0xrgBDYrG4BbCdbhtAwKMBVq_XRvZacb5vrdXthPsW1j9TeixzHIf4M4D-IcHju-jw_6nE4lVvysJzX2bn3FfrAtxJVRf8b1YAf1siLreMdILFw74oY7sVcjZJKDsEpPBrSSJkPkShg-LXzRMVtpx-7T411qLYeZBgXXLZT6q0V_V_oJAAD__wjFZ9w) after voting down a 5-year contract agreement that negotiators had reached with the company. Nearly [73% of workers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuSozAQAL9GyuQaRg8gUHAJmS-9kBLyYOYQyCXJdu3fb3njjbu6g_53na-BE5_3v-Eg39Y8h9j4RXMHqgOFejby5lciJC3Jd250o0HrjNy8db2OS4hk3bKG3mnr-hi0XR32AQkkewTUHXQAo7UAFxhWMwToBg3DSP0iDNCNWy6X_5nPttGavvKLyiXmQya_tfaoQv8ROAmc2kYbp_RhAqflWfmkWgVOBo21I6rnyflU71x2KlXds8qnqq3wTio0dYS4q1aecf84svjb480pcXW9MHA_Av-kZfv9wncAAAD__wenXbk) voted against the tentative deal that included a 19% pay raise. In online forums, some Mack workers complained the proposed raise was too small to keep up with inflation. The United Auto Workers (UAW) union said 4,000 unionized workers walked out at 7 a.m., adding to labor turmoil in the industry involving all three big Detroit automakers--GM, Stellantis, and Ford. With those workers joining the picket lines, there are now over [30,000 UAW members on strike](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuSozAQAL9GyuQaRg8gUHAJmS-9kBLyYOYQyCXJdu3fb3njjbu6g_53na-BE5_3v-Eg39Y8h9j4RXMHqgOFejby5lciJC3Jd250o0HrjNy8db2OS4hk3bKG3mnr-hi0XR32AQkkewTUHXQAo7UAFxhWMwToBg3DSP0iDNCNWy6X_5nPttGavvKLyiXmQya_tfaoQv8ROAmc2kYbp_RhAqflWfmkWgVOBo21I6rnyflU71x2KlXds8qnqq3wTio0dYS4q1aecf84svjb480pcXW9MHA_Av-kZfv9wncAAAD__wenXbk) across 22 states.

The host asked McCarthy whether he would serve again if Republicans deadlock on a replacement, and McCarthy said, "Look, whatever the conference wants, I will do." Dan Goldman (D-N.Y.)** described his escape from Tel Aviv, Israel, with his family over the weekend as "traumatic," but he said it didn't compare to the violence breaking out in other parts of Israel. Over , and tens of thousands of others have been displaced in the subsequent fighting. The conflict continues to escalate; to execute a hostage for each Israeli bomb that hits a Palestinian home without warning. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu told President Biden on Sunday that Israel doesn't have any choice but to unleash a ground operation in Gaza. The , "We have to go in," according to sources briefed on the call. The Israeli military has activated reservists and is mobilizing troops along the border with Gaza. RFK Jr. Goes Independent Yesterday, Robert Kennedy Jr. announced he's dropping his Democratic primary bid and instead will run for president in the 2024 election. He's been critical of the DNC's rules that he views as rigging the Democratic primary election against him. Kennedy has the potential to in a close 2024 election, and many of his family members are his candidacy. According to an , 14% of respondents plan on voting for Kennedy. Mack Trucks Workers Reject Contract Union workers at Mack Trucks after voting down a 5-year contract agreement that negotiators had reached with the company. Nearly voted against the tentative deal that included a 19% pay raise. In online forums, some Mack workers complained the proposed raise was too small to keep up with inflation. The United Auto Workers (UAW) union said 4,000 unionized workers walked out at 7 a.m., adding to labor turmoil in the industry involving all three big Detroit automakers--GM, Stellantis, and Ford. With those workers joining the picket lines, there are now over across 22 states. subject: Hi, did I miss your response?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a few notes to share with you:

| |

---
| | | Hi there, this is Steve Scalise.

The response rate to my _**[Official Grassroots Check-In](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1cfb200c0bcd4e5681e79fc7b48fd5a0&_e=vkwZ6JqUn-ETfiK0U1aARrMBxzzkQAynLr5fl2brSZUM9tSGXPhJxZbRJp26uHDjZwwhsrK0dH2Gjkui2hOkrod_4p2mH9D73yAwzu6Iih-EtW4MvDC27Kd5yAQuNHqvQdFOEczdHIPGuxQXxmAjuHT9vQIYOTI5o60IjmV_sAEOHS7bNQrU6fmnq6lJi8EMKUJ3A2EaHd_XasM9Itx0Sxhjgnw3_Z6t4RLYHPzqrXhv8cMXHenwhdN23M1WGA8JVe24bzlQkPn0eMe-ts5FRNL_7W-X1g6a1CqdEK-fBjYakmRgAF29xlr-NfMGrHxGVIABBZ6oykgFKp6BD8G23UX990j9AJugU4iN64fY9VokVYODDHSpkVmVYShhy7cO1YdSHBzKM5Gmz0QCWp3LtOlrxQdS2Mr3rvCt5bli0cd3Hgpd6hVXEwufSVgerDEF7yeTZgsxoBYLtRpuGCHTZ9V_u4ro44L_862i_DfgyKs%3D "Official Grassroots Check-In")**_ was OVERWHELMING! Nearly everyone filled it out within a few hours of it going live. I scrolled through as many responses as I could and jotted down a few notes from the initial data. Take a look:
1) Just about everyone is deeply concerned about our border (I am too)

2) Joe Biden's economy is crushing the American People (I hear it all the time)

3) Election integrity needs to be addressed immediately (I agree)
**I couldn 't agree more. **

But while I was reviewing these responses, I noticed we didn't quite hit a 100% response rate. There were a few holdouts and I believe you were one of them. _That 's completely fine, I know you're busy. Also, if you filled it out and I missed it, feel free to ignore this message!_

I just wanted you to know that I deeply value your insight and since you're representing the thoughts and opinions of your community, I would like to give you another chance to respond.

_**[I'm reattaching your access link here for your convenience.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1cfb200c0bcd4e5681e79fc7b48fd5a0&_e=vkwZ6JqUn-ETfiK0U1aARrMBxzzkQAynLr5fl2brSZUM9tSGXPhJxZbRJp26uHDjZwwhsrK0dH2Gjkui2hOkrod_4p2mH9D73yAwzu6Iih-EtW4MvDC27Kd5yAQuNHqvQdFOEczdHIPGuxQXxmAjuHT9vQIYOTI5o60IjmV_sAEOHS7bNQrU6fmnq6lJi8EMKUJ3A2EaHd_XasM9Itx0Sxhjgnw3_Z6t4RLYHPzqrXhv8cMXHenwhdN23M1WGA8JVe24bzlQkPn0eMe-ts5FRNL_7W-X1g6a1CqdEK-fBjYakmRgAF29xlr-NfMGrHxGVIABBZ6oykgFKp6BD8G23YbRoGpn8ArVpofYJJ2mHUK035z7Ho4Ipk6guKV1kEuz7ewSrqhYf3MJK1pSWj-C_K_KoCMWyotS8NtpKii6z5WGesJjVtplKUGdPHfSg_zLEwPwR8jgBdyJgvSXerv-kj05egvkKkxKzSGz8zKkRL8%3D "I’m reattaching your access link here for your convenience.")**_

I would be honored if you'd be willing to take my Official Grassroots Check-In. It will take me a while to get through all the responses, so I only ask that you fill it out as soon as you can.

I make my best decisions when I know what my best supporters think. Can I tell my team to look out for your response tonight? It would mean the world to me.
---
| | | [TAKE MY OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS CHECK-IN >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1cfb200c0bcd4e5681e79fc7b48fd5a0&_e=vkwZ6JqUn-ETfiK0U1aARrMBxzzkQAynLr5fl2brSZUM9tSGXPhJxZbRJp26uHDjZwwhsrK0dH2Gjkui2hOkrod_4p2mH9D73yAwzu6Iih-EtW4MvDC27Kd5yAQuNHqvQdFOEczdHIPGuxQXxmAjuHT9vQIYOTI5o60IjmV_sAEOHS7bNQrU6fmnq6lJi8EMKUJ3A2EaHd_XasM9Itx0Sxhjgnw3_Z6t4RLYHPzqrXhv8cMXHenwhdN23M1WGA8JVe24bzlQkPn0eMe-ts5FRNL_7W-X1g6a1CqdEK-fBjYakmRgAF29xlr-NfMGrHxGVIABBZ6oykgFKp6BD8G23TJWaqaia-r3f7OTR-yPlaBxhXyh8Mm09VUi4_IqseYJQ3CzGv9okQGlvJrLBO8ZXHgPinfR4gXqdNOrqNTI2QL25NmaZZY4pgCK_EgSfk8v_-EIL4Pj0DI9oRJKvP3C8DjVtl06waGEExRsMdeoNTE%3D "TAKE MY OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS CHECK-IN >>")

Thanks for all you do. I mean that.

For America,
Steve Scalise

name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: Back to the Future - It's All About the Debt
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
October 10, 2023 After tangling with the prospect of another Federal partial shutdown, Kevin McCarthy averted it, and lost a nine-month running argument and his Speakership in the process. Actually, the argument is 15 years in the making, and now is ripening to the point at which it cannot be avoided. In the midst of the '08 financial crisis, federal debt was rapidly expanded to provide the financial system the liquidity necessary to weather the crisis. The national debt was about $10 trillion coming out of the crisis, and the Obama Administration withstood relentless, multi-cycle pressure from congressional conservatives to return the budget to a sound footing. But Obama's economic team, with united support from congressional Democrats, refused to return the federal budget to pre-crisis levels. Hence the Obama years saw annual trillion-dollar deficits, requiring annual trillion-dollar debt issuance - and the national debt was doubled to $20 trillion when he left office. The early Trump years saw a leveling of deficits but the debt issuance continued apace until it exploded with federal financial rescue and payment protection programs during the Pandemic. But again, in the last couple years we have seen Biden and the Democrats refuse to return to pre-Pandemic spending levels. The result is a national debt now at $33 trillion, with federal spending which bakes-in at least $2 trillion annual deficits/debt for as far as the eye can see (we take in about $5 trillion in taxes annually and now spend $7 trillion). Any oxygen-breathing American can see that endless $2 trillion annual additions to the national debt can only lead to national economic collapse.
But evidently, Jim Himes and the Democrats refuse to breath oxygen. The Democrat House and Senate caucuses have explicitly refused to face reality. They'll agree to nothing but "continuing budget resolutions," which are NOT budgets, and which maintain the current pace of debt increases. House Freedom Caucus members are insisting on a normal budget process, with individual spending bills, subject to public hearings... something that hasn't happened in congress in about 15 years. They recognize they cannot bend the Democrats to face economic reality, but regardless, they're insisting this time - hence the log-jam. Since the mainstream press organs and corporate media benefit from the status-quo, they will not report on the reality of the financial peril we are already in. When the government is borrowing and printing the money necessary to finance the rapidly rising monthly federal debt interest payments, one could say the nation is already in bankruptcy - the government just won't admit it... they NEVER will.
Instead, the media spins up endless stories about personalities and political gambits. They're a massive diversion - the modern equivalent of "bread and circuses" for the masses. Ignore the diversions. No one on talking-head TV will illuminate the immediate peril, and expose it for the fundamental subversion of our Republic that it is. Yes - there sure are sparks when someone throws on the brakes! Last Saturday, Jim Himes held two more, in his endless stream of thoroughly innocuous town halls - I went to the one in Trumbull. As usual, he nods his head to all sides of the issues and commits to, and stands for - nothing. The closest this man got to addressing the deficits and debt was to say that at some point "the dials on Social Security will have to be re-calibrated" - yep - let the spenda-palooza continue. He offered no solution to the runaway debt catastrophe... he never does. Jim Himes has voted for $21 trillion of the $33 trillion national debt over the past 15 years. That equates to $187,000 of debt per 4th District household - all ladled onto our backs and crushing our household budgets, by a man hired to "represent" us. Himes has voted us across the Rubicon, from a place in 2009 where we could still manage the debt, to our current crisis, where it can no longer be financed without printing new money to make the interest payments. He has literally voted the country into bankruptcy. The 2024 election will be a referendum on this man's failed 15-year rule. Jim Himes is NO Moderate
And he proves it every week!
Solid citizens can donate to retire this man right here: [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RW9lJBr3VJxnnfdTXhLIWbKLfecJPWwLcjbE-_poDPxIO-RAkV3oseawc5IRn6It7wfK5qxTDoJ31rpOJl1J9_YNbs6ceBRSEy6xQW-A9jgqbDqhq3I0jcnZkhh8ZmUQN87J5EZGWU2O1WGSvTmpRgxNds3AeErjGwTX1uAp1-umZEnoHZ7JWVXfYatpwqR6N84H1-ZVlHQMWqzJGMqojpcxaAdaJ4zKW4tTmQ4Wq0g=&c=AfegGKyjtMXjb-lrICHZ9NGGvUcOvL6f-dqXVMZSqjvcgxO0jfZn3g==&ch=5UbqnRrzY3KjF6bFiMEAc0zijA9MfNvM4egzeYeuSN7NA7e9WMAIlw==) It would be deeply appreciated. Please re-circulate this message to any and all who are interested...or should be. Help is on the way,

clean_body: Campaign Update | | | | | | | | Campaign Update | | | | | October 10, 2023 After tangling with the prospect of another Federal partial shutdown, Kevin McCarthy averted it, and lost a nine-month running argument and his Speakership in the process. Actually, the argument is 15 years in the making, and now is ripening to the point at which it cannot be avoided. In the midst of the '08 financial crisis, federal debt was rapidly expanded to provide the financial system the liquidity necessary to weather the crisis. The national debt was about $10 trillion coming out of the crisis, and the Obama Administration withstood relentless, multi-cycle pressure from congressional conservatives to return the budget to a sound footing. But Obama's economic team, with united support from congressional Democrats, refused to return the federal budget to pre-crisis levels. Hence the Obama years saw annual trillion-dollar deficits, requiring annual trillion-dollar debt issuance - and the national debt was doubled to $20 trillion when he left office. The early Trump years saw a leveling of deficits but the debt issuance continued apace until it exploded with federal financial rescue and payment protection programs during the Pandemic. But again, in the last couple years we have seen Biden and the Democrats refuse to return to pre-Pandemic spending levels. The result is a national debt now at $33 trillion, with federal spending which bakes-in at least $2 trillion annual deficits/debt for as far as the eye can see (we take in about $5 trillion in taxes annually and now spend $7 trillion). Any oxygen-breathing American can see that endless $2 trillion annual additions to the national debt can only lead to national economic collapse. But evidently, Jim Himes and the Democrats refuse to breath oxygen. The Democrat House and Senate caucuses have explicitly refused to face reality. They'll agree to nothing but "continuing budget resolutions," which are NOT budgets, and which maintain the current pace of debt increases. House Freedom Caucus members are insisting on a normal budget process, with individual spending bills, subject to public hearings... something that hasn't happened in congress in about 15 years. They recognize they cannot bend the Democrats to face economic reality, but regardless, they're insisting this time - hence the log-jam. Since the mainstream press organs and corporate media benefit from the status-quo, they will not report on the reality of the financial peril we are already in. When the government is borrowing and printing the money necessary to finance the rapidly rising monthly federal debt interest payments, one could say the nation is already in bankruptcy - the government just won't admit it... they NEVER will. Instead, the media spins up endless stories about personalities and political gambits. They're a massive diversion - the modern equivalent of "bread and circuses" for the masses. Ignore the diversions. No one on talking-head TV will illuminate the immediate peril, and expose it for the fundamental subversion of our Republic that it is. That equates to $187,000 of debt per 4th District household - all ladled onto our backs and crushing our household budgets, by a man hired to "represent" us.
