Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6824538d9fc402fa2c415b698c22dc1&_e=91ZsL5L18So51wQzNBi3Di2i2DycMKx7oLxwmPMr5cc_NpSETNTiNUXRrqix8gHGzKhkdNCBqZvXVe02zywP0Or5m5NDt6Lmev9OFg9HIC-hEHJroVFYeS4J44j-ulAEV5MAQkq-eDMaUzjpu3cqJhdWfY3RdUYg1IrbG30HpnbBHUfuCvTwzg-YgK2Zr82kuiX0GzQEKWks1LsVoekfsVxWfI7uau4CCaGFqXB7zvo3NXoZmDCr6q3aOlufjImFfNkUvaThSeqxSel4kTEuzSLOYNvbQVcPJemfbPm2FctBr2q571OItmWwaZY5EHrbuKQz8EkCHc2GxUwhU9NSKTKMyYEX5ESOGZ8ACnUiK1l856bTC8ge1IvdwlBzM4lzSPtIqOuGBmjxU15dj51aXg%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6824538d9fc402fa2c415b698c22dc1&_e=91ZsL5L18So51wQzNBi3Di2i2DycMKx7oLxwmPMr5cc_NpSETNTiNUXRrqix8gHGzKhkdNCBqZvXVe02zywP0Or5m5NDt6Lmev9OFg9HIC-hEHJroVFYeS4J44j-ulAEV5MAQkq-eDMaUzjpu3cqJhdWfY3RdUYg1IrbG30HpnbBHUfuCvTwzg-YgK2Zr82kuiX0GzQEKWks1LsVoekfsVxWfI7uau4CCaGFqXB7zvpBLLbG9WWYMCgacQ7OdrfhF2kThZlvUZWz3xsMY1_ZCAjAJAWH-n8iVT_SuTmI_kMGH1XQywiUZ2Ar1rDqR59tp7Hqx3lzSpPwiPsCsqAt3F4DkInLA8j2AheFuy423a9J_uyfBaHFqknpv8veWwILiSwP2MYUPRV7LtHLv54wxA%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

Hunting season is in full swing. And wolves are in serious danger. As you read this, trophy hunters are tracking down innocent wolves across the country. And they’re showing no mercy. **Soon, our nation’s forests will be painted red with the blood of helpless wolves.** [**It doesn’t have to be like this. Help protect wolves before we lose them forever and stand up for our planet: donate $27 today and help us reach our urgent $5,000 goal!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040506?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
The fall and winter months are deadly for wolves in the United States. Last season alone, hunters in Montana _**gunned down over 250 helpless wolves**_. The state even allows hunting along Yellowstone’s border. That means any Yellowstone wolf that wanders over the park’s border loses its protection and is instantly fair game to hunters.
But Yellowstone can’t afford to lose any more wolves. Right now, there are **only 89 gray wolves left in the park**. And to make matters worse, a trophy hunting rampage wiped out an entire pack just last year! Now, trophy hunters and Big Polluters are fighting tooth and nail to strip away the few protections wolves still have. If wolves are going to make it through this hunting season, we have to act now to protect them at all costs.
**Hunting season is upon us. Act now to protect wolves and the planet: Donate $27 today and help us reach our $5,000 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040502?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040503?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040504?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040505?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
With **only 6,000 wolves remaining** in the lower 48 states, we can’t stand to see another catastrophic hunting season. That’s because one wolf kill isn’t just one wolf kill. When a mama wolf is gunned down by a trophy hunter, her babies’ chances for survival plummet. Without protection, **orphaned wolf pups could starve or freeze to death**. Or they might survive long enough to fall prey to other animals and trophy hunters.
It gets even worse. These hunting practices are worse than anything we’ve seen before. Wolves are chased down by helicopters. Run over by snowmobiles. Dynamited in their dens while they sleep. **And it’s all completely legal.**
No animal deserves this fate, Friend. But if we don’t act soon, it could get even easier for hunters to viciously torture and kill wolves in droves. That’s because Big Polluters are using their massive influence to help trophy hunters strip away the last few protections wolves still have. If they get their way, they could wipe out wolves. All so they can take over their lands and open them up for destructive mining and logging. That would also destroy any possibility of wolves being able to recover in the future.
Trophy hunters and Big Polluters have shown time and again that they care more about lining their pockets than the lives of wolves and survival of our planet. But Friend, is private profit really worth all of this bloodshed and destruction?
**Don’t let greedy corporate interests drive our last wolves to extinction. Donate $27 for wolves and the planet today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040502?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040503?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040504?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040505?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Believe it or not, wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in. They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species!
That’s why each death of this iconic species is a big deal. Since a recent rule rolled back federal protections for gray wolves, the trophy hunting lobby has pushed for even more cruel and inhumane laws throughout wolves’ natural habitats. And even worse, **the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service could reinstate federal protections for these creatures -- but has still failed to do so!**
We can’t stand aside while our wolves are under attack. If even young pups aren’t safe from brutal hunters, this majestic species won’t stand a chance. Friends of the Earth is fighting back to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. These protections blocked greedy fossil fuel companies from exploiting the land for profit. But it’s at risk to be opened up to fracking, drilling, and mining that create pollution and __harm wildlife and nearby communities, too__.
We’re up against the powerful hunting lobby and their big industry allies, and we urgently need the help of activists like you to make sure we hit our crucial $5,000 goal. Please, Friend: if just 12 more generous supporters from your area make a $27 membership gift, we can reach our goal and help save wolves and the planet before time is up. Will you make your membership contribution today?
**Protect the remaining wolves and our planet from greedy private interests. Donate $27 before the clock strikes midnight and help us reach our $5,000 goal.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2040502?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?
%recipient.md5_hash%
| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b583feb6ca649b7869238d897029aa2&_e=hIg0C5PlMBS0AGarfXifNVMb2GnefBG4D-qgqwoXZrX8wS02zxzIz631j0tyAp6JCsgzkR4J31jFMyufdiR1xg_szIVngwjD4WL4xw8R8LEXzQ-rqTKP8-35ekZR2VcoLwHmK-j5geP4FEan8tfxdCTtrghW6g4QW_LC7Qpmqy7EYud_RRMqaijv2FirgAFWTWmtAbh9vuX3_8lFMIyPCkbXVfvDg5KiN9D8I4j0MripYeM_wm30pP37iGIGqvDjvQGOwFk4LVkHyJ5ChY-pvR5xqXnL245TJxFjkI2ZSvpiy-k4bvkAMEd1V2wWXfsWwPAU8_Mh8h4L6bJ5o1CR1wcuMwF61oumh44Rlb8BeX-06r4PBHCfx1dmiMhswI7QAuCwnP3qBuVHZBhp2cpTWg%3D%3D)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b583feb6ca649b7869238d897029aa2&_e=hIg0C5PlMBS0AGarfXifNVMb2GnefBG4D-qgqwoXZrX8wS02zxzIz631j0tyAp6JCsgzkR4J31jFMyufdiR1xg_szIVngwjD4WL4xw8R8LEXzQ-rqTKP8-35ekZR2VcoLwHmK-j5geP4FEan8tfxdCTtrghW6g4QW_LC7Qpmqy7EYud_RRMqaijv2FirgAFWTWmtAbh9vuX3_8lFMIyPCkbXVfvDg5KiN9D8I4j0MripYeM_wm30pP37iGIGqvDjDavc4RS0fQzDJHtkZ9oooBndqYQQfTXNVhuN1dUhf3iGGKhswPdQiGdiHgVpB1_bxk4BhzunEg5L_nHyMsZ9fYXA4G0AxMBV11EogJLqXIcZP3U4hxuL6t_gd6mYyLcDQQqnX-u4fyUwePgMDi1ICw%3D%3D)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.
[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b583feb6ca649b7869238d897029aa2&_e=hIg0C5PlMBS0AGarfXifNVMb2GnefBG4D-qgqwoXZrX8wS02zxzIz631j0tyAp6JCsgzkR4J31jFMyufdiR1xg_szIVngwjD4WL4xw8R8LEXzQ-rqTKP8-35ekZR2VcoLwHmK-j5geP4FEan8tfxdCTtrghW6g4QW_LC7Qpmqy7EYud_RRMqaijv2FirgAFWTWmtAbh9vuX3_8lFMIyPCkbXVfvDg5KiN9D8I4j0MripYeM_wm30pP37iGIGqvDj6qJr4i-VuzlcIBgsqIQB04IfprkyYHB5jm7wxEwulxU4cmD91uw-U36TMrmNFSnOtD0ujNyidC0fDIonzSmwZRGlpT0zO-8jESfQpSB_0E_OumT51yfIOArUjNFq9gdKxWwctvI2jb50Jz9MN1-qwg%3D%3D)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Police in the Chicago area found a warehouse full of stolen high-end
shoes and other merchandise earlier this week, CBS reported. Officers
from Lyons, Illinois, began investigating the warehouse last week
after a reported retail theft led them to the site in the West Side of
Chicago, according to CBS.

voted to adopt a rule Monday that bans boys from competing on girl’s
teams in public schools, according to Anchorage Daily News.

1\. A _**SURGE**_ of support from freedom-loving Americans across the country.
2\. A _**TARGET**_ on my back.
Now that our momentum is surging, and polls show me as the ONLY candidate who can decisively defeat Joe Biden, I have a major target on my back.

But I won't back down. Instead, I say _**BRING IT.**_

_**I 've NEVER lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now.**_

When I launched my very first campaign against a 30-year incumbent, no one thought I had a shot. But, I never gave up.

_**I fought and I WON.**_

When I ran for governor against better-funded and better-known candidates, I was told I was too brown, too female, too young, and too conservative. I was the outsider and the underdog. But that never stopped me.

_**I fought and I WON.**_

Friend, I know what it takes to win, and I will never shy away from a fight.

We will win this fight to save our country, but I need you on my side.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: Hi, did I miss your response?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a few notes to share with you:

| |

---
| | | Hi there, this is Steve Scalise.

The response rate to my _**[Official Grassroots Check-In](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e019dc89059d486499a5ea869f38844a&_e=tNldD1G8VfJE1kKqUgGEx0uADhKhseP731bJI7ONhXZLUN-6UBNY2lOcBXiI1Qz5imExtGdWIC2JEKIO_dCm0wLHGkMafzplrOcknNfZP3s7SqeH1JJbeE5Xgu3gL-ktkfk598aPffyMAmp1J2U4z8yq_iipVisT5Pyc9jJVi7nvz0GXSZ2o2Kc6lYfCUsvlojX-6cpSS4nXemzoMn9m2ErC6bIQ8EemzN2q5mrEwlZV5i_I61JNxchGpjyJpa8VSuKf5ZUgQCLaPugf_a11mNy0n7Xg8Q27c4I3ZdahXT7zaow_T9fd7GVRMATQnw82NULhtdNplkz6Skzd_hri9MYEz1xrfL72tToiceYS3IaTK-5okbvHQzhdf5-KT0xV2rKb_lcpTKpBbBuTAiz924fxAylFPexgoErD3wSEpSGoxKs87G5zmkY6Xc9TqjgPQ3FpnLAxudDENzIV0rODjRIqHvbo8IBumT8_oyDQZLg%3D "Official Grassroots Check-In")**_ was OVERWHELMING! Nearly everyone filled it out within a few hours of it going live. I scrolled through as many responses as I could and jotted down a few notes from the initial data. Take a look:
1) Just about everyone is deeply concerned about our border (I am too)

2) Joe Biden's economy is crushing the American People (I hear it all the time)

3) Election integrity needs to be addressed immediately (I agree)
**I couldn 't agree more. **

But while I was reviewing these responses, I noticed we didn't quite hit a 100% response rate. There were a few holdouts and I believe you were one of them. _That 's completely fine, I know you're busy. Also, if you filled it out and I missed it, feel free to ignore this message!_

I just wanted you to know that I deeply value your insight and since you're representing the thoughts and opinions of your community, I would like to give you another chance to respond.

_**[I'm reattaching your access link here for your convenience.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e019dc89059d486499a5ea869f38844a&_e=tNldD1G8VfJE1kKqUgGEx0uADhKhseP731bJI7ONhXZLUN-6UBNY2lOcBXiI1Qz5imExtGdWIC2JEKIO_dCm0wLHGkMafzplrOcknNfZP3s7SqeH1JJbeE5Xgu3gL-ktkfk598aPffyMAmp1J2U4z8yq_iipVisT5Pyc9jJVi7nvz0GXSZ2o2Kc6lYfCUsvlojX-6cpSS4nXemzoMn9m2ErC6bIQ8EemzN2q5mrEwlZV5i_I61JNxchGpjyJpa8VSuKf5ZUgQCLaPugf_a11mNy0n7Xg8Q27c4I3ZdahXT7zaow_T9fd7GVRMATQnw82NULhtdNplkz6Skzd_hri9MIjsefvQnZ73LPCe4jTQUKVuaEFyDP89DzimR_pZC3sTdLlCkcSpWkEiYLE6oUj1wHBISBeYM6qDIJghkZGbm0mrEQpbpG7kDV4CjqKnM8-YMrFu6EAtnZIeYpaD0hULUDwpt6lqm6IkVWRtUMeSU8%3D "I’m reattaching your access link here for your convenience.")**_

I would be honored if you'd be willing to take my Official Grassroots Check-In. It will take me a while to get through all the responses, so I only ask that you fill it out as soon as you can.

I make my best decisions when I know what my best supporters think. Can I tell my team to look out for your response tonight? It would mean the world to me.
---
| | | [TAKE MY OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS CHECK-IN >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e019dc89059d486499a5ea869f38844a&_e=tNldD1G8VfJE1kKqUgGEx0uADhKhseP731bJI7ONhXZLUN-6UBNY2lOcBXiI1Qz5imExtGdWIC2JEKIO_dCm0wLHGkMafzplrOcknNfZP3s7SqeH1JJbeE5Xgu3gL-ktkfk598aPffyMAmp1J2U4z8yq_iipVisT5Pyc9jJVi7nvz0GXSZ2o2Kc6lYfCUsvlojX-6cpSS4nXemzoMn9m2ErC6bIQ8EemzN2q5mrEwlZV5i_I61JNxchGpjyJpa8VSuKf5ZUgQCLaPugf_a11mNy0n7Xg8Q27c4I3ZdahXT7zaow_T9fd7GVRMATQnw82NULhtdNplkz6Skzd_hri9KBC6x3wTAi2g6s9xsZ8R_tCd8UyBIRa7pY3f0Fmdxtht5BxaTzZgRyR7f1fZpuU7B-qYz7Sm1wUsHWZXCbQ5Z-pWuu6dpFsfNedYehLvY1Nmg7GbjYZmwT6ZOqsZuENqvS3NTy3tr5ZRMiYsrh27zc%3D "TAKE MY OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS CHECK-IN >>")

Thanks for all you do. I mean that.

For America,
Steve Scalise

Nearly everyone filled it out within a few hours of it going live. I scrolled through as many responses as I could and jotted down a few notes from the initial data. Take a look: 1) Just about everyone is deeply concerned about our border (I am too) 2) Joe Biden's economy is crushing the American People (I hear it all the time) 3) Election integrity needs to be addressed immediately (I agree) I couldn 't agree more. But while I was reviewing these responses, I noticed we didn't quite hit a 100% response rate. There were a few holdouts and I believe you were one of them. That 's completely fine, I know you're busy. Also, if you filled it out and I missed it, feel free to ignore this message! I just wanted you to know that I deeply value your insight and since you're representing the thoughts and opinions of your community, I would like to give you another chance to respond. "I’m reattaching your access link here for your convenience." I would be honored if you'd be willing to take my Official Grassroots Check-In. name: From the Desk of Tim Scott
subject: We faced our demons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Yes, America has suffered because of slavery. But we chose to be better.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccb13f3dc60d40be9120ec295c949d5d&_e=VdbaSeSbLjOQAhNf6DvKGMu9j62KD7gPdRvj1tAhfdI5BFM0ERlukX9NPl-SoagfzjgwYME6CjMdY4ZJ4BmF0IlztfDaT3GZL0Sxu4XViLanRRbZIZZwgnnwc19DXMDrOIZS7VXa9NjL-V40ooU2w-nC_KtbPJrQfs02HH14nFNfCjjwce-ImDxkJmXblZtp83iEk2aC_dPy0PyR9iPX0MGxw-twzaYzog8oacgN7UJMxMoZ1ki8W4lbr7WRXiMQzEo_a7uI5IpcnyARgJ5r2OZo3lsTQOYDLZShAHBjZn86W_LiIbkL_XrO6aj3DQoS67C0ISb4IfWrDOyvyCPFDY7JsT5k_P7TxIOlBZOttA5ScLfYQiKOHn26YFMTHxu82P0hW7xbGAh_KkGIs1HXzusFTjTMuqgEe-7MCPL2gxkkz0c_-jUaTvIEDAcEG7E7JsTKsbUcf2amq-eht-dlsg%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

I looked America in the eye and said, **" There is no redeeming quality in slavery."**

Yes, America has suffered because of slavery. We should never attempt to sweep this under the rug. But we chose to be better.

We faced our demons in the mirror, and we made a decision. So often, we think issues like crime, education, and healthcare always go back to slavery.

Here's the challenge: Black families survived slavery. We survived poll taxes and literacy tests. We survived discrimination being woven into the laws of our country.

But this was not the only other challenge Black families have faced. We've also had to survive the impact of Johnson's Great Society, which incentivized broken households over strong families. You can now measure that devastation in crime and unemployment.

Restoring hope means restoring the family, restoring capitalism, and getting Americans back to work, together as one American family.

I believe our nation continues to go in the right direction. It's why I can say I have been discriminated against, but America is not a racist country. It's time to look through the windshield of America's future, not in the rearview mirror of America's past.

Never doubt who we are. We are the greatest country on God's green earth.

I know America can do for anyone what she's done for me. I am living proof that the American Dream is alive, it is well, and it is healthy. It's why I'm focused on restoring hope, creating opportunities, and protecting the America we all love.

**The city on the hill needs a brand new leader, and I'm ready.**
**_[Will you help me lead America in the right direction? I can't do this without your support!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ccb13f3dc60d40be9120ec295c949d5d&_e=VdbaSeSbLjOQAhNf6DvKGMu9j62KD7gPdRvj1tAhfdI5BFM0ERlukX9NPl-SoagfzjgwYME6CjMdY4ZJ4BmF0IlztfDaT3GZL0Sxu4XViLanRRbZIZZwgnnwc19DXMDrOIZS7VXa9NjL-V40ooU2w-nC_KtbPJrQfs02HH14nFNfCjjwce-ImDxkJmXblZtp83iEk2aC_dPy0PyR9iPX0MGxw-twzaYzog8oacgN7UJMxMoZ1ki8W4lbr7WRXiMQzEo_a7uI5IpcnyARgJ5r2OZo3lsTQOYDLZShAHBjZn86W_LiIbkL_XrO6aj3DQoSxC_BSMR7b8FTY17rlsL9uV05pRMz3YlCbhR1DSsM9szQS5qJ7wKq-7Lk9ukLVzvS-devgZ-NFFDd_7QG0-vOfJWjqW32crvgslU_BzmN7w5ILBq9FM_olpTI3HZNTRb1w6vRxgZptyLr694P-Xw1Tg%3D%3D "Will you help me lead America in the right direction? GOP Candidate Drops Out, Endorses Nikki Haley For President

Former Texas Rep. Will Hurd suspended his presidential campaign Monday
evening and threw his support behind former U.N. Ambassador Nikki
Haley for 2024, according to a press release. Hurd entered the crowded
GOP primary field in late June, and campaigned largely on the border
crisis, inflation and conflicts abroad, while frequently criticizing
Republican frontrunner former President Donald Trump.

Israel Conflict

Former President Barack Obama broke his silence about the Saturday
attack by Hamas that triggered a military conflict between Israel and
the terrorist group. Hamas terrorists attacked multiple locations in
Israel, killing over 900 people, including 11 Americans according to

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My decision (Kari Lake’s launch tonight)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Besides the day we launched, this is probably the most important day of the race so far.
#

Peter -
Later tonight, Kari Lake will launch her campaign for the United States Senate.
Besides the day we launched, this is probably the most important day of the race so far.
But hang on a minute. Put that aside for a second. Because right now, I want to talk to you about my decision to run in the first place.
When I made the decision to run for Senate in Arizona, it was to take back this seat from Kyrsten Sinema. Replace her vote in the Senate with someone who actually cares about the people of our state.
That was reason enough for me.
But now, Kari Lake is running. The MAGA Queen. Someone who has no problem lying, spreading misinformation — even calling for her supporters to commit violence on behalf of Donald Trump.
I lived through January 6th. I heard the shouts from the mob while I was on the House floor, barricading the doors and helping my colleagues evacuate to safety. I know what Kari Lake means for our democracy.
So today, this campaign is not just about getting another vote in the Senate. It’s not just about our priorities. It still is those things, but it’s about defending our democracy now, too.
And that is a lot of pressure. Trust me... I’m feeling it. I expect you are, too. But you are not alone in this fight. I’m with you, and thousands of others are, too.
Right now, a lot of them are making donations after Kari Lake jumped in the race. They’re hoping that you will join them. Because they know that is how we will win this race.
So please, I am asking you very humbly:
[**Can you contribute $3 to our campaign today? Lots and lots of people adding donations is the only way we’ll hold the Senate. That’s the only way we’ll defend it from Kari Lake.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231010-1&t=1&akid=1315%2E734936%2E9vqD2a)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-oct23.sGe5d1&refcode=em231010-1&t=21&akid=1315%2E734936%2E9vqD2a)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-oct23.w_T1Qs&refcode=em231010-1&t=22&akid=1315%2E734936%2E9vqD2a)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-oct23.GsFzby&refcode=em231010-1&t=23&akid=1315%2E734936%2E9vqD2a)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-oct23.T1UQyl&refcode=em231010-1&t=24&akid=1315%2E734936%2E9vqD2a)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-oct23.Ns39yQ&refcode=em231010-1&t=25&akid=1315%2E734936%2E9vqD2a)**
---
****
There’s an old motto in the Marines: “First to Fight.” That always stuck with me. And you have my word: I’m not going to back down.
I am proud to be in this fight with you, Peter. Thank you for your continued support.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

**The results of Wednesday's debate meant two things: **
1\. A _**SURGE**_ of support from freedom-loving Americans across the country.
2\. A _**TARGET**_ on my back.
Now that our momentum is surging, and polls show me as the ONLY candidate who can decisively defeat Joe Biden, I have a major target on my back.

But I won't back down. Instead, I say _**BRING IT.**_

_**I 've NEVER lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now.**_

When I launched my very first campaign against a 30-year incumbent, no one thought I had a shot. But, I never gave up.

_**I fought and I WON.**_

When I ran for governor against better-funded and better-known candidates, I was told I was too brown, too female, too young, and too conservative. I was the outsider and the underdog. But that never stopped me.

_**I fought and I WON.**_

Friend, I know what it takes to win, and I will never shy away from a fight.

We will win this fight to save our country, but I need you on my side.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: Chip in $5 & I'll send you this shirt. >> | | | | | | Friend, The results of Wednesday's debate meant two things: 1\. A SURGE of support from freedom-loving Americans across the country. 2\. A TARGET on my back. Now that our momentum is surging, and polls show me as the ONLY candidate who can decisively defeat Joe Biden, I have a major target on my back. But I won't back down. Instead, I say BRING IT. "If you’re with me, chip in just $5 or more to fuel my fight and I’ll send you your very own “BRING IT” shirt. " | | | I 've NEVER lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now. When I launched my very first campaign against a 30-year incumbent, no one thought I had a shot. But, I never gave up. I fought and I WON. When I ran for governor against better-funded and better-known candidates, I was told I was too brown, too female, too young, and too conservative. I was the outsider and the underdog. But that never stopped me. I fought and I WON. Friend, I know what it takes to win, and I will never shy away from a fight. We will win this fight to save our country, but I need you on my side. "Chip in just $5 or more to support my fight and get your own “BRING IT” shirt today!" Let's win this! My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Gov. Gavin Newsom (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 can change the game:
body:
As you read this, the Virginia GOP and extreme Governor Glenn Youngkin are waging an all-out war on our democracy ahead of a critical Election Day. | | |
---
| |
---|---
[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynY0BT0TZhrtzHx_RQeNOP5dewtulschGCKEEfieE8z5Lx5PYWSTaVWu2JmlM2ATCFfWDdVndpBZg0L18G7XNOjImT4imUaO2Rx4eQlRMghXkRW1fh4FwPfI7ZMG0JM9IK7E9ngQMlRudwStO0aCJ1tDfgdgvBaw42VqsvoNuVBrRpQdQXO-pS-qbYDAgFoYEuyc-tzD8X6JY8jhNR8qE4-2A_8HHvE3dhYYBdnQpJBFLhoaJMOMYV5elDqHrMfV3JH2uETFarJKzgiC8KOvJrmTJb1aWtG4qdveGOKuy5UhKLfPGBTk7S6fGIYlzxXC3gTdJvTMF91_mi59Ue8Ryds7QODwnVw2qhFPydzEw-ZZrw5Ithqyr90eIO8s4hlH_7Q_gUkLUizT5eYIEbZGMJ25I6Nuu8RJDNZ9WVZyZVLZJZ5TC2Lw48hyhG1Sc_ohF3izBqEP2dn29apxFroutIRc4VVIUH_G5CHYFa-z22Bwd-0ji_MZR0XT6Aw7dcE9bUWG5GXeDixMDIJ7XJAT-b3xRNYLEJvZA9hcrAO7Npa569zxO_jaO7rQf0_o_6XJM/40b/IWQAm1IaTwyzsz6slMUoVQ/h0/vXF-Hmy7jhjWtQVyKm_8yfhUGlQcDGAMN8sjZfvFTS8) Hi, it’s California Governor Gavin Newsom. As governor, I urge every leader in our country to use compassion, protect democracy, treasure diversity, and so much more. But as you read this, the Virginia GOP and extreme Governor Glenn Youngkin are waging an all-out war on our democracy ahead of a critical Election Day. Both the Virginia House and Senate are up for grabs in **_just 28 days_** , and the margins are ultra-thin, so we need to make sure Democrats have the resources they need to win. clean_body: As you read this, the Virginia GOP and extreme Governor Glenn Youngkin are waging an all-out war on our democracy ahead of a critical Election Day. | | | | | ---|--- Hi, it’s California Governor Gavin Newsom. As governor, I urge every leader in our country to use compassion, protect democracy, treasure diversity, and so much more. But as you read this, the Virginia GOP and extreme Governor Glenn Youngkin are waging an all-out war on our democracy ahead of a critical Election Day. Both the Virginia House and Senate are up for grabs in just 28 days , and the margins are ultra-thin, so we need to make sure Democrats have the resources they need to win. $7 to protect abortion rights – every sitting Republican legislator in Virginia is on the record with an explicit anti-abortion stance – if they secure a trifecta, they’ll pass dangerous restrictions on abortion. $7 to stand up for the LGBTQ+ community , fighting back against Republican-backed bills that ban gender-affirming care for minors and target LGBTQ+ students. $7 to protect expanded access to the ballot box by safeguarding early voting laws and protecting Virginians against voter intimidation. And that’s just scratching the surface – common sense gun safety, public education, and paid parental and family leave are all on the ballot in Virginia. I’ve seen firsthand what Democratic state legislators can accomplish with legislative majorities, but with Republicans pouring millions into these races, we need to be ready for an uphill battle this November. The GOP is laser-focused on making Virginia the next state to ban abortion – but with enough support from grassroots Democrats like you, we can block their far-right agenda, and elect leaders who will protect our fundamental freedoms. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Gavin Gavin Newsom Governor of California DLCC is asking for only $5,000 from federally permissible sources, such as individuals. DLCC is not asking for funds in excess of federal limits or from federally prohibited sources, such as corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals. | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Special Message from President Trump🇺🇸 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12655377?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=bbeac06270&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

My email from last week seemed to upset a few people. Of course, the truth being brought to light usually does generate nervousness and sometimes aggression in folks who have NOTHING to hide, right? As I indicated last week, a national campaign consultant company **OPERATED** the State Party, **for years** to control outcomes to further business opportunities for the next 2-year cycle and the next. The business of buying, selling and controlling policy, is the core operation of people within the political system. This is why they will spend $1 million+ to win an office that only pays $150k/yr or for Unicameral Senators around $17k/yr!

Many institutional politicos believe any variance from status quo politics as pushing divisive rhetoric. However, I believe the year of 2020 and July 9th, 2022 were tipping points, as an _**awakening of the people**_. An awakening that is ASKING questions and even more so, DEMANDING answers. I see this happening at the Republican National Committee (RNC) meetings among the newest members. You see it in Congress and the leadership saga surrounding the Speaker election and vacancy. I see it happening in other states as I work with the state chairs, many of whom are newer to their positions than I am. One thing I can assure you of is this...from what I see in the new, competent and patriotic leaders from the other states, the awakening is growing faster and driven by leaders who will not yield.

We reached a tipping point in the Republican Party of Nebraska and it led to July 9th, 2022 and this is being mirrored at the national level. July 9th, 2022 saw a formidable majority of a governing body (State Delegates) saying, "Enough is enough!". Leading up to the 2022 State Convention, political games were attempted to stop six state delegates _(who were duly elected from sub-districts)_ from attending, having a voice...from participating in the representative process. _What crimes or rule breaking or horrible actions did these delegates commit?_ They used their First Amendment right in various ways to speak the truth of the State Party's operations. Yep, they spoke out against the previous administration and the consulting class control, so therefore they were bad Republicans. They were banned from even ENTERING the State Convention venue with additional "security" needed to protect against the aggressive behavior of these free thinkers. But...we were prepared...we amended the Conventions credential report to allow for the six excluded delegates to be certified and this passed with an overwhelming majority. __If there is one thing ALL Republicans stand for it is defending others when their Rights are unconstitutionally taken__. The rest of the Convention highlights and the antics of former leaders are for an upcoming email. That Saturday was a culmination of what happens when 'The People' put down their keyboards, stopped making memes and social media posts, and did the two things that truly led to change.

#1 We knew the rules
#2 We showed up

>From a small group of initial planners to a rally with 250 passionate Republicans the Friday before, we knew the rules and we showed up in force.
We prepared together.
We prayed together.
We persisted together.

And, we won TOGETHER.

Republicans of Nebraska...you were and are on the leading edge of change within this country. Change within the Republican party. It is unprecedented what occurred on July 9th, 2022 and the subsequent makeover of the NEGOP. However, all the change needed for Nebraska will not happen overnight and it will not come to fruition if you waiver. **You have to persist.** You have to see a vision of what this state and country could be again. We took back the party FOR the people, so the people can take back their LOCAL communities, FIRST.

I want America First and I want Nebraska First, but let's secure North Platte First, and Kearney First, and Norfolk First, and Columbus First, etc. You have to engage your local county parties and bring your time, talents, and treasures. You have to engage now because there are even those within our own party who are just waiting for you to lose your activism. Waiting for you to lose your enthusiasm and go home to be good Republicans again who just vote when told and donate when told.

We need candidates. Mama bears and coaches and church leaders and grandparents and young Republicans to rise for 2024. Yes, that means YOU. You need to become a new elected Constitutional and Platform Republican (CPR's) on YOUR 244 School Boards and 19 Educational Service Units. We need our Board of Education and UNL Regents and Community College Boards to have value based and solution driven leaders like YOU, not conformists to woke ideology. If it's not YOU, then who? And when? When it's too late? **2024 will not be successful without your direct involvement and that's the truth.**

Lastly, we have to face the hard truth that not all current elected leaders want to work WITH the party. Those officials who call Constitutional and Platform Republicans “radicals” or that we are purging the party...they simply don’t get it. They bury their heads in the sand, pretending that today’s challenges are simply political, rather than existential or spiritual. Some officials say they are waiting for the dust to settle on the unprecedented change within the party. Some want the NEGOP and all the people to be more "Team" players. I can say with beyond reproach that we have the receipts to prove time and time again attempts to connect and create the relationships that should be beneficial for the people's party. I believe that the elected officials who choose to work WITH the State Party are committed to working with The People. The elected officials that want that relationship, choose YOU the people, over lobbyists, special interests groups, wealthy donors, or echo chambers that perpetuate their legacies.

On the presidential front there is only ONE candidate or candidate campaign that has made any effort to connect to Nebraska. He has a message for you, see below!

The truth shall set us free.

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---

President Donald J. Trump

name: Andy Kim
subject: Accountability matters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
In the face of corruption, Democrats have held their leaders accountable while extremist Republicans continue to skirt around facts and twist narratives for their political benefit.

Look at what's happening right now:

Democratic leaders in New Jersey and around the country have called on Senator Menendez to resign in light of his recent corruption indictment.

In contrast, extremist Republicans refuse to hold Donald Trump accountable for any of his indictments.

While Senator Menendez's indictment has destroyed his credibility with the people of New Jersey, Donald Trump's indictments have actually boosted his standing.

The bottom line is that, as Democrats, we hold ourselves accountable.

It's time to bring accountability and integrity back to this Senate seat. If we don't hold ourselves accountable, then we jeopardize not only our Senate majority, but our democracy.

I'm stepping up to run for Senate because the people of New Jersey deserve leaders who hold themselves to a higher standard.

Will you join me in this fight by pitching in $8 now? It's going to take all of us to win here, and I'm asking you to join our team today. More soon,

Andy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Special Message from President Trump🇺🇸 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12655699?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0749c57314&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

My email from last week seemed to upset a few people. Of course, the truth being brought to light usually does generate nervousness and sometimes aggression in folks who have NOTHING to hide, right? As I indicated last week, a national campaign consultant company **OPERATED** the State Party, **for years** to control outcomes to further business opportunities for the next 2-year cycle and the next. The business of buying, selling and controlling policy, is the core operation of people within the political system. This is why they will spend $1 million+ to win an office that only pays $150k/yr or for Unicameral Senators around $17k/yr!

Many institutional politicos believe any variance from status quo politics as pushing divisive rhetoric. However, I believe the year of 2020 and July 9th, 2022 were tipping points, as an _**awakening of the people**_. An awakening that is ASKING questions and even more so, DEMANDING answers. I see this happening at the Republican National Committee (RNC) meetings among the newest members. You see it in Congress and the leadership saga surrounding the Speaker election and vacancy. I see it happening in other states as I work with the state chairs, many of whom are newer to their positions than I am. One thing I can assure you of is this...from what I see in the new, competent and patriotic leaders from the other states, the awakening is growing faster and driven by leaders who will not yield.

We reached a tipping point in the Republican Party of Nebraska and it led to July 9th, 2022 and this is being mirrored at the national level. July 9th, 2022 saw a formidable majority of a governing body (State Delegates) saying, "Enough is enough!". Leading up to the 2022 State Convention, political games were attempted to stop six state delegates _(who were duly elected from sub-districts)_ from attending, having a voice...from participating in the representative process. _What crimes or rule breaking or horrible actions did these delegates commit?_ They used their First Amendment right in various ways to speak the truth of the State Party's operations. Yep, they spoke out against the previous administration and the consulting class control, so therefore they were bad Republicans. They were banned from even ENTERING the State Convention venue with additional "security" needed to protect against the aggressive behavior of these free thinkers. But...we were prepared...we amended the Conventions credential report to allow for the six excluded delegates to be certified and this passed with an overwhelming majority. __If there is one thing ALL Republicans stand for it is defending others when their Rights are unconstitutionally taken__. The rest of the Convention highlights and the antics of former leaders are for an upcoming email. That Saturday was a culmination of what happens when 'The People' put down their keyboards, stopped making memes and social media posts, and did the two things that truly led to change.

#1 We knew the rules
#2 We showed up

>From a small group of initial planners to a rally with 250 passionate Republicans the Friday before, we knew the rules and we showed up in force.
We prepared together.
We prayed together.
We persisted together.

And, we won TOGETHER.

Republicans of Nebraska...you were and are on the leading edge of change within this country. Change within the Republican party. It is unprecedented what occurred on July 9th, 2022 and the subsequent makeover of the NEGOP. However, all the change needed for Nebraska will not happen overnight and it will not come to fruition if you waiver. **You have to persist.** You have to see a vision of what this state and country could be again. We took back the party FOR the people, so the people can take back their LOCAL communities, FIRST.

I want America First and I want Nebraska First, but let's secure North Platte First, and Kearney First, and Norfolk First, and Columbus First, etc. You have to engage your local county parties and bring your time, talents, and treasures. You have to engage now because there are even those within our own party who are just waiting for you to lose your activism. Waiting for you to lose your enthusiasm and go home to be good Republicans again who just vote when told and donate when told.

We need candidates. Mama bears and coaches and church leaders and grandparents and young Republicans to rise for 2024. Yes, that means YOU. You need to become a new elected Constitutional and Platform Republican (CPR's) on YOUR 244 School Boards and 19 Educational Service Units. We need our Board of Education and UNL Regents and Community College Boards to have value based and solution driven leaders like YOU, not conformists to woke ideology. If it's not YOU, then who? And when? When it's too late? **2024 will not be successful without your direct involvement and that's the truth.**

Lastly, we have to face the hard truth that not all current elected leaders want to work WITH the party. Those officials who call Constitutional and Platform Republicans “radicals” or that we are purging the party...they simply don’t get it. They bury their heads in the sand, pretending that today’s challenges are simply political, rather than existential or spiritual. Some officials say they are waiting for the dust to settle on the unprecedented change within the party. Some want the NEGOP and all the people to be more "Team" players. I can say with beyond reproach that we have the receipts to prove time and time again attempts to connect and create the relationships that should be beneficial for the people's party. I believe that the elected officials who choose to work WITH the State Party are committed to working with The People. The elected officials that want that relationship, choose YOU the people, over lobbyists, special interests groups, wealthy donors, or echo chambers that perpetuate their legacies.

On the presidential front there is only ONE candidate or candidate campaign that has made any effort to connect to Nebraska. He has a message for you, see below!

The truth shall set us free.

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood

clean_body: Special Message from President Trump🇺🇸 | | | | | | | Good Morning Republicans, My email from last week seemed to upset a few people. Of course, the truth being brought to light usually does generate nervousness and sometimes aggression in folks who have NOTHING to hide, right? As I indicated last week, a national campaign consultant company OPERATED the State Party, for years to control outcomes to further business opportunities for the next 2-year cycle and the next. The business of buying, selling and controlling policy, is the core operation of people within the political system. This is why they will spend $1 million+ to win an office that only pays $150k/yr or for Unicameral Senators around $17k/yr! Many institutional politicos believe any variance from status quo politics as pushing divisive rhetoric. However, I believe the year of 2020 and July 9th, 2022 were tipping points, as an awakening of the people. An awakening that is ASKING questions and even more so, DEMANDING answers. I see this happening at the Republican National Committee (RNC) meetings among the newest members. You see it in Congress and the leadership saga surrounding the Speaker election and vacancy. I see it happening in other states as I work with the state chairs, many of whom are newer to their positions than I am. One thing I can assure you of is this...from what I see in the new, competent and patriotic leaders from the other states, the awakening is growing faster and driven by leaders who will not yield. We reached a tipping point in the Republican Party of Nebraska and it led to July 9th, 2022 and this is being mirrored at the national level. July 9th, 2022 saw a formidable majority of a governing body (State Delegates) saying, "Enough is enough!". Leading up to the 2022 State Convention, political games were attempted to stop six state delegates (who were duly elected from sub-districts) from attending, having a voice...from participating in the representative process. What crimes or rule breaking or horrible actions did these delegates commit? They used their First Amendment right in various ways to speak the truth of the State Party's operations. Yep, they spoke out against the previous administration and the consulting class control, so therefore they were bad Republicans. They were banned from even ENTERING the State Convention venue with additional "security" needed to protect against the aggressive behavior of these free thinkers. But...we were prepared...we amended the Conventions credential report to allow for the six excluded delegates to be certified and this passed with an overwhelming majority. If there is one thing ALL Republicans stand for it is defending others when their Rights are unconstitutionally taken. The rest of the Convention highlights and the antics of former leaders are for an upcoming email. That Saturday was a culmination of what happens when 'The People' put down their keyboards, stopped making memes and social media posts, and did the two things that truly led to change. #1 We knew the rules #2 We showed up From a small group of initial planners to a rally with 250 passionate Republicans the Friday before, we knew the rules and we showed up in force. We prepared together. We prayed together. We persisted together. And, we won TOGETHER. Republicans of Nebraska...you were and are on the leading edge of change within this country. Change within the Republican party. It is unprecedented what occurred on July 9th, 2022 and the subsequent makeover of the NEGOP. However, all the change needed for Nebraska will not happen overnight and it will not come to fruition if you waiver. You have to persist. You have to see a vision of what this state and country could be again. We took back the party FOR the people, so the people can take back their LOCAL communities, FIRST. I want America First and I want Nebraska First, but let's secure North Platte First, and Kearney First, and Norfolk First, and Columbus First, etc. You have to engage your local county parties and bring your time, talents, and treasures. You have to engage now because there are even those within our own party who are just waiting for you to lose your activism. Waiting for you to lose your enthusiasm and go home to be good Republicans again who just vote when told and donate when told. We need candidates. Mama bears and coaches and church leaders and grandparents and young Republicans to rise for 2024. Yes, that means YOU. You need to become a new elected Constitutional and Platform Republican (CPR's) on YOUR 244 School Boards and 19 Educational Service Units. We need our Board of Education and UNL Regents and Community College Boards to have value based and solution driven leaders like YOU, not conformists to woke ideology. If it's not YOU, then who? And when? When it's too late? 2024 will not be successful without your direct involvement and that's the truth. Lastly, we have to face the hard truth that not all current elected leaders want to work WITH the party. Those officials who call Constitutional and Platform Republicans “radicals” or that we are purging the party...they simply don’t get it. They bury their heads in the sand, pretending that today’s challenges are simply political, rather than existential or spiritual. Some officials say they are waiting for the dust to settle on the unprecedented change within the party. Some want the NEGOP and all the people to be more "Team" players. I can say with beyond reproach that we have the receipts to prove time and time again attempts to connect and create the relationships that should be beneficial for the people's party. I believe that the elected officials who choose to work WITH the State Party are committed to working with The People. The elected officials that want that relationship, choose YOU the people, over lobbyists, special interests groups, wealthy donors, or echo chambers that perpetuate their legacies. On the presidential front there is only ONE candidate or candidate campaign that has made any effort to connect to Nebraska. He has a message for you, see below! The truth shall set us free. With much blessings, | | –Chairman Underwood | President Donald J. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?
%recipient.md5_hash%
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd0d713ed2294f2fb11002d1e67c1454&_e=2h9ht3k1bFopices6iKDlei8j5A4N-Lb6X4b14eaJ9NCiu-M6j9oEkvyxPRJRbpizf49Y5u9tLyl3ZBY4OkzeoR1w8Ayo738nLF5rxzirnAgCJtgrrkdAqJA8-bxBHUHVxpn6GJF_l_nbV3U7kF5GObfS5v1GS6rKcc1DJGIozMoR300MiOGQYqhx2cKlwETiNT3lEwBB-b2NT-HxkIeEUFwcyw6MWvBfzPWPXWRAH6aNQNL3MlIWMBctf1VEc8-_HGo8dp2BWU5iZdib_HT_FEo_io4Fa-b_YZ_2WbYqL2TYToD7LKqP4WqTCOTmvTg_cq1aKJ-e3DP1rD2HMhhVW07Qs6S_YsR4yYe9HVDnpNw1iD6VmjpoKd1JSTLo5E20OmNGb7TbpZRDbQ8VRfL6Q%3D%3D)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd0d713ed2294f2fb11002d1e67c1454&_e=2h9ht3k1bFopices6iKDlei8j5A4N-Lb6X4b14eaJ9NCiu-M6j9oEkvyxPRJRbpizf49Y5u9tLyl3ZBY4OkzeoR1w8Ayo738nLF5rxzirnAgCJtgrrkdAqJA8-bxBHUHVxpn6GJF_l_nbV3U7kF5GObfS5v1GS6rKcc1DJGIozMoR300MiOGQYqhx2cKlwETiNT3lEwBB-b2NT-HxkIeEUFwcyw6MWvBfzPWPXWRAH6aNQNL3MlIWMBctf1VEc8-YncQK8ONUBJIaoQvsW0EHK9b0M8K3sR-l6M03fHHjsO07kY1ZJItnzkD61QQiBV5vm8TSDJs2SHmNLlHm4BFWZFZZUlK_I7n4MF7owN_tNroegqHULeMGPtQG7vwQTwvXrtoKoxSS-Wc7h6fXHywww%3D%3D)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.
[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd0d713ed2294f2fb11002d1e67c1454&_e=2h9ht3k1bFopices6iKDlei8j5A4N-Lb6X4b14eaJ9NCiu-M6j9oEkvyxPRJRbpizf49Y5u9tLyl3ZBY4OkzeoR1w8Ayo738nLF5rxzirnAgCJtgrrkdAqJA8-bxBHUHVxpn6GJF_l_nbV3U7kF5GObfS5v1GS6rKcc1DJGIozMoR300MiOGQYqhx2cKlwETiNT3lEwBB-b2NT-HxkIeEUFwcyw6MWvBfzPWPXWRAH6aNQNL3MlIWMBctf1VEc8-4HyiAvRtGteZsZG0EYdNtcYaI-mlpszsB0xrstayd0UrlvPl4qkUXEMUDX1LShB5kXf7gJmfYm7eAXnQyAcHtM6H4D_U48zPbLkiLBa9adVdZU-SrBIt5uFvgsZ-OQmbf0Z1Nn2huBifRcORMY0SRQ%3D%3D)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Defend the Constitution
---

name: Letitia James
subject: I'm asking for $10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
I know it doesn't sound like much, but my entire fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71284167/431737459/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1203-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQ1ZTA0Zi03NTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLvix4ygiZr1OYokXv4YxiT4PAm9jhUvRp75F_QqY7w=)
---
$10.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $10 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71284170/431737474/-2022127741?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=10&refcode=jtk1203-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQ1ZTA0Zi03NTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLvix4ygiZr1OYokXv4YxiT4PAm9jhUvRp75F_QqY7w=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we head into the next half of 2023, I _must_ keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $10 for the first ten days of the tenth month of the year to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71284173/431737490/-2022127741?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=10&refcode=jtk1203-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjQ1ZTA0Zi03NTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLvix4ygiZr1OYokXv4YxiT4PAm9jhUvRp75F_QqY7w=)**

clean_body: I know it doesn't sound like much, but my entire fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. | | | = $10. I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my entire fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. = – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important. Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless. But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work. And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure real wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is not up for sale. As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we head into the next half of 2023, I must keep that momentum going. = | | = Thank you for all of your support. Letitia With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Peter,

**Today, I** ’**m proud to endorse CAPT Hung Cao for U.S. Senate in Virginia.**

Hung is the American Dream and the true definition of an American hero.

He and his family escaped Communist Vietnam with little besides the clothes on their backs.

**And even though Hung came here not knowing a word of English, by the time he graduated high school, he had an appointment to the****N****aval Academy.**

After he graduated from the Naval Academy, he dedicated 25 years to serving on the front lines as a U.S. Navy Special Operations Officer.

Hung defused bombs to save the lives of men, women, and children in war zones and dove the depths of the oceans around the world to recover victims of plane crashes. His sacrifice protected America from our enemies.

_But just because he_ ’ _s hung up his uniform doesn_ ’ _t mean he_ ’ _s done fighting for America._

He sees every day how Joe Biden and Tim Kaine are destroying our country from the inside out. Hung will not stand for career politicians who forget the sacrifice of our Servicemembers. He knows he has a duty to remind Washington that they work for the American people.

**Hung isn** ’**t done fighting for America, and now, he needs you to fight for him so he can take****on Joe****Biden and the radical Left.**

* **They want you to believe inflation isn’t hurting your business or wallet They want to outlaw incandescent lightbulbs**
* **They want to outlaw gas stoves**
* **They want to outlaw ceiling fans**
* **They want tell you what car you can buy They want tell you the gender of your child**
* **This isn’t the America Hung fought to protect. He will work tirelessly to stop this bloated, out-of-control government.**

**[Please, join me today to send Hung Cao to the U.S. Senate to TAKE ON the socialist tyrants who want to destroy our country!](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8f62ca058278437bbf5c31ab400ed9a5&_e=noRnHgUJOFSNX5PxSsS7Afz-LccxInsu8RgdYt1GFKOa48nPpuBIpJqyKPK2RBgQMBC8imeak-eNgz2Vn-6-HaAaaAtsy9QaJ4AmaBbfbtfYDun5yR5gLOCl2M3GhBWEXCNQIU6tU-gqrCGj2wRxZ2SV_hXbN-HckALOCLKn61ePdvhZaW2BeQJ-mrIyOdw6uZPk9_WzqaLQRYhNSRMaAkFqsa_uSyfNdmczFVp8WfRDIdLdYIxzGxdVygTR3TCGfR4Gwycf1pHzWyb9sx3jE6ArdADHOiY5pDEZ8Db0XH2yztqyttuDWrMB9MRk7y4TNdTGiFFTFsjgHby9pD4ZVyiPMBDXAthf7-l2LVfUEoYLK_M44WvboLssS-3iJUaj)**

body:
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to GIFFORDS PAC today.
#

Friends -
We are writing to ask you to [**make a $1 donation to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231010-1-60&amount=1&t=1&akid=6697%2E3935704%2E5h3UBY)
Yes, just $1.
$1 to help us continue fighting for lifesaving gun safety legislation at the federal level and in every state nationwide.
$1 to help us elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot this year and in 2024.
$1 to send a strong message to the gun lobby that we will **never** back down in the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
We know that $1 may not seem like the kind of money that can do all those things. But when everyone adds their $1, it makes a world of difference.
So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $1 to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your contribution goes directly towards our work to keep our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231010-1-60&amount=1&t=2&akid=6697%2E3935704%2E5h3UBY)

Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

body:
Your vote is crucial.
|
Team, **Time is running out to register to vote – the deadline is tonight at midnight!** If you haven’t registered yet, or know anyone who hasn’t, now is the time to take action. [Be sure to visit our website to register to vote and make your voting plan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71286433/431744980/1498719018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWFjMjE4OS03NzY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFvf-DIcJz0U8aM-jyA2gbVFdXOPHMPSLtO8WXwKrIc=&emci=f8a057f0-e966-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=b1ac2189-7767-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327) ****[We need your help to register as many new voters as we possibly can today. Can you chip in $5 to help us get it done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71286434/431744981/-1481055650?refcode=odp_em_231010_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWFjMjE4OS03NzY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFvf-DIcJz0U8aM-jyA2gbVFdXOPHMPSLtO8WXwKrIc=)**** **Here’s what you need to know about voter registration and the upcoming election:**
1. Ohio Republicans are willing to go as far as they can to limit abortion access. When _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, they rushed to federal court to implement a six-week abortion ban, with no exceptions for rape or incest. Reproductive rights are on the ballot next month.
2. BUT thanks to our corrupt GOP, no new voters can register to vote in the 30 days leading up to the election – hindering our efforts to mobilize voters during the days they’re paying the most attention. That means today is our last opportunity to get Ohioans registered.
3. Democrats aren’t the only ones gearing up for this election, Republicans are too. But they’re doing it by abusing their power and practicing unethical strategies, like kicking voters off the active voter roll and changing the ballot language to try to trick voters. They’re assaulting the fundamental principles of our democracy.

****[This is where you come in. Your donation will help us with our final push to register voters today. Together, we can fight to make every Ohioan a registered voter and protect reproductive rights in the state constitution. If you are able, donate anything you can today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71286435/431744982/-1481055650?refcode=odp_em_231010_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWFjMjE4OS03NzY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFvf-DIcJz0U8aM-jyA2gbVFdXOPHMPSLtO8WXwKrIc=)**** We believe in the power of your voice. Just one vote has the potential to shape our future. Thank you, Ohio Dems ** ** | ****A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=c00a6982d2&u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=8a59f544b2)
---
| |
---
| | **🚨 New Polling Shows Eigel for Governor Support SURGING 🚨**

After recent polling showed State Senator Bill Eigel surging into 2nd place on the uninformed ballot in the Missouri Gubernatorial Race, new polling among **INFORMED** Republican voters shows decisive support for Bill Eigel. In a poll taken Sep 29-Oct 1, Eigel garners a **clear majority of informed support**!

Eigel 52%
Ashcroft 14%
Kehoe 11%
Undecided 22%

“Our campaign has gotten a lot of national attention because I am the only candidate willing to fight the Swamp in Jefferson City,” Eigel said. “Ashcroft and Kehoe are pro-swamp. They support raising taxes and spending, selling Missouri to foreign countries, and allowing machines to take over our elections.”

This polling comes on the heels of several straw polls taken in a half dozen Missouri counties showing Eigel winning in every case with broad support—including decisive victories in St Louis, St Charles, Cole, Cass and Perry Counties.

“Missourians want a leader different than the same status quo of do-nothing RINOs controlling the state in Jefferson City. I will be that leader.”

The poll was taken from N=400 respondents with a margin of error of +\\- 5%

**Let’s Go Missouri!**

That’s why I’m reaching out to try and build support for border security - whether that’s building the wall or supporting our border patrol with additional resources, we MUST take action. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6f4431c9f59644d42c07af9b42f74bf16c0e5bf46d091189bd72755ff4f03e55df01961adbd10ea78129a3dec510afb4e6585b321ba88a5e If you want to see our southern border secured, I’m personally asking you to add your name to this petition today. But that starts with signing your name to our petition and standing up for border security. Are you with me? -Jen https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6f4431c9f59644d44c50c86173f95702f19c91308ad60d438eb5dd3c5a53adcdf2cd1d89860bea45ad5123e49b79963085595911e10c2a85 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
