name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Tchenko?=
subject: Ted Cruz still hasn’t responded
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tchenko for Texas
body:
Who is he really working for?! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/99ddfe10026c/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12655585?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
This week, the Texas Legislature has begun a special session to debate defunding public schools and reallocating our tax dollars to a bunch of private schools and billionaire donors.
_Which is horrifying._ Over half of Texas’s 254 counties don’t have a single private school in their districts. What’s going to happen to the millions of children who don’t have “the right connections” to be able to gain access to a quality education?
_**That is not how public education works.**_
Watching this all unfold in Austin has us thinking back to that time when Ted Cruz challenged Thierry on the issue... _and then immediately backed down!_
In case you missed it, Thierry tweeted that defunding public schools is an insult to Texas students & teachers. He promised that as your next Democratic U.S. Senator, he’ll work to bring as much federal funding to our public schools as possible.

[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=dffa3fd2a4&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Seems like a pretty common sense pledge, if you actually care about the children and working families of Texas.
But, if you’re Ted Cruz and your mind has been steeped in right-wing propaganda for so long that you can no longer tell up from down, this simple statement was proof of some sinister plot to destroy the future of “low-income Black & Hispanic kids trapped in failing schools.”
[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=84d4a177da&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Thierry of course responded to Ted’s absurd claim, asking him to please explain how funding public schools was somehow bad for... *checks notes*... public schools and the children who attend them.
**Thierry also made it clear that this was a debate he was willing to have with Ted** _**(anywhere, anytime)**_**. Because our children deserve nothing less.**
[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=aa84d326ec&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Ted’s response: _silence._
Because extreme right-wing talking points are fine, but they can only get you so far.
**Ted Cruz is all too comfortable throwing punches on Twitter, but he’s not working for the people of Texas. And he hasn’t been for far too long.**
[**If you’re ready to support our public schools, send Ted packing, and create a New Way Forward together, kick in $20.24 or more today and let’s keep our momentum going strong.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=9770bc387e&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Thank you,Team Tchenko
|
---

My opponent has made no secret of the fact that he wants to ban books in Texas.
Whether they’re written by people of color, members of the LGBTQ+ community, or simply don’t conform to his twisted worldview, Cruz has made it clear he wants a say in what books can appear in our libraries.

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley: “Missouri could be one of the closest Senate races in America. In fact, control of the Senate could come down to us.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Josh Hawley is panicking, Peter.
**Just read what he recently told his top donors in a message about his race against Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat:**
**_“Missouri could be one of the closest Senate races in America._**
**_In fact, control of the Senate could come down to us.”_**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38531?refcode=em20231010-3955&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3955%2E614464%2Et1Axw7)**
**Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024, and he knows it** — as does every corporate mega-donor backing him.
**FIRST:** After Lucas outraised Hawley over the first six months of this year, a handful of GOP insiders and mega-donors launched a new Super PAC with more than a million dollars to spend propping up Hawley’s flailing campaign and tearing Lucas down.
**THEN:** A report from _Morning Consult_ showed that Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any Republican U.S. Senator up for re-election this cycle — even worse than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida.

body:
In A Few Days

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=2ef25f1002f94a97ad32c81e85318d62&_e=6MGkB2I0rMVWtuREzZ3vQxpejDzIki1VTLOe-8Rs0oyijPLucJIdILQYyQgWe9fEffqC0FdLup-t4PCj-1CsPTV8BwXipQi0apRliIDBmaH6ydUKiNyxN6-HQnGp7xLkTN4OjC69zHB4MPwDxTF1I4skdQQPDsIOYnYPd3PiazltzkZqJo4WC13yyi7Hf7o_x_jVavKy87BHrmt30sXeYURcAP6bjQNbGfCxWEBd1ijgVbpWBjGtwrn5xeThC7lI6Xw2-wY32gv9C-IAhXVa6waXUHNV8eMwVcSsk_BfcwirkhGn16oIiNGpUjMteO-3Xv76VUhHYTdT46M5495FhOTc5kJ8lroQhyrD6DqVsngL5e4EJhJvCzZAsRDaKtOOw48r0bme9OOQDA8V8-fu1cT6k77CywsEe7uN8GnnEMQ%3D)
---
Friend,

A lot can happen in a few days. The world could change, an election could be won, or in our case, both.

I'll be blunt: I need your help to keep Common Sense in America.

There's no more time to be sitting on the sidelines; the only way we'll do that is if everybody chips in and does their part.

After all, elections aren't won on campaigning alone; it also takes $$$.

It's getting down to the wire and this could still be anyone's race. Either we all do our part to help re-elect Andy so he can continue growing our economy, investing in infrastructure, supporting public education, and more. Andy's opponent and his super PAC allies are spending big in these final weeks to try and buy this race. name: Bri Brough
subject: An Infuriating Scenario: Will Voters Be Ignored in Their Plea for Fair Maps?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

In the heart of North Carolina, a crucial fight for fair maps presses on. Recent headlines tell a stark tale: [**Voters plead for fairness, yet lawmakers turn a deaf ear, determined to forge a path of partisan division.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71291460/431760097/1008169070?refcode=20231010_AOTL_F_NCBri_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NzdkN2IxLTdkNjctZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WTRn61y8LPfyurrfblMgoepC8weKdPly-S3lWYoLriI=)
**North Carolinians plead for fair elections. State lawmakers will ignore them.**
_“Having held public hearings, North Carolina Republican lawmakers will now ignore public testimony and draw gerrymandered redistricting maps.”_
NC Newsline
**Our view: Voters oppose gerrymandering. Lawmakers will do it anyway.**
_“Linda Archer of Guilford County spared no words Wednesday night in describing how partisan gerrymandering has rendered her vote irrelevant.”_
Winston-Salem Journal
---
**It's an infuriating scenario:** North Carolinians voiced their demand for fair representation, only to have their concerns fall on deaf ears. Despite the resounding plea for fair elections, conservative lawmakers press on with the creation of gerrymandered redistricting maps.
This is not a mere political tussle. It's a fight that demands our unwavering resolve, our collective strength.

subject: 𝐩𝐨𝐥𝐥 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭 #𝟑𝟖𝟒𝟕𝟔𝟔𝟐

body:
re: your local postal worker
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20274%2E4449941%2EoyDw8s)
---
As soon as it became clear that Vote-By-Mail is a cornerstone of our democracy, _**Republicans set their sights on DESTROYING it!**_

And you can bet they’re going after our Postal Service to do so – _Trump’s handpicked crony Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is at the helm!_

**IF** we don’t show a SWEEPING wave of support for our Postal Service, Republicans will run it into the GROUND!

**BUT IF** we send the strongest message possible, we can support our Postal Service and make sure every American can cast their ballot! body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71293694/431767434/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230831Shutdown_SB_90DO_4_G_N&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjYyY2JlZi04MDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gqM878f9XCyWFN18hCSOL0i3MjvbVrBdcd2EaCFzYjk=) Peter,

It was bad enough when the MAGA Republicans gleefully tossed Congress into chaos by ousting their own Speaker Rep. Kevin McCarthy as Speaker. Now everyone’s favorite twice-impeached and four-times-indicted former president Donald Trump is throwing gasoline on the dumpster fire by endorsing one of his most loyal defenders and extremist poster child Jim Jordan as Speaker of the House. * Leads the attacks on reproductive freedom even calling a 10-year-old rape victim a liar.
* Shamelessly promotes the most ridiculous lies and “deep state” conspiracy theories.

name: (1) Ron DeSantis, me
subject: The federal government is a mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Integrity, sanity, and accountability are missing in action from the federal government. It’s time to usher in a reckoning, and I’d like you to help.
---
| | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click [**here**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b12951ed87574da8a8f44fd8c1e1063c&_t=p3hGWqz3qsDEmxi5S8dB9ckOgreIQpQi99s_fmCJEOEjtLrEBMqYPTE6RmhL4b7dFIdF0OM9mjHGAHoUI0OHNuoNYF9-bDlMQXauXxz-r8M%3D)
---
[](https://google.comhttps://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-imgedata?utm_source=hs_id&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-10-10_id-congress-is-theater_ha_aud0022_em0739_lp0547_rds_na_na)

Peter, We're going in the wrong direction. Have you seen what's happening in Washington? It's absolute political failure theater and it's time to put pressure on representatives to actually work for the American people. **2024 is our chance to usher in a reckoning to these swamp creatures who have treated politics as entertainment.** In Washington, it's a cesspool, and they've let it suck them in. I know, when you're up there representing the people who put you in office, most times, the media is going to want you to fail, the bureaucracy is going to be against you, obviously, the institutional Left... It's more important than ever to support leaders who know where true north is, and don't lose sight of that. Instead, we've got leadership that's weakening by the day. I am tired of seeing Republicans lose, and our party is being shot in the foot because of the theatrics in Congress. We should have had a Red Wave in 2022. Instead, Florida delivered. We united and drew people into the party while the rest of the nation let us down and just barely won the majority in the House. Here's what I know: you've got to be focused, you've got to be disciplined, and you can't get distracted by flailing theatrics and side controversies.**It's all about the mission.** When I was in the military serving in places like Iraq, I learned quick that you check everything else at the door, and put one thing first. I promise you, I will be a very determined President, and the issues that I pursue will be the issues that matter to you. I will get the job done; hitting the ground running on Day One. No more fanfare. No more underdelivering. But what we do today matters for what we can accomplish in the future. I'm asking for your donation to my team so we can win, Peter. With this link << **[https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b12951ed87574da8a8f44fd8c1e1063c&_e=irBZf1zLdXghbbpcAycEHNAKF52WccFENuH46JZAlPy11DdmKoOJwEXqoEdR5M_hodofM51N4q5VO2vi_ACJCcuSs_E1u8-495wMBpvQ5aC-QJ1-79iSPUDnn6pT9eO_Q3fZhSXDyxCHVa1fmzkRffXhkgagsTiXm26HfdTt-MVLQR5UEvuCQ5Ykzkzv9BpNuNuBxwIvVVKjsqfIN7Njez0pVMa_R8TBgiO3sPrZLOZ74JODa8eWmejRe5fGiHb3jI8i0MH4wBRNTO8Fm_AZKD7YKLa0vaW_p3vdyrRUXQOoJB8qHj89NI-mmLP0vv6Zc1Ghf9flTKN2Ughi9EPCRrPv28cptAhpMFrrZhlMng1N_FOhO2Fv_tB8tW-gSFGDjS97C5h4S1ZXHIXYyFi-3ZmT1srraIzxY9saQS_1oTo%3D "https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today")** >>, your contribution will go directly toward turning the tide on Washington politics being entertainment, wasteful, and performative. Let's get it done, together.
---

The virtue signaling will go down right alongside the woke nonsense. We'll end it all in 2025. I'm a leader, I'm not an entertainer. My job is to turn this country around and to make sure that you, your kids, and grandkids have a shot at the American dream. And I will get that done. I hope to earn your support in this critical mission.

clean_body: Integrity, sanity, and accountability are missing in action from the federal government. It’s time to usher in a reckoning, and I’d like you to help. | | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click Peter, We're going in the wrong direction. Have you seen what's happening in Washington? It's absolute political failure theater and it's time to put pressure on representatives to actually work for the American people. 2024 is our chance to usher in a reckoning to these swamp creatures who have treated politics as entertainment. In Washington, it's a cesspool, and they've let it suck them in. I know, when you're up there representing the people who put you in office, most times, the media is going to want you to fail, the bureaucracy is going to be against you, obviously, the institutional Left... It's more important than ever to support leaders who know where true north is, and don't lose sight of that. Instead, we've got leadership that's weakening by the day. I am tired of seeing Republicans lose, and our party is being shot in the foot because of the theatrics in Congress. We should have had a Red Wave in 2022. Instead, Florida delivered. We united and drew people into the party while the rest of the nation let us down and just barely won the majority in the House. Here's what I know: you've got to be focused, you've got to be disciplined, and you can't get distracted by flailing theatrics and side controversies.It's all about the mission. When I was in the military serving in places like Iraq, I learned quick that you check everything else at the door, and put one thing first. I promise you, I will be a very determined President, and the issues that I pursue will be the issues that matter to you. I will get the job done; hitting the ground running on Day One. No more fanfare. No more underdelivering. But what we do today matters for what we can accomplish in the future. I'm asking for your donation to my team so we can win, Peter. With this link << "" >>, your contribution will go directly toward turning the tide on Washington politics being entertainment, wasteful, and performative. I hope to earn your support in this critical mission. | | Patriot,

---
You could be my Mar-a-Lago VIP.
---
_Now doesn’t that sound nice? _

---
To commemorate being nearly 1 YEAR OUT from Election Day 2024, I’m hosting a very special reception at Mar-a-Lago – or, as it’s often been called “The Winter White House.”

---
And I’m inviting one lucky winner – and a guest of your choice – to join us for the very important gathering at my home in Florida.

---
Mar-a-Lago has been the focus of my sham trial in New York – where an anti-Trump Attorney General is trying to strip it of its value by claiming it’s worth less than a small plot of land.

---
What do YOU think?

---

---
But forget the picture – come see for yourself in person!

---
One lucky winner (and a guest of your choice) will be flown out to attend this special reception at the end of the month – and to really make it special, we’ll even take a picture together and you’ll get a MAGA hat signed by me.

Your flight, your hotel, and your tickets to the reception will all be on me...

... _All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount to WIN BACK the White House and SAVE our country in 2024 to be automatically entered to win._

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Sign to say you're with Team Biden-Harris >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
You can make a huge impact today by taking this small but meaningful action: | | |
---
Peter, A dozen Republicans are running for president. And they continue to prove that whoever their nominee may be, they are guaranteed to be too extreme and out of touch for American families. Nothing is a stronger example of the differences in leadership than the first Republican debate where these candidates touted extremist policies that threaten to take away our liberties and threaten our democracy. **We can't risk their extreme MAGA agenda making it to the Oval Office.** We have to put in the work now to secure another term for President Biden and Vice President Harris so they can continue making progress to protect and uplift Americans. During his time in office, President Biden has taken historic legislative action in advancing public safety, our economy, and health care access, including the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ and the _Inflation Reduction Act_ \-- and this is only the beginning. But making sure we secure another term is no small task, it requires all of us to work together. That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your personal endorsement of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. [**So Peter, will you join the thousands of other supporters who have proudly signed on to endorse Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and add your name today? clean_body: You can make a huge impact today by taking this small but meaningful action: | | | Peter, A dozen Republicans are running for president. And they continue to prove that whoever their nominee may be, they are guaranteed to be too extreme and out of touch for American families. Nothing is a stronger example of the differences in leadership than the first Republican debate where these candidates touted extremist policies that threaten to take away our liberties and threaten our democracy. We can't risk their extreme MAGA agenda making it to the Oval Office. We have to put in the work now to secure another term for President Biden and Vice President Harris so they can continue making progress to protect and uplift Americans. During his time in office, President Biden has taken historic legislative action in advancing public safety, our economy, and health care access, including the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act and the Inflation Reduction Act \-- and this is only the beginning. But making sure we secure another term is no small task, it requires all of us to work together. That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your personal endorsement of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. | | | It seems simple, but adding your name to say you support Joe and Kamala helps show how strong our grassroots campaign is. When people write us off, you’re all the proof we need to show our grassroots strength. We simply couldn’t do any of this without you. Thank you for your ongoing support. Team Biden-Harris

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: BINGO: Biden just delivered for young Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, friend:
President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!!
I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: Please split a donation of $20 today between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help carry this momentum forward and elect the leaders we deserve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, friend.
When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress.
Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows.
The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!!
And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement.
In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden.
Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics
Help us carry this momentum and get more life-saving sh*t done by splitting a donation of $20 between Serve America and Leaders We Deserve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
We should celebrate this momentous victory, friend — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon.
There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few.
There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country.
If you’re celebrating this victory, but are ready for the important work ahead, please split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help fund our work. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Thanks for your support, friend. Together, we will keep making the progress we deserve.
David Hogg
P.S. Me when we finally get the Office of Gun Violence Prevention 👇😊
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/hoggoffices.jpg]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Call your Rep. for Jim Jordan

body:
Speaker Vote is Wednesday
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MYoZoR-zN6QoG3S5QcEzuCqN1uNIwOjUaJpfBJFTpv5XUpsQWXu5B3dQA5moUo8PFX-dG-vrtI2lr2hKVs3EUfvWjM8FB0ppB94MPeqBLd1bXqyLYVm14_9Ew2n9JBgXPAxEvTcdVLtFbJykkqJf_s279hXVaRVMsswElHm3uqY=&c=SC34kRKV_i5re9HBr4xdX3J-WBpn7nEgG2wnKpG9s7qCC5gsni5b8w==&ch=D4X28KTj9MIbdmf3MBFgETb6sbkxhSVrj-t4uYgFaAYExs5RJm8ETg==)
---
| Support Rep. Jordan for Speaker
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

The Republican Conference will vote for a new Speaker of the House tomorrow, Wednesday, Oct. 11. This is our opportunity to have a true conservative for Speaker. I am supporting Rep. Jim Jordan of Ohio.

Rep. Jordan and Rep. Steve Scalise are running in the Republican Conference for Speaker. They are both good men. I believe Rep. Jordan will do a better job. He is a Freedom Caucus member who is serving our country well as Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee. Before that, Rep. Jordan showed his ability to stand up to Democrats as Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee. Rep. Jordan has proved to be a true conservative and a careful manager of important congressional committees. I believe he is the best candidate for Speaker.

I am currently contacting Virginia's Republican Congressional Delegation to whip the vote for Rep. Jordan for Speaker, and I ask you to join me.

So far, Reps. Bob Good and Ben Cline are supporting Rep. Jordan, while Rep. Wittman is supporting Rep. Scalise. Reps. Kiggans and Griffith haven't committed to anyone.

Please call the offices of Reps. Wittman, Kiggans, and Griffith and press them to vote for Rep. Jim Jordan of Ohio for Speaker of the House.

Rep. Rob Wittman, VA-1
D.C. Office: 202-225-4261
[Email through Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MYoZoR-zN6QoG3S5QcEzuCqN1uNIwOjUaJpfBJFTpv5XUpsQWXu5B0QAwMMsnRTMCr20hw2Sz7mIGQSgFHofwEZO8yX0JvawJQngnbjry76fu5s3a1tQUk1zLi7LuC2inFLZLhYqKXSRzPSxUHeI3BXqnegpWVg3&c=SC34kRKV_i5re9HBr4xdX3J-WBpn7nEgG2wnKpG9s7qCC5gsni5b8w==&ch=D4X28KTj9MIbdmf3MBFgETb6sbkxhSVrj-t4uYgFaAYExs5RJm8ETg==)

clean_body: Speaker Vote is Wednesday | | | | == | Support Rep. Jordan for Speaker | | | ---|--- Dear Friends, The Republican Conference will vote for a new Speaker of the House tomorrow, Wednesday, Oct. 11. This is our opportunity to have a true conservative for Speaker. I am supporting Rep. Jim Jordan of Ohio. Rep. Jordan and Rep. Steve Scalise are running in the Republican Conference for Speaker. They are both good men. I believe Rep. Jordan will do a better job. He is a Freedom Caucus member who is serving our country well as Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee. Before that, Rep. Jordan showed his ability to stand up to Democrats as Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee. Rep. Jordan has proved to be a true conservative and a careful manager of important congressional committees. I believe he is the best candidate for Speaker. I am currently contacting Virginia's Republican Congressional Delegation to whip the vote for Rep. Jordan for Speaker, and I ask you to join me. So far, Reps. Bob Good and Ben Cline are supporting Rep. Jordan, while Rep. Wittman is supporting Rep. Scalise. Reps. Kiggans and Griffith haven't committed to anyone. Please call the offices of Reps. Wittman, Kiggans, and Griffith and press them to vote for Rep. Jim Jordan of Ohio for Speaker of the House. Rep. Rob Wittman, VA-1 D.C. Office: 202-225-4261 == Rep. Jen Kiggans, VA-2 D.C. Office: 202-225-4215 == Rep. Morgan Griffith, VA-9 D.C. Office: 202-225-3861 == For God & Country, Amanda Chase | Donate to help me continue to support true conservatives like Rep. Jim Jordan. | | == | | | | | | | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Walsh?=
subject: Voting in-person for WA Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Republicans across the state are leading the charge are bringing back voting in-person to Washington State. You can help support these efforts. | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1d36050a85&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | Dear Peter,

For decades, Republicans have been asking to vote in-person again in Washington State. **Now you can.**

Republicans have also been worried about whether or not returning a ballot through the Post Office is trustworthy. **Now you don't have to worry about it.**

Over the last month, the Washington State Republican Party has launched a program called**'Secure Your Vote'. **

This program includes several steps that encourages Republicans to vote, promotes legal ballot harvesting, and **helps ensure that every vote is properly counted** at the county elections office.

We are aligned with local businesses, churches, fishing & wildlife shops and conservative leaning groups to organize **conservative ballot box centers **across the state. We are also establishing **grassroots conservative teams** who will help you verify that your ballot was returned and counted by the county elections.

Building the statewide infrastructure for**'Secure Your Vote'** is going to take a lot of grassroots power and resources.**The secure ballot boxes alone can cost up to $150 each - these aren't just a shoe box with a whole cut in it.** And they are accompanied with voter information & materials, ballot tracking, and trained grassroots volunteer teams.

Our first step is to train the grassroots conservative teams and to establish the secure ballot boxes. While we start with training, can you help us put in place more secure ballot boxes?

**With your support, we can hit our goal of 200 verified conservative ballot box centers before the 2024 statewide election.** That's $30,000 just for the secure ballot boxes alone, which we've already spent $4,000 of.

[_**Can you help us reach the last $26,000 with a grassroots contribution of $10, $25, or $50 today?**_](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=367dc18f8f&e=6a281f566d)

---
| [Help fund conservative ballot box centers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=17e58dc74c&e=6a281f566d "Help fund conservative ballot box centers")
---
| Grassroots conservatives are already hard at work in all 39 counties and**here are some of the success stories** so far:

\- 9 conservative ballot boxes in Pierce county with 8 more on the way.

\- 3 In-person voting events organized in Central WA with 8 ballot boxes being deployed this week.

\- 15 churches have established conservative ballot box centers with hundreds of pastors encouraging voting within their congregations.

\- tens-of-thousands of phone calls and text messages are being launched to conservative voters for the 2023 local elections to connect them with our trained and verified grassroots volunteers.

Not every county and district has a fully operational ballot box center yet, or a team of trained and verified grassroots conservatives helping voters secure their vote. We will keep growing. And continue building. **And with your support, by next year we can hit our goal of 200 verified conservative ballot box centers in Washington State.**
---
| [Help fund conservative ballot box centers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9061d442bf&e=6a281f566d "Help fund conservative ballot box centers")
---
|
---
| | **Ballot harvesting is legal in Washington State. **Democrats have already been doing it in the shadows to win elections for the last decade.

Republicans in Washington State must start the effort now if we want to win close races for the foreseeable future. We will do it as aggressively as possible. We will conduct our efforts legally and with integrity. And in doing so, **we will start winning again!**

Please support our efforts today to bring this important change to the way our Party operates campaigns. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/smooth-transition-1341560?e=6a281f566d)
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._
Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates

**Our mailing address is:**
Washington State Republican Party11811 NE 1st St Suite 306Bellevue, WA 98005
[Add us to your address book](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/vcard?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=80c203e3b0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=80c203e3b0).

name: Team Mia
subject: We are Celebrating Mia's first year in office - please join us, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2024, FPPC#1456426
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/bonta%20logo%202.jpg]
Dear Laurie,

Our local Firefighters are hosting a special fundraiser for Assemblymember Mia Bonta to celebrate her first year in office and you are warmly invited to join us!

Wednesday, November 1, 2023 from 5:30 - 7:00 pm at Almanac Beer Co., 651 W. Tower Ave., Alameda - with friends, tacos, and beer!

Come hear from Mia about her successes over the past year - the bills sitting on the Governor's desk as we write, and her plans for next year, as she continues to lead with strength to represent Alameda, Emeryville, and Oakland.

Election Day Tuesday, March 5, 2024 is approaching quickly, with your generous help, we are continuing to do all that is needed for Mia's re-election.

Please mark your calendars for this important re-election campaign Taco Night fundraiser
Wednesday, November 1st from 5:30 pm to 7:00 pm
[https://secure.ngpvan.com/5sVCBU0eykuQIRlNLRZ_hQ2]

Please show your support by:
Becoming an Event Sponsor! Click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5sVCBU0eykuQIRlNLRZ_hQ2]
Sponsorship levels: $5,500 • $2,500 • $1,500 • $750 • $500
Purchasing Tickets click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5sVCBU0eykuQIRlNLRZ_hQ2]
Individuals: $150 suggested minimum contribution

Please contact 510-839-3100 or events@earpevents.com or click through here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5sVCBU0eykuQIRlNLRZ_hQ2] now, to add your name to our Sponsor* list, to purchase ticket(s), or make a donation (if you cannot join us).
We look forward to seeing you November 1st. Thank you, as always, for being a part of our movement for change!

With gratitude,

Team Mia

PS: If you cannot be with us, then please consider making a donation today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5sVCBU0eykuQIRlNLRZ_hQ2] . Your generous contribution today means we will have what is needed to mobilize voters to support Mia's re-election campaign. And, as always, share this information with your friends and colleagues so we continue to grow our reach!

Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2024, FPPC#1456426
4200 Park Blvd., #128, Oakland, CA. 94602 | 510-839-3100 | laurie@earpevents.com

name: Brad Finstad
subject: I stand with Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress ](http://links
body:
Finstad for Congress

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDg5MTU2MDES1&r=MTYwNTE2ODc0MDk4OQS2&j=MjU2MDg4MzI2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
| | Friend - During the past several days, we’ve all been reminded – in horrific detail – about the evil that human beings can bring upon each other. Hamas terrorists massacred innocent Israelis in their homes, wantonly slaughtered hundreds of people at a music festival, and took families of hostages that include elderly women and small children. The attacks perpetrated by Hamas on Israeli civilians are terrorism at its most barbaric. **I wholeheartedly condemn Hamas’ actions, which cannot ever be justified.** _And I stand with Israel, which has a right to defend itself. _ Our strongest ally in the Middle East needs our support NOW. This is no time for political gamesmanship. I will work in Congress to restore order so America can respond to this moment of crisis. Furthermore, I have been horrified by the scenes of vicious antisemitism that have emerged on the streets of American cities. It’s heartbreaking to see this hatred boil over here in the USA, which has been a refuge for religious freedom throughout our history. Americans of all faiths must stand together in solidarity against this dangerous evil. I hope you will join me in prayer for the victims of all this violence, for their families, and for the peace that has been so elusive in the Middle East. Thank you. Brad Finstad
---

name: Lori Chavez-DeRemer
subject: Urgent: Congress at a Standstill - We Must Act Now!
body:

Peter,
We are facing critical challenges at our borders, skyrocketing gas prices, and a looming government funding deadline in less than 40 days.

**But here's the harsh reality:**_**Congress is at a standstill because we don't have a Speaker of the House.
**_
This means no work can be done, and it's affecting our ability to address these pressing issues.

It's clear that we can't afford to play political games any longer; it's time to roll up our sleeves and get to work.

__We cannot afford the consequences of inaction.
__
Critical services and programs are on the line, and we need to ensure our government has the resources it needs to function effectively.

I am committed to tackling these challenges head-on, but I can't do it alone, Peter.

clean_body: | | | | Our Government Is Frozen Without a Speaker of the House Peter, We are facing critical challenges at our borders, skyrocketing gas prices, and a looming government funding deadline in less than 40 days. But here's the harsh reality:Congress is at a standstill because we don't have a Speaker of the House. This means no work can be done, and it's affecting our ability to address these pressing issues. It's clear that we can't afford to play political games any longer; it's time to roll up our sleeves and get to work. We cannot afford the consequences of inaction. Critical services and programs are on the line, and we need to ensure our government has the resources it needs to function effectively. I am committed to tackling these challenges head-on, but I can't do it alone, Peter. | Let's put aside partisan politics and come together to find common-sense solutions for the good of our community and our country. It's time to get serious and get to work. Together, we can ensure that Congress resumes its vital functions and continues working on policies that affect our everyday lives. Sincerely, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

subject: By the skin of our teeth! (thank you)!

We did it, Derek!

We JUST met our fundraising goal...by the skin of our teeth. And it wouldn’t have happened without you. I’m so, so grateful for your support.
I know Election Day seems like a long time away, but this is a huge win. Every goal we meet or milestone we hit means that we’re building momentum, and – like a chemical reaction – we’re building toward the critical mass we need to succeed. (See what I did there? A little chemistry lesson!)
None of this would be possible without the unwavering encouragement of supporters like you. As long as I have you on my team, I won’t stop doing everything I can to deliver for you, our Commonwealth, and our country. **From the bottom of my heart, thank you, Derek.**
There’s work to be done.

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Beware the Digital Dollar: Unveiling Its Realities!
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

How Banks Can Seize Your Accounts

Banks don't need your permission
to legally seize your deposits. This is how you can protect your
savings. Learn More

This Tax Loophole Is Kept Secret
by the IRS

The IRS is trying to close the
tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market
crashes and recessions. Learn More

This Asset Will Save You from
Recession...

With recession looming and
inflation at a 40-year high, this asset hedges against economic
uncertainty. Learn More

Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying
Realities!
The purchasing power of the US
dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the
government's promises of financial stability crumble before your
own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is
crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and take
immediate action to protect your wealth. The solution lies in the
timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall
Street don't want you to have.

For years, the government has
insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but
the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the
dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you
vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently
devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception
and take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.

The signs of the dollar's decline
are impossible to ignore. Inflation is soaring and the cost of
everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that
this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the
hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion
of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of
policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term
financial security.
It doesn't stop there. Amidst all
the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order
14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed's
sinister attempt to end privacy as you know it by tracking and
controlling your every financial move.

Imagine a world where every
aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded,
scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital
Dollar, as outlined in the Executive Order, is portrayed under a
sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds
via our phones that are ironically under constant full
surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented
powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence
of your privacy. It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to
ignore.

Your personal choices will no
longer be yours to make. The consequences are profound. The
government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your
purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. The very
essence of your personal freedom is at stake.
Act now with urgency to embark on
a journey toward financial liberation where you not only
Preserve, Protect, and maintain your Privacy but reclaim the
peace of mind that has been mercilessly stolen from you.

Allegiance Gold, LLC is not a
broker-dealer and does not provide investment, tax, or legal
advisory services. No statement in this communication should be
construed as a recommendation to purchase or sell any security,
or as investment, tax, or legal advice. Precious metals, like
all investments, carry risk, are not suitable for all investors,
and past performance does not guarantee future results. We do
not guarantee any investment performance. Please consult your own
investment, tax, or legal advisor prior to making any investment
decision. Third-party information quoted or presented by us in
this communication represents only the opinions of the third
party and we do not endorse any third-party source of
information. We are not affiliated with the U.S. Mint or any
government agency. ©Allegiance Gold, LLC 2023

Zip Code: 20176

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Steve Garvey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4207%2E5257348%2EJYSMc1 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

We just got some breaking news,
Derek:

A multimillionaire Republican celebrity just jumped into our top-two
“jungle primary” in the U.S. Senate race.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231010_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=4207%2E5257348%2EJYSMc1 ]Los Angeles Times headline: BREAKING NEWS: Former Dodgers star and Republican
Steve Garvey enters U.S. Senate race

Steve Garvey was a first baseman for the Dodgers and Padres, and
apparently, he’s ready to take up the fight for everyone born on third
base thinking they hit a triple. Go figure.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231010_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=4207%2E5257348%2EJYSMc1 ]If that’s all you need to hear, I’m personally asking you to chip in
any amount to help our campaign respond. Our new Republican opponent is
sure to have big money behind him, and we need to be ready for the
inevitable wave of attacks — because that’s not the only recent twist in
this Senate race.

Garvey appears to be taking a cue from another celebrity Republican with
no political experience, Donald Trump. And given Trump’s determination to
make sure I don’t become California’s Senator next year, I wouldn’t be
surprised to see Trump and MAGA world get solidly behind Garvey. I will
need your help to ensure Garvey and Trump feel the sting of losing on
March 5, 2024.

And there’s one more wrinkle in this race: I’m now running in two
concurrent elections — a special election for the remainder of the late
Sen. Dianne Feinstein’s term, and a general election for a full Senate
term. Two elections happening on the same ballot, on the same day. Twice.

With millions of Californians preparing to see my name on their ballot for
the very first time, we’re going to have to invest a tremendous amount of
resources to educate voters and meet them across the state.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231010_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4207%2E5257348%2EJYSMc1 ]And it’s even more urgent with today’s news. Can you rush in any amount
to my Senate campaign to respond to the entry of our new opponent and help
ensure we win this race?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=oct2023_abs_em.Oif8VN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231010_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=4207%2E5257348%2EJYSMc1 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=oct2023_abs_em.Oif8VN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231010_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=4207%2E5257348%2EJYSMc1 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

There’s nothing Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party would like more
than to see a celebrity Republican put another Senate seat in play. So
let’s stop him, Trump and Steve Garvey in their tracks — today.

Thanks for your support,

— Adam

name: Rick Scott
subject: Bold. Conservative. Leadership.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

I’m sick and tired.

I’m sick and tired of halfhearted “compromises” against the radical Left that give up our conservative principles.

I’m sick and tired of “conservatives” who rack up our national debt and REFUSE to reign in our spending.

I’m sick and tired of Washington insiders that have completely lost touch with the American people.

**I’ve had enough of the Washington Establishment. What we need is BOLD CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP, and that’s what I aim to bring to the Senate every day.**

Some want to shy away from our campaign promises to appease Washington insiders, but I’m unapologetic in my conservatism. I’ll never back down from my beliefs - but it also means there’s a target on my back.

**The radical Left is DETERMINED to take me down because I’m one of the strongest conservative voices in Congress.**

I may have ticked off the establishment - but I hope I’ve gained the support of grassroots patriots like you.

**[I’m asking because you’re the backbone of my campaign. Can you pitch in NOW so we can win next November?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=68e63d02ef5b48758be9295e6c82b821&_e=Z6bb1ScwKGAE_0A__UJDYTdVWp10fkSbznXhwAOUvJ3_ezVJ5uaxEoWRjDcsy8Uhru8oSzJK6f5JeupZJDq85KzCzRn3INIXIO9XisHUYKrB0qx3bX3zSI_Xx6ry-n0v6NI9teJe4lSWzkMcKsxuxDEVrHFJLo8IDOZGP0T_ViOeiKHc1Nbrxxa2uFAzcyp96GZkv-nAl1BIe5GVDtFGGyF1Cl9HoM0jyLWCNVRsxcJ_v-P14hQWnD1Z7F4YhoGh0OtQGg42vXyfwjy3Z9sywyxeEo3ern3rfWfXBjImrXNUhuyEodJPdlvCB_MHgVbJr5OA8O49Ej3CJVmXvdcRYHOOCfwAuIAYIaRTeFKMzwa0UTzdrM11HakMAm8CI2L8)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m sick and tired. I’m sick and tired of halfhearted “compromises” against the radical Left that give up our conservative principles. I’m sick and tired of “conservatives” who rack up our national debt and REFUSE to reign in our spending. I’m sick and tired of Washington insiders that have completely lost touch with the American people. I’ve had enough of the Washington Establishment. What we need is BOLD CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP, and that’s what I aim to bring to the Senate every day. Some want to shy away from our campaign promises to appease Washington insiders, but I’m unapologetic in my conservatism. I’ll never back down from my beliefs - but it also means there’s a target on my back. The radical Left is DETERMINED to take me down because I’m one of the strongest conservative voices in Congress. I may have ticked off the establishment - but I hope I’ve gained the support of grassroots patriots like you. name: Sean Feucht
subject: Read my latest on Substack: Who will pick up the mantle?
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | _**Who will pick up the mantle?**_ By Sean Feucht
---
| | “Elisha then picked up Elijah’s cloak that had fallen from him and went back and stood on the bank of the Jordan.” 2 Kings 2:13 Loren Cunningham has passed through the veil and into eternity. He was a giant in the faith who galvanized the modern missions movement unlike anyone in history. He launched Youth With A Mission (YWAM) at the age of 24 from Lausanne, Switzerland in 1960. This movement changed the face of world missions as he commissioned countless millions to take up the call to take the fame of Jesus to the farthest corners of the world.
---
---
He was the first man in recorded history to preach the gospel in every sovereign nation, all dependent countries and over 100 territories across the globe. There was simply no one like Loren. He leaves behind a gaping hole of leadership in the missions and world evangelization movement that begs to be filled. Not only was he was one the most joyful people I have ever known, but he was also one of the most encouraging. I remember when a group of us young leaders sat together dreaming about a new missions school we would call “Fire and Fragrance” in Kona, Hawaii. We dreamed of fusing the “fire” of the prayer room with the “fragrance” of evangelism to the lost in a new expression within YWAM. This rugged mission pioneer was all ears and giddy with excitement at the dream God had given us. [**FINISH READING ON SUBSTACK → https://seanfeucht.substack.com/p/who-will-pick-up-the-mantle**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=f3e8a3da2119417ca3fb50e49361f6d4&_e=vnIuw4bdwp3NZ6OvhjgvmEJUqtINEAwSBHuR3jf_Wzy5kmSUBffRmlr-Uc1C4iAb36Vrdf3XXh1r5BtxJY9BnVCwSCWtVwFD8IhTzk48wHR6c6QtFILKAqo0fgb55V9sVXRqbNGBjfWjUE5lqBiY4FcS8sNnD42Rf5gvLMYb9O7_Kbl85eKih5ZW2QjQpj4A6b59o2ktjPRQ_HMc3XDQzyqX-VilZ1D_99uiDexueXp0VyvRpVltlATDWnjvjz-UxUmt9sO0cj190L-COR0vuXIDCcPXf6cMdBfbMt8snUlY_FriIcYMHN3CCxHDGC7X8_VmLIM8bwmcAGyGCMkICQ%3D%3D)

I'm rolling up my sleeves to help my good friend **Jim Jordan become our next Speaker.**

The Country faces difficult challenges. Jim Jordan is the clear choice to lead the House and hold this failed President accountable.

My decision is going to outrage the mainstream media, that’s why I’m reaching out right now. name: Chair Ben Wikler, Wisconsin Democrats
subject: Republicans are attempting to impeach Justice Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This is our last stand for democracy.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfbe8829b-2f10-48f9-bc5b-8a4eeadb62c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. It’s Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. I asked Blue Amp Action if we could reach out about the democracy emergency happening right now in Wisconsin. We’ll be honest. When we won the most important election of 2023 and flipped our Supreme Court progressive, we knew Republicans wouldn’t stop there. Now, Wisconsin Republicans are attempting to impeach, convict, and remove newly-elected Justice Janet Protasiewicz from the Supreme Court. [We’re going to ask you to split a $10 donation between the WisDems and Blue Amp Action but let me first tell you why.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac0631e1-3406-4b1b-9bcf-16cd3abc7b62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03dd33af-df8f-4c54-b28b-8205f02e6707/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In 2020, Wisconsin came the closest of any state to overturning presidential election results. A single vote on the Court stopped Republicans from overturning President Biden’s victory in Wisconsin and handing the whole election to Trump. In 2024, Republicans could try again—and without Justice Protasiewicz on the bench, their next effort to thwart democracy could be successful. The risk is too high—we must stop this threat now before it goes any further. This impeachment threat is a desperate, unconstitutional, unprecedented, and obscene power grab attacking Wisconsin voters, the courts, and our democracy. If Republicans pull this off, we know they’ll attempt to do the same in states like yours. If we want to stop this desperate attack, set an example that Democrats will protect the will of voters, and hold off Republicans’ undemocratic power grab for 2024, then we need to win this fight in Wisconsin now. There is no other option. This is our last stand for democracy. [That’s I’m asking you to chip in a $10 split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action to help us win this fight and protect our democracy. Are you in? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5839a7be-9e78-44d3-ab28-e48011828ee4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T646ec4c8-3687-4685-a67e-6fc169f7eb2f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you for your support, Peter. Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

name: Urgent Petition via Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand Tommy Tuberville stop blocking essential military appointments at this critically important time
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Senator Tuberville STOP blocking essential military appointments >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T657ef838-92c6-4dd2-b846-4882e94ce63b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb97bac30-8bd1-43a0-a6e5-48bf661744e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | For months, Republican Sen. Tommy Tuberville has been single-handedly blocking nominees for hundreds of critically important defense positions, all to score points with anti-abortion extremists, who object to the military covering travel expenses for service members who need to obtain the procedure. **And Tuberville is still refusing to back down, even at this time of crisis, when the military needs its best people in the right roles.** Experts across the political spectrum agree that his actions endanger us, “[impacting](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te58214c6-5791-42f0-889d-5ac43a0223c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) a number of senior military appointments in the Middle East, as the Pentagon moves to bolster its presence in the region amid the ongoing crisis in Israel.” Tuberville is putting our nation at risk. He’s been able to block these appointments because of a ridiculous Senate tradition that allows just one senator to block Senate action, even if the other 99 disagree. Enough is enough. It’s long past time for Tuberville to stop this ridiculous charade and allow our military to function. [Sign your name: Demand Tuberville STOP single-handedly blocking military appointments >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9e2cc9c-5d46-466d-84dd-e2eee3b20722/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d9726de-ac28-4654-95c9-64e15a92b457/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab5f8b5c-39f1-4bb6-b380-873c91acf684/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | For months, Republican Sen. Tommy Tuberville has been single-handedly blocking nominees for hundreds of critically important defense positions, all to score points with anti-abortion extremists, who object to the military covering travel expenses for service members who need to obtain the procedure. And Tuberville is still refusing to back down, even at this time of crisis, when the military needs its best people in the right roles. Experts across the political spectrum agree that his actions endanger us, “ a number of senior military appointments in the Middle East, as the Pentagon moves to bolster its presence in the region amid the ongoing crisis in Israel.” Tuberville is putting our nation at risk. He’s been able to block these appointments because of a ridiculous Senate tradition that allows just one senator to block Senate action, even if the other 99 disagree. Enough is enough. It’s long past time for Tuberville to stop this ridiculous charade and allow our military to function. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P. name: =?utf-8?Q?Karen=20Greenhalgh?=
subject: I will always protect women's sports
body:
Will you join me? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bb034f52eb1f/my-work-is-far-from-finished-6069728?e=48b883ea87)
---
| |
---
| | Hi there-

Have you [seen the news](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=8367d34790&e=48b883ea87)? The Roanoke College women’s swim team is taking a stand to protect women’s sports in our Commonwealth - and they’re coming under attack. **I stand with the women’s swim team and will ALWAYS defend women’s sports. That’s why I introduced the Fairness in Women’s Sports Bill.[Will you join me in that fight? ](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=9c71e15712&e=48b883ea87)**
---
| [DONATE](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=7d31e2e1f5&e=48b883ea87 "DONATE")
---
| Speaking at a news conference last week, team members called on the college administration, the NCAA, and state lawmakers to ban biological male athletes from competing in women’s sports. They should be commended for their efforts. Instead, Planned Parenthood - which is working to elect Democrats across Virginia - has done the exact opposite, calling the female swimmers “bigots.” Yes, they really said that. Women standing up to protect a female space are now “bigots” according to the left. This isn’t the first time they’ve resorted to name calling. When I introduced the Fairness in Women’s Sports Bill they lodged similar attacks on me. Saying that I was a bigot and hate-filled. But that hasn’t deterred me. While Democrat politicians in Richmond and across the country continue to advocate for policies that force women to compete against men in sports, I am proud to stand with the Roanoke women’s swim team. **I will always support common-sense policies that protect women’s spaces and opportunities.** Do you support fairness in women’s sports? Then join me in the fight today! As Delegate, I was proud to [sponsor legislation](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=5fd3d68205&e=48b883ea87) in the House to protect female sports, but the work is far from over. [**Help me fight to protect women’s sports!**](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=b1542eb322&e=48b883ea87)

clean_body: Will you join me? | | | | | | | Hi there- Have you ? The Roanoke College women’s swim team is taking a stand to protect women’s sports in our Commonwealth - and they’re coming under attack. I stand with the women’s swim team and will ALWAYS defend women’s sports. That’s why I introduced the Fairness in Women’s Sports Bill. | "DONATE" | Speaking at a news conference last week, team members called on the college administration, the NCAA, and state lawmakers to ban biological male athletes from competing in women’s sports. They should be commended for their efforts. Instead, Planned Parenthood - which is working to elect Democrats across Virginia - has done the exact opposite, calling the female swimmers “bigots.” Yes, they really said that. Women standing up to protect a female space are now “bigots” according to the left. This isn’t the first time they’ve resorted to name calling. When I introduced the Fairness in Women’s Sports Bill they lodged similar attacks on me. Saying that I was a bigot and hate-filled. But that hasn’t deterred me. While Democrat politicians in Richmond and across the country continue to advocate for policies that force women to compete against men in sports, I am proud to stand with the Roanoke women’s swim team. I will always support common-sense policies that protect women’s spaces and opportunities. Do you support fairness in women’s sports? Then join me in the fight today! As Delegate, I was proud to in the House to protect female sports, but the work is far from over. | "DONATE" | Thank you for your consideration. Sincerely, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate Inc, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Standing Strong for Israel |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=fdf4914faf&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
|
---
| | My son Jake took this photograph of Gaza during a college trip to Israel last January. You can see the wall in the foreground that Hamas terrorists breached to kill 900 people, including at least nine Americans. Proportional to Israel’s population, this attack was eight-times larger than Al Qaida’s 9-11 attack on the United States. It’s the largest mass killing of Jews since the Holocaust.

In military terms, this was a raid. Hamas terrorists surprised Israel during a religious holiday, killed as many civilians as they could, kidnapped at least 100 people, and then retreated to Gaza. Now they are using those hostages as human shields. Besides killing and kidnapping, Hamas had no apparent tactical objective. This was terrorism, pure and simple.

In the near term, we must fully support Israel’s response. Their leaders have asked for specific military assistance; we must urgently provide what they need. This war is going to get even uglier very fast, and Israel doesn’t need faraway critics second-guessing their every move. The Hamas playbook is to gain worldwide sympathy against Israel through staged and provoked atrocities. Don’t fall for it.

This is an extremely dangerous situation. Hamas and Hezbollah, the other terrorist organization launching missiles against Israel, are both backed by Iran. If Israel finds conclusive evidence that Iran exercised operational control over these attacks, they may launch a military response. The United States has moved warships and fighter aircraft into the region to defend our allies and our interests. Americans don’t want escalation, but sovereign nations make their own decisions.

In the long term, we must recognize that our world has become much more dangerous. China is threatening American interests in an aggressive attempt to supplant western ideals with communist repression. Russia is a second-rate autocracy with nuclear weapons and an inferiority complex. North Korea and Iran are unpredictable. Cartels control the Mexican border. Terrorists lurk in the shadows and explode when the time is right.

I get it. Most Americans just want to be left alone. I had a bunch of other cheery options for today’s feature photograph besides this barren picture of Gaza: happy photos from the Bright Hope Pregnancy Support Center dinner in Center Valley, the Garlic Festival in Easton, the Prayer Breakfast in Stroudsburg. But the shocking events in Israel are a stark reminder that evil strikes when it wants, even when we’d rather be enjoying the Apple Festival in New Tripoli.

It’s time to wake up. As our national security environment has changed, our foreign policy, our military readiness, and our national consciousness has not. We must stop making trade deals with countries that want to destroy us. We must stop projecting weakness and disengagement abroad. And we must assume our rightful leadership role defending freedom and virtue in the world.

Almost every day on the campaign trail, I hear someone say they oppose “forever wars.” Trust me. I’ve been to war four times and don’t want to go back.

But we can’t prevent conflict by hunkering down and hoping bad things won’t happen. On this earth, the only way to avoid wars is with overwhelming diplomatic, economic, information, and military power that keeps our enemies cowering in their cages.

That’s peace through strength. We used to have it. That’s what I want to rebuild in Congress.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a husband and father who has lived in the Lehigh Valley for 40 years. He's the founder of a successful technology company and a 28-year veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces. Kevin's not running for Congress because he needs a job. He's running because he's got the experience, vision, and courage to defend our American way of life. _

body:
The impact of Virginia’s elections will be felt nationwide. Every seat we lose is a step backward for state Democrats. Will you donate to elect Democrats to these vital seats and across the country? | | |

HD-97 | Michael Feggans
HD-21 | Joshua Thomas
HD-82 | Kimberly Pope Adams

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: How Well Do You Know America's Faithful Heroes?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Fellow Believer, Did you know that some of America's greatest heroes were also devout Christians? These ordinary men and women not only served our country but loved and served God above all else. Are you curious to find out more about them? If so, I invite you to take our "Christians Who Loved America" quiz.
---
[Take the Quiz Now](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-z28J27nXVtqUBg)
---
My team at TPUSA Faith is dedicated to empowering believers like you to put their faith into action, just like the heroes in our quiz. Our mission is to be a light to the world and the salt of the earth, as we're called to be in Matthew 5:13-16. One of the ways we do this is through our Pastors Summit, a three-day event designed to engage, equip, and encourage pastors to boldly stand up for Biblical Truth. I believe that the Gospel is the timeless cure that America needs to hear - and you can help us spread this message. In a time when "woke" Left-wing ideology is infiltrating churches across America and around the world, it's more important than ever that we stand for sound doctrine and biblical truth. That's why TPUSA Faith is determined to keep Biblical principles at the heart of our nation - because we have been commanded to remain sober-minded and to remain rooted in the gospel as it was handed down to us. TPUSA Faith is calling every Christian we can reach to join us in doing just that. And what better way to get inspired for the fight than to be reminded of how our Christian forerunners have stood for the truth throughout America's history?
---
[Take the Quiz Now](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Thank you for taking the time to learn more about our Christian heroes and the work we do at TPUSA Faith. In a culture that encourages you to do "what is right in your own eyes" (Judges 21:25), we're pushing back. name: Ro Khanna
subject: "We can't afford it" is a bogus excuse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The COVID-19 pandemic devastated childcare providers.

Under the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021, we provided a $24 billion federal investment to help childcare centers stay open so people can get back to work. But it was not a long-term solution. Funding expired at the end of September with no follow-up plan, and now families and childcare workers alike are left to fend for themselves.

According to the Century Foundation, it’s estimated that 3.2 million children may lose access to care, particularly those from underserved communities. Meanwhile, 70,000 childcare facilities are at risk of closing while tens of thousands of childcare providers face impending layoffs amidst an ongoing affordability crisis.

Childcare is not just a family issue, it’s an economic issue. With childcare costs outpacing inflation [https://www.cnbc.com/2022/02/21/average-cost-of-child-care-is-now-more-than-10000-dollars-per-year.html] , costing working families an average of $10,000 per year, many parents are forced to make hard decisions about how much they can work. The lost productivity and earnings are projected to cost states a combined [https://www.cnbc.com/2023/09/12/more-than-70000-child-care-providers-may-close-as-federal-aid-ends.html] $10.6 billion annually in lost economic activity.

Sign if you agree: We need quality childcare at $10 a day and prioritize competitive wages for childcare workers. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/childcare-reform-petition?contactdata=Glh3Uchtfj8GKj7klMDOrzV5oI5Gqqlguaiq9K1WAUFXfnM7Aiz1ko5k4roueuK+Q1fPWzaoLkX5H0tB5pAd6Yoi5iAppDq+StAVRlbOy9THx6vyfDuJpaYAmBfj/xUtBRWCI8W+feae7LWetgGe5w==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/childcare-reform-petition?contactdata=Glh3Uchtfj8GKj7klMDOrzV5oI5Gqqlguaiq9K1WAUFXfnM7Aiz1ko5k4roueuK+Q1fPWzaoLkX5H0tB5pAd6Yoi5iAppDq+StAVRlbOy9THx6vyfDuJpaYAmBfj/xUtBRWCI8W+feae7LWetgGe5w==]

The United States is the wealthiest democracy in the world, we can afford to provide working families with quality, affordable childcare. If we provide families with exceptional childcare for just $10 a day, we would be supporting our kids, helping parents, strengthening our economy, and creating a solid foundation for generations to come.

Investing in our children from the earliest stages of their lives should be a priority. Tell Congress: We must invest in quality, affordable childcare. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/childcare-reform-petition?contactdata=Glh3Uchtfj8GKj7klMDOrzV5oI5Gqqlguaiq9K1WAUFXfnM7Aiz1ko5k4roueuK+Q1fPWzaoLkX5H0tB5pAd6Yoi5iAppDq+StAVRlbOy9THx6vyfDuJpaYAmBfj/xUtBRWCI8W+feae7LWetgGe5w==]

In solidarity,
Ro

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: FWD: A masterclass in duality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
An email isn’t going to make a dent in the decades of grief, the fear, the tumult — but this has been weighing heavy on my heart.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71302554/431797288/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJjZDkxM2ItOTI2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SILS1HBM2UbAfsg_LYikkrKwHg_W163ooX-oVx4RsYg=&emci=b47b51b5-8667-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=22cd913b-9267-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Peter, Last month, I wrote to you about my trip to Israel this summer. I spoke about the group of 50 educators that visited in response to the rise of antisemitism in our country — particularly within our schools. I wrote about the places we visited, the people we had raw, vulnerable conversations with, and the duality of life in Israel. You can read that original message below, bearing in mind how much has changed for the landmarks and the smiling faces in the photos. During my time there, I visited Kibbutz Yad Mordechai — spending time with families who live under the constant threat of attack by missiles and the gripping fear of an attack. Now, their fears have become a reality. Those same families were sheltering in their homes. We were hosted in Netiv Ha'asara on the border of Gaza for a discussion on the path toward peace where we spoke with students and teachers about the trauma they must grapple with daily. Now, at least 15 people there have been killed. It has been heart-breaking to watch the footage coming out of Israel and the acts of terror committed against innocent civilians, children and grandmothers among them. The terrorism of Hamas has no justification and those who, in recent days, have attempted to rationalize it must look inward to confront their own antisemitism. **Over the last few days, I have been thinking about that duality I wrote to you about in September — and particularly how two things can be true at once.** Our Jewish community can feel vulnerable, and yet maintain incredible resolve. We can be sickened by predictable acts of antisemitism, and yet be comforted by support and condemnations from across the political spectrum and world. We can condemn terror without reservation, and yet also have compassion for innocent lives that will be lost in coming days and weeks. We can stand in solidarity with Israel in her right to defend herself and restore immediate security, and, when that is accomplished, still work towards a lasting peace with Palestinian neighbors. We can, and we must. **For me, that duality of understanding requires action here at home: Congress must stand with Israel — and help unite the world behind this effort — to immediately restore security, to dismantle Hamas, and to set the conditions for peace.** I'm grateful to friends, colleagues, and fellow elected officials for their unequivocal statements condemning the terror and showing solidarity with the people and state of Israel. _Nick_ \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Nick Melvoin [info@nickmelvoin.com]
Date: Sat, September 9, 2023 at 10:31 AM
Subject: A masterclass in duality
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Ahead of Rosh Hashanah, I want to share an experience with you. This summer, I was invited to travel to Israel with a group of 50 educators. What started as a trip borne from the rise of antisemitism in schools evolved into much more upon our arrival at Ben Gurion. Our group got to experience so much and engage in deeply meaningful conversations. We toured the Old City of Jerusalem, The Western Wall, and swam in the Dead Sea. We joined Palestinian New York Times reporter Rami Nazzal for a trip through the West Bank and Rabbi Hanan Schlesinger at Roots, a center in the region fostering understanding non-violence and transformation with Israelis and Palestinians. We had a guided visit through the newly renovated Yad Vashem complex, the Jewish National Memorial to the six million Jewish victims of the Holocaust. It was enlightening, it was heavy, it was so important. **During my brief time there, I was struck by the complex tapestry and duality of daily life.** Israeli citizens have cultivated the ability to embrace moments of joy amidst the ever-present backdrop of geopolitical tensions. In one afternoon, we witnessed tanks roll over the hills at the Syrian border and then passed locals laughing on patios with mezze platters and chilled glasses of wine. **Resilience is woven into the fabric of Israeli society.** Not just because of the Israeli people, vibrant street markets, cultural festivals, or lively celebrations — but because of the understanding that the world is complex, and that multiple things can be true at once. This is part of what has sustained us as a Jewish people, and it can also lead to policy making that creates a sense of safety amidst challenges. **The pursuit of happiness isn't just a platitude for me — it's a policy objective.** When you're worried about making rent, putting food on the table, or ensuring your kids are safe at school — everything else feels like a mere indulgence. **But good policies make the pursuit of joy a reality for folks.** When your basic needs are met, you can go after your dream job, or coach a little league team, volunteer in your community, enjoy nature, or turn that side hobby into a career. **When your needs are met, you can lift others up with you.** Joy is vital to better understanding one another. Joy relieves tension, it's a bridge that transcends divides by religion, class, ethnic background, cultures, and orientation. Nuance and the duality of a situation, or the simple fact that two things can both be true and important at the same time, is a mindset I hope to bring to Congress. **We can find common ground on our nation's most challenging issues by determining that we can coexist, that there's enough resources to get everyone's needs met, and that joy should be a priority.** As we reflect on the complexities of Israel's narrative, let one takeaway be the human spirit's remarkable resilience and its unwavering pursuit of joy, underscoring the importance of crafting policies that enrich lives while navigating the intricate realities of this extraordinary situation. _Nick _ |
---|---|---

| | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
---
