clean_body: An email isn’t going to make a dent in the decades of grief, the fear, the tumult — but this has been weighing heavy on my heart. | | | | Peter, Last month, I wrote to you about my trip to Israel this summer. I spoke about the group of 50 educators that visited in response to the rise of antisemitism in our country — particularly within our schools. I wrote about the places we visited, the people we had raw, vulnerable conversations with, and the duality of life in Israel. You can read that original message below, bearing in mind how much has changed for the landmarks and the smiling faces in the photos. During my time there, I visited Kibbutz Yad Mordechai — spending time with families who live under the constant threat of attack by missiles and the gripping fear of an attack. Now, their fears have become a reality. Those same families were sheltering in their homes. We were hosted in Netiv Ha'asara on the border of Gaza for a discussion on the path toward peace where we spoke with students and teachers about the trauma they must grapple with daily. Now, at least 15 people there have been killed. It has been heart-breaking to watch the footage coming out of Israel and the acts of terror committed against innocent civilians, children and grandmothers among them. The terrorism of Hamas has no justification and those who, in recent days, have attempted to rationalize it must look inward to confront their own antisemitism. Over the last few days, I have been thinking about that duality I wrote to you about in September — and particularly how two things can be true at once. Our Jewish community can feel vulnerable, and yet maintain incredible resolve. We can be sickened by predictable acts of antisemitism, and yet be comforted by support and condemnations from across the political spectrum and world. We can condemn terror without reservation, and yet also have compassion for innocent lives that will be lost in coming days and weeks. We can stand in solidarity with Israel in her right to defend herself and restore immediate security, and, when that is accomplished, still work towards a lasting peace with Palestinian neighbors. We can, and we must. For me, that duality of understanding requires action here at home: Congress must stand with Israel — and help unite the world behind this effort — to immediately restore security, to dismantle Hamas, and to set the conditions for peace. I'm grateful to friends, colleagues, and fellow elected officials for their unequivocal statements condemning the terror and showing solidarity with the people and state of Israel. Nick \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Nick Melvoin [info@nickmelvoin.com] Date: Sat, September 9, 2023 at 10:31 AM Subject: A masterclass in duality To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Ahead of Rosh Hashanah, I want to share an experience with you. This summer, I was invited to travel to Israel with a group of 50 educators. What started as a trip borne from the rise of antisemitism in schools evolved into much more upon our arrival at Ben Gurion. Our group got to experience so much and engage in deeply meaningful conversations. We toured the Old City of Jerusalem, The Western Wall, and swam in the Dead Sea. We joined Palestinian New York Times reporter Rami Nazzal for a trip through the West Bank and Rabbi Hanan Schlesinger at Roots, a center in the region fostering understanding non-violence and transformation with Israelis and Palestinians. We had a guided visit through the newly renovated Yad Vashem complex, the Jewish National Memorial to the six million Jewish victims of the Holocaust. It was enlightening, it was heavy, it was so important. During my brief time there, I was struck by the complex tapestry and duality of daily life. Israeli citizens have cultivated the ability to embrace moments of joy amidst the ever-present backdrop of geopolitical tensions. In one afternoon, we witnessed tanks roll over the hills at the Syrian border and then passed locals laughing on patios with mezze platters and chilled glasses of wine. Resilience is woven into the fabric of Israeli society. Not just because of the Israeli people, vibrant street markets, cultural festivals, or lively celebrations — but because of the understanding that the world is complex, and that multiple things can be true at once. This is part of what has sustained us as a Jewish people, and it can also lead to policy making that creates a sense of safety amidst challenges. The pursuit of happiness isn't just a platitude for me — it's a policy objective. When you're worried about making rent, putting food on the table, or ensuring your kids are safe at school — everything else feels like a mere indulgence. But good policies make the pursuit of joy a reality for folks. When your basic needs are met, you can go after your dream job, or coach a little league team, volunteer in your community, enjoy nature, or turn that side hobby into a career. When your needs are met, you can lift others up with you. Joy is vital to better understanding one another. Joy relieves tension, it's a bridge that transcends divides by religion, class, ethnic background, cultures, and orientation. Nuance and the duality of a situation, or the simple fact that two things can both be true and important at the same time, is a mindset I hope to bring to Congress. We can find common ground on our nation's most challenging issues by determining that we can coexist, that there's enough resources to get everyone's needs met, and that joy should be a priority. As we reflect on the complexities of Israel's narrative, let one takeaway be the human spirit's remarkable resilience and its unwavering pursuit of joy, underscoring the importance of crafting policies that enrich lives while navigating the intricate realities of this extraordinary situation. Nick | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

body:
Garlinghouse for Alder, New Haven Ward 13! | |
---
| | |
### [_Monthly Meeting Tomorrow
Weds October 11, 7PM
Click here to register on Zoom_](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=eb2cc7b401&e=91a3f04de5)
---
|
---
| Our Monthly Chapter Meetings are always
the **Second Wednesday of the Month at 7pm**
Set the recurring date in your calendar, & look out each month for Zoom Registration Link for that month.
---
|
---
| This meeting will focus on our candidate for Ward 13 in New Haven - **Paul Garlinghouse (G).** Paul has a real shot at winning this race! The previous Green Party candidate (Patricia Kane) got 134 votes out of the 242 that would have been required to win. The current incumbent is not popular, and neither is the Republican (who only got 81 votes in 2021). Paul is an ideal candidate who excels at talking to voters. He cares about his Ward and his City. He has begun canvassing the Ward, talking to voters, handing out palm cards, and there are plans in the works for a campaign event hosted by a very enthusiastic supporter, tentatively Oct 22.

We have a real shot at winning this race! Please attend this meeting to meet Paul and discuss how we can do just that!
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=426ca1280d&e=91a3f04de5)

Past events report: Sept 16 Guilford Parade, Sept 17 Climate Rally NYC 4\. Candidate Reports: Garlinghouse: Canvassing, Oct 22 event? flyering for the event, 4 x 8 sign, yard signs, election day! 5\. Ongoing Business: Website, Social Media and advertising 6\. Upcoming Events: Oct 25 - hybrid SCC in New London, Nov 7 - Election Day, Next meeting Nov 8 7\. Treasurer's Report and Finance Cmte (8/6 meeting), Proposed Spending: Garlinghouse, Social media ads 8\. Proposed Events and Actions: Enbridge, other

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: A famous baseball player just entered our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
In an already competitive race, Katie now has another opponent to worry about. Can you help us respond?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)
**Breaking news:** High-Profile Republican Steve Garvey Enters The Race [Rush a donation to Katie Porter ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231010-1?refcode=EMAM10_1_GAR_20231010_V1_F&refcode2=31213_3422442_e3pTCL&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)
---
Derek, this isn’t the news we wanted to hear today. A famous baseball player now turned high-profile GOP opponent just jumped into the race against Katie.
**Remember: the California system is a so-called “jungle primary.”** That means the top two vote-getters will move on regardless of their party affiliation. We can’t let Katie fall into third place. And we can’t allow a Republican to move on to the general.
[**We need a big fundraising day to show our momentum is strong in the wake of this new announcement. Will you donate $5 to Katie Porter now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231010-1?refcode=EMAM10_1_GAR_20231010_V1_F&refcode2=31213_3422442_e3pTCL&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231010-1?refcode=EMAM10_1_GAR_20231010_V1_F&refcode2=31213_3422442_e3pTCL&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)
In a jungle primary, all that matters is who makes the top two. And if the Democratic vote is spread across a few contenders, there could be enough Republicans to push Steve Garvey into pole position.
We don’t have a bunch of megadonors waiting in the wings to pour cash into Katie’s campaign. That’s just not how Katie rolls. So when something like today’s news happens, we email all of Katie’s supporter network to raise more funds.
That's why putting up big grassroots fundraising numbers today is so important. [**Please help us out today. Donate $5 to Katie Porter so we have the resources to keep Republicans like Steve Garvey from winning this primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231010-1?refcode=EMAM10_1_GAR_20231010_V1_F&refcode2=31213_3422442_e3pTCL&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231010-1?refcode=EMAM10_1_GAR_20231010_V1_F&refcode2=31213_3422442_e3pTCL&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)
This team has never let us down before. Thanks for always having Katie’s back. It’ll all be well worth it when she’s sworn in to fight for all of us in the U.S. Senate.
— Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM10_1_GAR_20231010_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=31213_3422442_e3pTCL&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=31213%2E3422442%2Ee3pTCL)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Can you take 2 minutes to submit our Team Ilhan October Issues Survey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hearing directly from our supporters is critical to Ilhan's work fighting for our shared progressive values every day in Congress.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=598%2E791427%2EFzJcKp)
Friend -
You may have noticed that every so often, Ilhan likes us to check in with our top supporters directly to ask a simple question:
_**What's on your mind?_**
It's been a few months now since we last reached out to ask, which is why we're hoping we can count on a LOT of responses today.
[**Can you take 2 minutes and answer our official October Issues survey? Your feedback is so important to Ilhan and our entire team, and we'd really appreciate your response.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em231010-issues-survey/?source=em231010-1-t4&refcode2=598.791427.FzJcKp&akid=598%2E791427%2EFzJcKp)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em231010-issues-survey/?source=em231010-1-t4&refcode2=598.791427.FzJcKp&akid=598%2E791427%2EFzJcKp)**
Believe it or not, the reactions and opinions we get back from these surveys change each time we ask, and tracking how our supporter's feelings change over time is extremely valuable to our campaign
The more responses we receive, the better Ilhan is able to represent our progressive values and continue fighting for the issues we care about most in Congress.
That's because it's the issues — whether it's Medicare for All and combating the climate crisis, canceling student debt and ending endless wars, or something else entirely — that make our movement so special.
So please, we're asking:
[**Can you use this link and let us know what's on your mind? This won't take more than a minute or two of your day.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em231010-issues-survey/?source=em231010-1-t4&refcode2=598.791427.FzJcKp&akid=598%2E791427%2EFzJcKp)**
We'll be sharing the responses with Ilhan later this week, so thanks in advance for sharing your thoughts.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em231010-issues-survey/?source=em231010-1-t4&refcode2=598.791427.FzJcKp&akid=598%2E791427%2EFzJcKp)**

clean_body: Hearing directly from our supporters is critical to Ilhan's work fighting for our shared progressive values every day in Congress. Friend - You may have noticed that every so often, Ilhan likes us to check in with our top supporters directly to ask a simple question: What's on your mind? It's been a few months now since we last reached out to ask, which is why we're hoping we can count on a LOT of responses today. Believe it or not, the reactions and opinions we get back from these surveys change each time we ask, and tracking how our supporter's feelings change over time is extremely valuable to our campaign The more responses we receive, the better Ilhan is able to represent our progressive values and continue fighting for the issues we care about most in Congress. That's because it's the issues — whether it's Medicare for All and combating the climate crisis, canceling student debt and ending endless wars, or something else entirely — that make our movement so special. So please, we're asking: We'll be sharing the responses with Ilhan later this week, so thanks in advance for sharing your thoughts. In solidarity, Team Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: My “why”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
And I want to hear yours, too

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71303777/431800712/-849459103?refcode=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTAyYmViYy05NDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGy2YPqEmwVO0EqFhG45JeR-3UPTbwHhJZeSq-l8Suk=&emci=9c76bd4c-7e67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
There’s one question I hear repeatedly when folks learn I’m running for Senate: _“Why?”_ So let me tell you: Because the fight to expand affordable and accessible health care is personal to me. Because protecting kids from the threat of gun violence shouldn’t be controversial. Because a U.S. Senator should vote on behalf of her constituents, not her party bosses or big-ticket donors. Because voting rights need protecting. And public education needs funding. And we need more jobs with pay that covers the bills. And the list goes on. **Every day – when I think about how tough this race will be – I remember my “why” and I get to work. But this campaign is about so much more than me and my values – it’s about you and the movement we’re building together.** That’s why I want to know what’s your “why.” **_[What are you fighting for? In the face of so many obstacles, what keeps you motivated to do the hard work to create a better future for Tennessee? And what brings you into the movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71303779/431800714/-215317547?refcode=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTAyYmViYy05NDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGy2YPqEmwVO0EqFhG45JeR-3UPTbwHhJZeSq-l8Suk=&emci=9c76bd4c-7e67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)_** | [**SHARE YOUR STORY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71303783/431800716/-215317547?refcode=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTAyYmViYy05NDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGy2YPqEmwVO0EqFhG45JeR-3UPTbwHhJZeSq-l8Suk=&emci=9c76bd4c-7e67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
Whatever your “why” is – I’m so grateful you’re in this fight with me.
Thank you,
Gloria
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71303786/431800719/-215317547?refcode=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTAyYmViYy05NDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGy2YPqEmwVO0EqFhG45JeR-3UPTbwHhJZeSq-l8Suk=&emci=9c76bd4c-7e67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71303788/431800721/-849459103?refcode=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTAyYmViYy05NDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGy2YPqEmwVO0EqFhG45JeR-3UPTbwHhJZeSq-l8Suk=&emci=9c76bd4c-7e67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71303790/431800723/209297649?amount=25&refcode=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.3902bebc-9467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTAyYmViYy05NDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGy2YPqEmwVO0EqFhG45JeR-3UPTbwHhJZeSq-l8Suk=)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=1303%2E35263%2E-gs47q ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

It’s Tammy here. My friend Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running for the U.S.
Senate in Florida and she's counting on our support. Read her message
below and [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dmp.RYg70l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231010_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=1303%2E35263%2E-gs47q ]chip in, if you can.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Peter, it's Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. In case you haven't heard,
I'm the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott in Florida. I'm also an
immigrant from Ecuador, a gun safety advocate, a former Congresswoman, and
a proud mom.

I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my campaign. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dmp.RYg70l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231010_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=1303%2E35263%2E-gs47q ](If
you're ready to give now, you can click here to split a gift between my
campaign and Tammy Baldwin.) But first, let me explain why I'm asking and
what's at stake:

* Rick Scott is one of the most dangerous senators in Washington. He
wrote the plan to raise taxes on working families and end Medicare and
Social Security. And he’s supported a nationwide ban on abortions.
* Rick Scott only won this seat by 0.12% last time around — and he had
to shell out $64 MILLION of his own money to do it. Now, a new poll
shows our race is already statistically tied.
* Election experts are saying that if I win, Democrats will be virtually
guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority. If not, we could easily
lose control.

I know that we can win in Florida, but I'm counting on your help to
compete with Scott's massive personal fortune. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dmp.RYg70l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231010_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=1303%2E35263%2E-gs47q ]So please, will you
split $10 between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin before midnight tonight to
defeat Scott's dangerous agenda, defend our Senate majority, and flip
Florida blue?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Tammy Baldwin will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-dmp.yOrXNk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231010_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=1303%2E35263%2E-gs47q ]SPLIT $10 NOW

name: JuanJo at United We Dream Action
subject: Attacks against DACA are nothing new
body:
DACA recipients like me are demanding action now. | | | Peter, I’m tired of the instability that comes with temporary protections. DACA recipients like myself find ourselves in a constant state of uncertainty. Our work permits and protections from deportation have always been a temporary solution, vulnerable to attacks by conservative courts or anti-immigrant politicians. While Congress and President Biden wait to act, millions of immigrant youth like myself watch in disbelief, knowing that our lives depend on them passing legislation. There’s an urgent need for permanent solutions, Peter: **Judge Hanen ruled against DACA _again_ — and now the case may head to the Supreme Court.** Attacks against immigrant youth and all undocumented people are nothing new — _my own home state was one of the nine Republican-led states that moved to shut down DACA earlier this year._ Along with millions of ineligible undocumented people, hundreds of thousands of DACA recipients could be left without work permits or protections from deportation if we don’t act now. DACA was won through relentless organizing from undocumented youth and allies across the country demanding basic protections — and it’s going to require even more organizing to demand more. **Now, we need to pick up the fight. Will you donate $10 or any amount today to help UWDA secure permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people before it’s too late?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8CyraxqLLfAsc7Mu4MEH22nEZGSLCSm9HgCsMIZhMTf4V8tChb9zOkZ12z9Z3zfapNMdh1WG3XaCJZ9nPEDVYZxmgnYbQEoHJ6B1fzAoeqS3TFHrymx-HL2bUaHVpA0v0t-fyMHFzEqa5Zysu26vzty13Mq9W7BLeiKFYPu6yY1Z35FRzhfWjDDLOmNEY6TwC8cxCgNoceW9qfiOKBTPVhKHlrgFOTNCrOwepPiIgbOIHqDMRTB3_JCMSMBZY2M1SyoGdDupSuHvOUvnKa5cTi9kkbxoh1FKeCvDoT8UOWs3XnecyjXvIeASehTEpYS89uhAq4zyC10c_npYLs0sSt147r99CZSM6d9fyHQbYNQ6uqF8HeNhNLWY1vCH5VI_-8sNrAfr9bKAQPA8kaYQULw-ZrJaXEXZBus935jmpl_c/40b/ucMslRg0TfO-wXAI44hYEA/h0/Q_47cAxeIuBKEYJsFddXxuf7IASGatrS6gLN_GCGxrc)

name: Sean Barry for Congress
subject: Democracy should be a given
body:
Not a daily battle. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOH8vS-H2wVKd-2YocowzUKsqJ2Uw2Dw7Hu4rQilhmmHhPjBa14JlvtykRTmyNFCOsJvrG7UVdn2EDz1h5FwP4UNq4JkYCuD44-72-9qlQVBSZbl9_dnEbTACjuX3bd-fs9byrNb2wWvKFKNYAn_-D_GXpyetLMqnrgZ0WzCt3pOaa1CZHFVjZmtBIsHx3gxcsa4HMfLb11fW_Gp-O02LTi8fKfrh9xs7cgbLke4uz7f5Dr_i772JbImpVDCv4peEg/40b/kaA57CGfSyCOi41_bAxJNA/h0/mKjz4106wknBh_zBYxhZAQp5sJ6JlVnF8jk_ogiWBkQ)
---
Friend, Our great state of Texas has always stood for values like freedom, liberty, and democracy. Yet, in recent years, it feels like we've had to fight for these principles day in and day out. **We shouldn't have to struggle to defend our democracy; it should be a given.** As a candidate for Congress, I believe it's time to take a stand and ensure that democracy remains the cornerstone of our nation. The right to vote, the freedom to express our opinions, and the power to shape our own destiny are not mere privileges; they are the fundamental building blocks of our society. Over the past few years, we've witnessed attacks on our democratic institutions from all sides. Voter suppression, gerrymandering, and the erosion of transparency in government have become all too common. It's time for us to say enough is enough. I'm running for Congress because I believe in the strength of our democracy and the people of Texas.
Together, we can create a future where democracy is not a constant struggle but a given right for every citizen. To do that, I need your support. [Your donation today will mobilize voters, protect their rights, and work tirelessly to restore the trust that our democracy deserves.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQb_fIl_NqEZ5xsd0GxWkKIdi5rXlJG3idR_HYBYoptftG8TT0cfjLkxrECg1GlncuFj0AcjHKlfuTBbCyZEiUreijLCXgz13EK9iuqdk1cYwImGZ-LBAzdbkh_EBNpwdIiMWna-aa4rtbEqxLeT0vS-sOyscXi5N8068oIkcwB7ZP-Bdu3FYUtvuW5ITRIvoqCQEiJwOi6itTpSUz_GiRqLHUVohgqGIgb0yD6cXxF-fTbP4Y1PTxPDDAU3D1KvmsjBqHFIeIafLwPiB3-9KzdmUvqjYs1EBJzClXNrNruALUgNbkocH2RYKJyEmUdqgHsz2QGq_m7TGxLySIf-_f/40b/kaA57CGfSyCOi41_bAxJNA/h1/H-xXGNRf01SGx_s1ZNFwMklDIXhjYU13A5vVhhiKN_E)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Talk about a “hold my beer” moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Senator Menendez needs to go.
#
Derek, the allegations against Senator Bob Menendez keep getting more damning.
**There is now strong evidence that Senator Menendez intervened to prevent a police investigation when his now-wife hit and killed an innocent person with her car.**
Talk about a “hold my beer” moment. Just when the allegations against Menendez couldn't appear even more sordid, this evidence is even worse.
Yet he still thinks he should run for reelection. **This is unacceptable, and he needs to go.**
In the event Menendez doesn't step down, a serious primary challenger, Representative Andy Kim, is running to beat him in the Democratic primary.
We must protect this critical blue Senate seat.
**[So I'm asking if you'll split a donation between me and Andy Kim, because our neighbors in New Jersey deserve a Senator they can trust. Can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231010-1?refcode=em20231010-1-8614&refcode2=8614_434096_SS3j5u&akid=8614%2E434096%2ESS3j5u)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231010-1?refcode=em20231010-8614&refcode2=8614_434096_SS3j5u&akid=8614%2E434096%2ESS3j5u)**
Thanks for your support, Derek.
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231010-8614-footer&t=1&refcode2=8614_434096_SS3j5u&akid=8614%2E434096%2ESS3j5u)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8614%2E434096%2ESS3j5u)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8614%2E434096%2ESS3j5u)

subject: My DMs are full of sexist hate. And it's getting worse.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
This email may or may not shock you – but no matter your reaction, I hope you’ll join me and add your name to this urgent petition to protect our Emerge community.
Violent sexist harassment is on the rise online and in person. It's not just simple disagreement or passionate and principled debate. **It's a concerted effort to make public life unbearable for women candidates and elected officials – with the express purpose of pushing them out of politics and into the shadows. _We can’t let that stand._**
Harassment against women in politics is a community problem – and it needs a community solution. We need an _immediate_ groundswell of support from people like you to help make sure lawmakers prioritize preventing harassment before it happens and put pressure on social media giants to protect women online.
**Peter, ****I’m personally asking you to join me in speaking out against violent sexist harassment. We need 500 people to sign our urgent petition before our midnight deadline tonight – and right now, we’re still missing your name.**

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71306500/431805232/-1986725775?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk695-su-in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwYTNlZjRmLTk3NjctZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QBJwMDQUnK25MMuer4OEunNUp61SJpWk5_e7UyhNTNo=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, This email may or may not shock you – but no matter your reaction, I hope you’ll join me and add your name to this urgent petition to protect our Emerge community. Violent sexist harassment is on the rise online and in person. It's not just simple disagreement or passionate and principled debate. It's a concerted effort to make public life unbearable for women candidates and elected officials – with the express purpose of pushing them out of politics and into the shadows. We can’t let that stand. Harassment against women in politics is a community problem – and it needs a community solution. We need an immediate groundswell of support from people like you to help make sure lawmakers prioritize preventing harassment before it happens and put pressure on social media giants to protect women online. Peter, I’m personally asking you to join me in speaking out against violent sexist harassment. We need 500 people to sign our urgent petition before our midnight deadline tonight – and right now, we’re still missing your name. | | With gratitude, A’shanti F. Flipping TX-15 so we can bring our vision to life is going to take a lot of work. And truth be told, it can be hard to imagine what that looks like because Republicans like Monica De La Cruz have done so much damage for so long.
**Peter, let us paint that picture right here. Michelle has a plan to fight tooth and nail for working Texans every day. Here’s what the vision she’s going to fight for actually looks like:**
****
* Our abuelos and people with disabilities have access to health care and Social Security;
* Our veterans have access to the benefits they have earned;
* Our children and young adults have access to affordable, high quality education;
* Women are empowered to make their own healthcare decisions;
* Our LGBTQ+ communities have access to the care they need;
* Our voting rights are protected and everyone has fair and equal rights to the ballot;
* Our mothers have access to affordable childcare; and
* The working people of Texas have good paying jobs and make an honest living.

**But Monica De La Cruz wants to do the exact opposite. She wants to slash veterans’ healthcare, make devastating cuts to Social Security and Medicare, take millions away from our schools, and get in the way of women’s healthcare decisions. Let’s be clear: this is a dangerous agenda that will be detrimental to South Texas and America.**

We cannot allow that to happen.
Not now, not next year.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._UhSm3dVS8-NhimjwXQ)| |
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._KydhQ_uVrZymNwWIw)
__But, in order to keep this curriculum**free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-wA)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We can do better than border walls
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

There’s been confusion about the President’s recent decision to build more
walls along the Texas-Mexico border. As we continue our push for a safe,
legal, orderly immigration and asylum system, it’s important that we clear
up this confusion and outline the path for a better way forward.

This is an issue that’s deeply personal to those of us who live on the
border. We’ve seen the misery that walls contribute to (more than 500
people have died along the border this year while trying to cross to
safety in this country). We’ve seen the wall reinforce the narrative that
the border is a dangerous place and that immigrants are an invading force
(an idea that helped spur a white supremacist to kill 23 people at an El
Paso Walmart in 2019, claiming he was stopping the “Hispanic invasion” of
Texas).

And we’ve seen that walls just don’t work. Not if we’re serious about
solving our challenges at the border.

Walls push migrants into the hands of smugglers, force people to cross at
deadlier stretches of river and desert, disrupt and damage wildlife and
ecosystems, and have no real impact in ultimately deterring crossings or
preventing serious threats like drug smuggling.

Just look at the numbers: during the last year of Donald Trump’s
presidency, unauthorized crossings at our border with Mexico increased
more than 300% even as he built hundreds of miles of a 30-foot wall.

That same year, Joe Biden promised that if he were elected president,
there would “not be another foot of wall constructed” and that the federal
government would stop acquiring land to finish areas of the wall that were
already underway.

So why, then, did Alejandro Mayorkas, the President’s Department of
Homeland Security Secretary, announce last week that the administration
would build 17 miles of wall in the Rio Grande Valley of Texas? And why
did he propose to waive 26 regulations that protect the environment and
cultural heritage in order to rush the process?

When asked the next day about this decision, President Biden claimed his
hands were tied by a 2019 appropriations bill passed by Congress and
signed into law by then-President Trump. He wanted the money redirected,
he told reporters, but Congress failed to act and so he was left with no
option but to build the wall.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Did those appropriations really have to be spent on a wall?

While the President is correct in saying that he must spend the 2019
appropriations on border security, it is clear that he is not required to
use it to continue a Trump-style wall for another 17 miles. And he is
certainly under no obligation to rush past the 26 federal laws that he now
seeks to waive—laws that are in place to protect the communities in the
Rio Grande Valley that will be most impacted by any new wall construction.

What could he do with the money instead?

When it comes to spending the 2019 appropriations, it’s important that the
President consult with the people who live in the area about the type of
construction that can help Border Patrol in their work of apprehending
unauthorized crossers, while also doing the least damage to the
environment and native habitats of the Rio Grande Valley and preventing
harm to those trying to seek asylum in these areas.

Border communities will serve as his most effective guides in implementing
policies that improve security while respecting the people who live on the
border.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

How else can the President move forward on this issue?

Beyond choosing to use the 2019 appropriations in a more thoughtful and
effective way, there’s much more the Biden Administration can do to
improve order and safety within our immigration system. Here are a few
things that are within his control and that he can implement without
having to rely on what has recently become the most dysfunctional Congress
in U.S. history:

1) Make it easier to apply for asylum:

Without sufficient safe, legal, orderly pathways for migrants to make an
appointment to apply for asylum in this country, people will continue to
cross through dangerous stretches of the border in between ports of entry.

The Biden administration has taken steps to address this, including by
creating the CBP One app as a tool to help some migrants schedule
appointments at the border. But the average wait time for a CBP One
appointment is three months.

These long wait times in squalid tent camps in Mexican border towns—where
migrants are at increased risk of robbery, kidnapping, or worse—have
caused many to lose faith that they will receive an appointment, pushing
them to risk their lives to make unauthorized crossings between ports of
entry. To address this, the administration should:

* Expand appointments for CBP One border-wide. This will cut wait times
for asylum appointments and reduce illegal crossings by making it
easier for people to apply for asylum at legal ports of entry.

* Expand CBP One appointments in areas beyond the border. By making
appointments available in places like Mexico City, we can decongest
Mexican border towns that are strained for resources and provide a
safer alternative for families to wait for their appointment.

2) Relieve pressure on cities that are welcoming large numbers of asylum
seekers:

Border communities and cities like Chicago and New York are welcoming
large numbers of asylum seekers, straining city budgets and shelter
capacity as local officials try to accommodate families and keep them off
the street. To provide assistance to these cities and relieve pressure on
local budgets, the administration should:

* Improve coordination on releases in cities where migrants have
sufficient support. The administration should play a central role in
coordinating the arrival of asylum seekers once they arrive in the
United States and mitigating resettlement challenges as cities
struggle to provide wrap-around services and housing.

* Expand Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for countries that qualify. In
an important step forward, the administration recently did this for
over 400,000 Venezuelans. It can similarly do this for other countries
that meet TPS requirements. This will increase access to work
authorizations so that asylum seekers can support themselves and free
up local shelter capacity.

3) Make the asylum process quicker:

By hiring more asylum judges across the country and giving more power to
asylum officers at the border, the administration can more quickly
resettle and provide work authorizations to eligible asylum seekers, while
creating a faster and fairer process of safely removing people without
valid asylum claims.

4) Improve coordination with partners in the Western Hemisphere:

Hundreds of thousands of Venezeulans were initially resettled in other
countries, but due to a lack of integration support, they are now
attempting to find better stability in the United States. Following our
government’s redesignation of TPS for Venezuelans, the administration
should encourage our regional partners to similarly offer new legal status
for migrants from Venezuela to help them find work and housing where they
currently are instead of coming to the U.S.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

It's important that we move past failed policies like walls and towards
real solutions that address historic movements of people in our
hemisphere.

The proposed actions outlined in this email are a good start and will lay
the groundwork for what can be accomplished in President Biden’s second
term—including a possible comprehensive rewrite of immigration laws. I am
confident that this President, with our support, can make these actions
happen.

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=233162%2E444211%2E69jo8j

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

And why did he propose to waive 26 regulations that protect the environment and cultural heritage in order to rush the process? When asked the next day about this decision, President Biden claimed his hands were tied by a 2019 appropriations bill passed by Congress and signed into law by then-President Trump. He wanted the money redirected, he told reporters, but Congress failed to act and so he was left with no option but to build the wall. Did those appropriations really have to be spent on a wall? While the President is correct in saying that he must spend the 2019 appropriations on border security, it is clear that he is not required to use it to continue a Trump-style wall for another 17 miles. And he is certainly under no obligation to rush past the 26 federal laws that he now seeks to waive—laws that are in place to protect the communities in the Rio Grande Valley that will be most impacted by any new wall construction. What could he do with the money instead? When it comes to spending the 2019 appropriations, it’s important that the President consult with the people who live in the area about the type of construction that can help Border Patrol in their work of apprehending unauthorized crossers, while also doing the least damage to the environment and native habitats of the Rio Grande Valley and preventing harm to those trying to seek asylum in these areas. Border communities will serve as his most effective guides in implementing policies that improve security while respecting the people who live on the border. How else can the President move forward on this issue? Beyond choosing to use the 2019 appropriations in a more thoughtful and effective way, there’s much more the Biden Administration can do to improve order and safety within our immigration system. Here are a few things that are within his control and that he can implement without having to rely on what has recently become the most dysfunctional Congress in U.S. history: 1) Make it easier to apply for asylum: Without sufficient safe, legal, orderly pathways for migrants to make an appointment to apply for asylum in this country, people will continue to cross through dangerous stretches of the border in between ports of entry. The Biden administration has taken steps to address this, including by creating the CBP One app as a tool to help some migrants schedule appointments at the border. But the average wait time for a CBP One appointment is three months. These long wait times in squalid tent camps in Mexican border towns—where migrants are at increased risk of robbery, kidnapping, or worse—have caused many to lose faith that they will receive an appointment, pushing them to risk their lives to make unauthorized crossings between ports of entry. To address this, the administration should: Expand appointments for CBP One border-wide. This will cut wait times for asylum appointments and reduce illegal crossings by making it easier for people to apply for asylum at legal ports of entry. Expand CBP One appointments in areas beyond the border. By making appointments available in places like Mexico City, we can decongest Mexican border towns that are strained for resources and provide a safer alternative for families to wait for their appointment. 2) Relieve pressure on cities that are welcoming large numbers of asylum seekers: Border communities and cities like Chicago and New York are welcoming large numbers of asylum seekers, straining city budgets and shelter capacity as local officials try to accommodate families and keep them off the street. To provide assistance to these cities and relieve pressure on local budgets, the administration should: Improve coordination on releases in cities where migrants have sufficient support. The administration should play a central role in coordinating the arrival of asylum seekers once they arrive in the United States and mitigating resettlement challenges as cities struggle to provide wrap-around services and housing. Expand Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for countries that qualify. In an important step forward, the administration recently did this for over 400,000 Venezuelans. It can similarly do this for other countries that meet TPS requirements. This will increase access to work authorizations so that asylum seekers can support themselves and free up local shelter capacity. 3) Make the asylum process quicker: By hiring more asylum judges across the country and giving more power to asylum officers at the border, the administration can more quickly resettle and provide work authorizations to eligible asylum seekers, while creating a faster and fairer process of safely removing people without valid asylum claims. 4) Improve coordination with partners in the Western Hemisphere: Hundreds of thousands of Venezeulans were initially resettled in other countries, but due to a lack of integration support, they are now attempting to find better stability in the United States. Following our government’s redesignation of TPS for Venezuelans, the administration should encourage our regional partners to similarly offer new legal status for migrants from Venezuela to help them find work and housing where they currently are instead of coming to the U.S. It's important that we move past failed policies like walls and towards real solutions that address historic movements of people in our hemisphere. The proposed actions outlined in this email are a good start and will lay the groundwork for what can be accomplished in President Biden’s second term—including a possible comprehensive rewrite of immigration laws. I am confident that this President, with our support, can make these actions happen. Thank you, Beto

name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: “absolutely gobsmackingly bananas”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
We’ve got to act on climate |
#
---
Team, **The planet is the hottest it’s ever been in recorded history.** It’s causing massive extreme weather events across the globe — from extreme drought in the Amazon causing the deaths of thousands of dolphins and fish, to torrential rainfall flooding New York City — no matter where you live on the planet, climate change has upended our summer. In Michigan we feel it too — heavy rainstorms are becoming more frequent, and hotter temperatures will harm public health in our cities and corn harvests on our farmland. Take it from climate scientist Zeke Hausfather. That black line on the graph is temperature data from September 2023, data he calls **_“absolutely gobsmackingly bananas.”_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71312441/431810823/219405885?contactdata=PAolFg6NUBJzw8Kop3EP1RqDQpxha6iNsXuA67PD8ZXgBLtkmlCjipP5YmXugEv7y94v7844JIASK/0Do+fn3wylHA6zmpby7SiUxTwjUOk3S8sVKSdNiz8AvDPXRFF5euHpNmDFY+PJjUJcNGjcjQ==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231010_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzhjZDUxMmUtOWI2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e7dFoR1tdc5yYsvannpZK2uHE9487wmHAeRVDsPQyjs=&emci=3bd74828-9b67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=78cd512e-9b67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753) Scientists around the world have raised increasingly drastic alarms about our rapidly changing climate — and Gretchen Whitmer is taking action. As one of her top legislative priorities for this fall, Governor Whitmer is proposing a 100% Clean Energy Standard for Michigan. **This is a BIG deal — moving Michigan toward 100% renewable energy by 2050 will protect our air and water, create jobs, lower consumer costs, and improve grid reliability.** **[Governor Whitmer needs our help to move the country toward a cleaner, greener, future. clean_body: We’ve got to act on climate | Team, The planet is the hottest it’s ever been in recorded history. It’s causing massive extreme weather events across the globe — from extreme drought in the Amazon causing the deaths of thousands of dolphins and fish, to torrential rainfall flooding New York City — no matter where you live on the planet, climate change has upended our summer. In Michigan we feel it too — heavy rainstorms are becoming more frequent, and hotter temperatures will harm public health in our cities and corn harvests on our farmland. Take it from climate scientist Zeke Hausfather. That black line on the graph is temperature data from September 2023, data he calls “absolutely gobsmackingly bananas.” Scientists around the world have raised increasingly drastic alarms about our rapidly changing climate — and Gretchen Whitmer is taking action. As one of her top legislative priorities for this fall, Governor Whitmer is proposing a 100% Clean Energy Standard for Michigan. This is a BIG deal — moving Michigan toward 100% renewable energy by 2050 will protect our air and water, create jobs, lower consumer costs, and improve grid reliability. | Transitioning to 100% clean energy is crucial to fighting climate change. If we don’t take drastic action now, we’re in for an even bigger challenge to make our planet livable for future generations. That’s why your voice is so important. A clean, green, and climate-friendly planet is good for the economy. It creates jobs. It supports communities. It makes us healthier. And it protects our environment for our grandchildren and their grandchildren to thrive in. Bringing clean energy to all is no easy task. But Governor Whitmer isn’t backing down, and she’s grateful for your support. We are, too. body:
Hillary Clinton thinks Republicans who support an America First Agenda are "cult members."

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=6103d56d5cfe47ca8f4dffdfff0a99d7&_e=dSXsbhE4_sSIaM79Sytn2z_OxWCyWUrP6Ve8DLbzkB30h3L-Wjh0AsWJEDu1WrkeaTsqCxsXBSLH-cQpo6lqnQ65881ZhtfERi8Gv_HvE82mJ1K419ZSLP-WTXktZD3h5FtNXbKfh0GYLxGpMgsBwJR-ruzoxBj54m2VucGH99UB3e_UDuzxMQmGrNieR0b3sECPZ7OL0M0R2Lay0KAPBtS-OUIj5_ndnhjjdzRwv2bkPJJQNzt763f0ypYZ6Vx6VGw6P-ex5WZFLrjTCzuMzX-We7EiateIzATDiMQovIebUUzYiSgEPkh8f1bSnHrYUF7f6iLx8IJt1zQKtoFwWUQaumW8W1DbIh0oryxugsNDsEdPMf-lV3ir6s5qEFIP6s3AY-d41_HB7EeqHPL76Fl20DLTC4SMhL3VKdtQPrs%3D)
**Like an itch that won't go away, Fellow American** , Hillary Clinton just can't quit suggesting the "deplorable" and "irredeemable" nature of Republican voters.

Recently, in a CNN interview, she suggested, "there needs to be a formal _**deprogramming**_ of the cult members" for Republicans who support the Make America Great Again movement. The twice-failed presidential candidate really is bitter about her 2016 loss.

**[The worst part about all of this: she's just saying the quiet part out loud.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=6103d56d5cfe47ca8f4dffdfff0a99d7&_e=dSXsbhE4_sSIaM79Sytn2z_OxWCyWUrP6Ve8DLbzkB30h3L-Wjh0AsWJEDu1WrkeaTsqCxsXBSLH-cQpo6lqnQ65881ZhtfERi8Gv_HvE82mJ1K419ZSLP-WTXktZD3h5FtNXbKfh0GYLxGpMgsBwJR-ruzoxBj54m2VucGH99UB3e_UDuzxMQmGrNieR0b3sECPZ7OL0M0R2Lay0KAPBtS-OUIj5_ndnhjjdzRwv2bkPJJQNzt763f0ypYZ6Vx6jULwL3eNjdqhObzsJKa_3r97JosGrd9KvQpXpyQl2mERiZ6V6EnFIQbqhe-DHgmH6lFZMHUIF5jCK4XyD9QVB3YGMFMVhXhxNPofNXRaKZoT4TGuzCXK2gVdgqF2uNQb4OB24tLP2RoMJcXRYi_cXlRLl1zrT5_rN3PnKabsr0I%3D)**

Biden has made repeated claims that MAGA Republicans are a "threat to our country" and just last week a Democrat Representative sent out a memo with a talking point about "Republican Nazis." **There is a deep-seated hatred just for having an opposing political view from the Left.**

| [** OUR COUNTRY OVER POLITICS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=6103d56d5cfe47ca8f4dffdfff0a99d7&_e=dSXsbhE4_sSIaM79Sytn2z_OxWCyWUrP6Ve8DLbzkB30h3L-Wjh0AsWJEDu1WrkeaTsqCxsXBSLH-cQpo6lqnQ65881ZhtfERi8Gv_HvE82mJ1K419ZSLP-WTXktZD3h5FtNXbKfh0GYLxGpMgsBwJR-ruzoxBj54m2VucGH99UB3e_UDuzxMQmGrNieR0b3sECPZ7OL0M0R2Lay0KAPBtS-OUIj5_ndnhjjdzRwv2bkPJJQNzt763f0ypYZ6Vx6jQvuJXqjA3YezgU8s5njshYqkwBAv2UmwfG-W5jDYn0jhaU4AsDELELabXQR3x6zJu27-R97N_IhRXbVOJ_urqULRfGevmscWfW2OzK7eMo8Z8ctnEXDTwx7k7wNk0eOPwbdkvRY4Ygkn_lZ3MAhJ5QAzXfJYNnSXLKAmnWbUWE%3D)
---

Deprogramming or reeducation - this sort of rhetoric walks a dangerously fine line toward a dark outlook for our country as a whole. Contrary to Hillary and the Democrats' message, it's time to move forward and focus on strengthening our country over politics.

We have a choice: We can elect a leader who loves America like 80% of us, or we can be represented by someone beholden to a fringe minority who put this country last and has the Democrat Party in a chokehold. **[We need a Commander-in-Chief who will always put America first.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=6103d56d5cfe47ca8f4dffdfff0a99d7&_e=dSXsbhE4_sSIaM79Sytn2z_OxWCyWUrP6Ve8DLbzkB30h3L-Wjh0AsWJEDu1WrkeaTsqCxsXBSLH-cQpo6lqnQ65881ZhtfERi8Gv_HvE82mJ1K419ZSLP-WTXktZD3h5FtNXbKfh0GYLxGpMgsBwJR-ruzoxBj54m2VucGH99UB3e_UDuzxMQmGrNieR0b3sECPZ7OL0M0R2Lay0KAPBtS-OUIj5_ndnhjjdzRwv2bkPJJQNzt763f0ypYZ6Vx6kR__sLcxLoxlrCgZ914R5wuLonrZVavAyDC49OuusguW30aRC0_AHY2W290MUx-J-xW6oFkBQwfhiOyjm30At5R7Vw3bIXw8RVuJTwENjUMgwzsfaaEnCC2dPXAeVSZR7M95sJpycvI_C3GaPk9RBaqRq1oGAQk9QWhH8Yx443U%3D)**

Thank you,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Hillary Clinton thinks Republicans who support an America First Agenda are "cult members." | | Like an itch that won't go away, Fellow American , Hillary Clinton just can't quit suggesting the "deplorable" and "irredeemable" nature of Republican voters. Recently, in a CNN interview, she suggested, "there needs to be a formal deprogramming of the cult members" for Republicans who support the Make America Great Again movement. The twice-failed presidential candidate really is bitter about her 2016 loss. Biden has made repeated claims that MAGA Republicans are a "threat to our country" and just last week a Democrat Representative sent out a memo with a talking point about "Republican Nazis." There is a deep-seated hatred just for having an opposing political view from the Left. | Deprogramming or reeducation - this sort of rhetoric walks a dangerously fine line toward a dark outlook for our country as a whole. Contrary to Hillary and the Democrats' message, it's time to move forward and focus on strengthening our country over politics. We have a choice: We can elect a leader who loves America like 80% of us, or we can be represented by someone beholden to a fringe minority who put this country last and has the Democrat Party in a chokehold. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Peter,

I’m sure you’re following the chaos that has ensued in Washington these past couple of weeks, but if you haven’t, here’s a quick recap:

After nearly shutting down the government, fringe Republicans led by Rep. Matt Gaetz ousted Kevin McCarthy from his speakership position.

Considering it took McCarthy _15 rounds_ of voting back in January to even become Speaker, the GOP’s failure to effectively govern and lead shouldn’t surprise anyone.

**And my opponent Ken Calvert has been part of the problem. He voted for the most extreme Continuing Resolution put on the floor of the House which, if passed, would have taken a wrecking ball to local law enforcement and working class families in Riverside County. Then, with Congress now in limbo after McCarthy’s removal, Calvert and his far-right allies left Washington and left Congress in a state of disarray.**

It’s moments like these that remind us why Congress has a lower approval rating than a root canal. Here’s my take: we need leaders who will actually lead. Government isn’t about theatrics and partisan games. It’s about delivering results for the folks they represent.

body:
This is what happens when you have weak leadership. Spoiled punks like Matt Gaetz throw a tantrum and put us all at risk. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71323490/431819533/1772355808?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231010_fr_weakleaders_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmEzODU0YS1hMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P03c2Nw7KojPJcBW_jkIs13URxDYdc-ZMy67OeyRzEI=)
---
Team, the House could vote tomorrow for a new speaker – and it's looking more and more like Brian Fitzpatrick's Republican party is going to be gridlocked. And it could not come at a worse time, as we see tensions rising in Israel. **This is what happens when you have weak leadership. Spoiled punks like Matt Gaetz throw a tantrum and put us all at risk.** When I was an Army officer, I dealt with plenty of young servicemembers who tested the limits (though it'd be an insult to label any of them as terrible as Gaetz). In fact, I had a pair of soldiers who were never at their stations, despite their hats being on their desks – which _implied_ they were nearby and inside. Turned out, they were using decoy hats and wandering off! So what did I do? I soaked the decoy hats in water and left them in the freezer for them to find. They stayed at their stations after that. As an Army officer, it was drilled into me that strong leaders hold their team accountable. Because failing to do so endangers everyone. That's exactly what we're seeing in the House right now. [**If Brian Fitzpatrick won't hold MAGA extremists in his party accountable and get our government working to keep us all safe, I'm happy to take his place and show MAGA exactly how we handle this behavior in the Army. I just need your help to do it. Will you pitch in $10?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71323492/431819534/1772355808?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231010_fr_weakleaders_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmEzODU0YS1hMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P03c2Nw7KojPJcBW_jkIs13URxDYdc-ZMy67OeyRzEI=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

And it could not come at a worse time, as we see tensions rising in Israel. This is what happens when you have weak leadership. Spoiled punks like Matt Gaetz throw a tantrum and put us all at risk. When I was an Army officer, I dealt with plenty of young servicemembers who tested the limits (though it'd be an insult to label any of them as terrible as Gaetz). In fact, I had a pair of soldiers who were never at their stations, despite their hats being on their desks – which implied they were nearby and inside. Turned out, they were using decoy hats and wandering off! So what did I do? I soaked the decoy hats in water and left them in the freezer for them to find. They stayed at their stations after that. As an Army officer, it was drilled into me that strong leaders hold their team accountable. Because failing to do so endangers everyone. # The Williams Weekly
---
## SPECIAL EDITION:
### Folks,
###
This past weekend was devastating. With the brutal terrorist attacks on Israel, I wanted to give you an update and speak directly on the atrocities we have seen all over the internet and on TV. First, I wanted to let everyone know that if you have friends or family in Israel who are in need of support, have them reach out to my office so we can try to assist them in their time of need. In my Syracuse Office, I have a dedicated member of my team ready to assist, please email Tony.Stachnik-Taylor@mail.house.gov. Additionally, the U.S. State Department is urging that citizens in Israel who need assistance, fill out the form at this link: [cacms.state.gov/s/crisis-intake](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/VX1Y018yd56BW8cnKhv4cffksW3Z50n154tyJ5McSJRv3qmFRW6N1vHY6lZ3nWW44T0_s5W_HqvW4lQLtl5b63BvW7ptz4r3tDy6tW3n5fbP898d0kW1mLPHw2md487W8Xtsf12xlPlDN8nVYFpp4KjVW7Y27TK3_Jwh0W3SwF994CKyKNW92zLZN1B0Gk-MwYCwsqYQmNW8YQp4s3bncYmW1NCBbY8l0lWcF4ZhcVHpZ50VlJ19z782PbHW6-VYgF4JvszYVWZj5_2hLntzW3NPqwG5WRyQWW5PqhBQ976XsTW3fB1wl8wT7xZN5nZFFph2STLVNh9wL97p7GSf11zKrg04)
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
## Stand With Israel
Immediately following reports of missiles launching into Israel, I made a public statement strongly condemning the Palestinian terrorists who attacked. The jihadists and their supporters are enemies of humanity and enemies of peace. I stand with the Israeli people as they protect their families, homes, and border. Baruch dayan ha'emet. As the weekend continued, the images and videos of what took place began to circulate online and on our screens at home. It was made clear, the jubilant murderers of Hamas are the ISIS extremists of today. There is no political objective that justifies their blood-lust and inhuman brutality. Like ISIS, they must be destroyed and their ideology condemned by the entire civilized world. Every organization that supports Hamas is devoid of legitimacy. And on Sunday, I called attention to our country: "How many jihadist terrorist are in the United States right now? We don’t know! Nobody knows, because our Progressive leaders have left our country unprotected. Hamas says they’re not afraid of our warships off their coast. Perhaps that’s because they’ve been infiltrating our country for months. At dawn we slept. 12/7/41, 9/11/01, 10/7/23." Instead of focusing on the terror taking place in Israel, the media tried calling out my statement and said we have no evidence for this claim... How is this? More than 150 on the terror watchlist have been intercepted at the border just this year—we know that hundreds, if not thousands of illegal migrants evade our Border Patrol and law enforcement officers every single day. We would be terribly naive to think that our enemies are not taking advantage of our open border. I’ve seen it first hand, our Southern Border is anarchy. Vigilance is the price of freedom. Ignorance and wishful thinking are far too costly. Remember Pearl Harbor and 9/11, at dawn we slept. \-------- We must remain vigilant. We must keep the Israeli people in our prayers. And we must unequivocally Stand With Israel.
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
**Israeli Embassy in DC** I expressed my sorrow, solidarity, and support for the nation of Israel today in a brief meeting at the Israeli Embassy in Washington, DC. Like the vow made by Israeli Air Force pilots at Masada: “Never Again.”
---
---
**We Need A Speaker** Last week, I met with a Taiwan representative and they are anxious about our weakness. In light of this weekends attacks, I called on all Members of Congress to return to DC and vote on a Speaker immediately. We’ve all had a chance to discern between the two candidates. The nation and the world needs America’s Congress to be functioning—every hour brings more risk.
---

clean_body: This past weekend was devastating. | The Williams Weekly SPECIAL EDITION: Folks, This past weekend was devastating. With the brutal terrorist attacks on Israel, I wanted to give you an update and speak directly on the atrocities we have seen all over the internet and on TV. First, I wanted to let everyone know that if you have friends or family in Israel who are in need of support, have them reach out to my office so we can try to assist them in their time of need. In my Syracuse Office, I have a dedicated member of my team ready to assist, please email Tony.Stachnik-Taylor@mail.house.gov. Additionally, the U.S. State Department is urging that citizens in Israel who need assistance, fill out the form at this link: | | | ---|---|--- Stand With Israel Immediately following reports of missiles launching into Israel, I made a public statement strongly condemning the Palestinian terrorists who attacked. The jihadists and their supporters are enemies of humanity and enemies of peace. I stand with the Israeli people as they protect their families, homes, and border. Baruch dayan ha'emet. As the weekend continued, the images and videos of what took place began to circulate online and on our screens at home. It was made clear, the jubilant murderers of Hamas are the ISIS extremists of today. There is no political objective that justifies their blood-lust and inhuman brutality. Like ISIS, they must be destroyed and their ideology condemned by the entire civilized world. Every organization that supports Hamas is devoid of legitimacy. And on Sunday, I called attention to our country: "How many jihadist terrorist are in the United States right now? We don’t know! Nobody knows, because our Progressive leaders have left our country unprotected. Hamas says they’re not afraid of our warships off their coast. Perhaps that’s because they’ve been infiltrating our country for months. At dawn we slept. 12/7/41, 9/11/01, 10/7/23." Instead of focusing on the terror taking place in Israel, the media tried calling out my statement and said we have no evidence for this claim... How is this? More than 150 on the terror watchlist have been intercepted at the border just this year—we know that hundreds, if not thousands of illegal migrants evade our Border Patrol and law enforcement officers every single day. We would be terribly naive to think that our enemies are not taking advantage of our open border. I’ve seen it first hand, our Southern Border is anarchy. Vigilance is the price of freedom. Ignorance and wishful thinking are far too costly. Remember Pearl Harbor and 9/11, at dawn we slept. \-------- We must remain vigilant. We must keep the Israeli people in our prayers. And we must unequivocally Stand With Israel. | | | ---|---|--- Israeli Embassy in DC I expressed my sorrow, solidarity, and support for the nation of Israel today in a brief meeting at the Israeli Embassy in Washington, DC. Like the vow made by Israeli Air Force pilots at Masada: “Never Again.” We Need A Speaker Last week, I met with a Taiwan representative and they are anxious about our weakness. In light of this weekends attacks, I called on all Members of Congress to return to DC and vote on a Speaker immediately. We’ve all had a chance to discern between the two candidates. The nation and the world needs America’s Congress to be functioning—every hour brings more risk. | | | ---|---|--- | | Brandon for Congress NY 22, 628 N Main Street, North Syracuse, NY 13212, USA, 315-220-0121

name: Team Nikki
subject: re: Supporting our Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, As the grandchild of two World War II veterans and member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, Nikki is laser-focused on ensuring veterans have access to the benefits they’ve earned and deserve after putting their lives on the line for our country. **That’s why she recently introduced the _Veterans in STEM Expansion Act_ , legislation that will help veterans overcome financial obstacles and find good-paying jobs in the science, health care, and technology fields.** Women returning home from service experience even higher unemployment rates than their male counterparts, so Congress must pass this legislation to address this disparity and provide all veterans with increased opportunities for financial stability. **But we can’t stop there.** The _Veterans in STEM Expansion Act_ would make a huge difference, but Nikki is determined to make even more progress for veterans by expanding access to healthcare, securing quality and safe housing choices, and more. **[So, friend, can you pitch in $10 to support Nikki’s fight for our veterans and ensure they receive the support they deserve after returning clean_body: | Friends, As the grandchild of two World War II veterans and member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, Nikki is laser-focused on ensuring veterans have access to the benefits they’ve earned and deserve after putting their lives on the line for our country. That’s why she recently introduced the Veterans in STEM Expansion Act , legislation that will help veterans overcome financial obstacles and find good-paying jobs in the science, health care, and technology fields. Women returning home from service experience even higher unemployment rates than their male counterparts, so Congress must pass this legislation to address this disparity and provide all veterans with increased opportunities for financial stability. But we can’t stop there. The Veterans in STEM Expansion Act would make a huge difference, but Nikki is determined to make even more progress for veterans by expanding access to healthcare, securing quality and safe housing choices, and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with us in this fight. — Team Nikki Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

Friend,
This past week, you saw Crooked Joe’s accomplices force yours truly to stand trial as an innocent man in New York to defend my livelihood, my family, and my properties from what many are calling the _“corporate death penalty.”_
_And now, on MONDAY OF NEXT WEEK at a federal court hearing in Washington, Biden may very well get away with**GAGGING** me for the rest of the 2024 election._
The America we know and love is truly gone, Friend...
...And in its place now stands a Marxist tin-pot dictatorship more like Stalinist Russia or Maoist China than our once free Republic.
**Biden’s corrupt DOJ is attempting to CENSOR and SILENCE the leading candidate for president (_me – by a lot!_) to the point where I wouldn’t even be allowed to _criticize_ Crooked Joe!**
**_But no matter the outcome of the October 16th Gag Order Hearing, the Deep State can NEVER GAG the American people!_**
No matter how much we’re attacked, the Silent Majority will NEVER, _EVER_ SURRENDER our noble mission to bring our country back from the brink. Together, we _WILL_ Make America Great Again!

body:
| | | Thanks to supporters like you, our team at Their Future PAC met our big FEC goal after launching our first ad and 2024 endorsement. That’s a major development, so thank you!

We’re working to elect a Kids First Majority in Congress—which means a majority that won’t be swayed by the gun lobby or massive polluters like big oil, and will work for a safer and healthier future for families and children.

Every donation—no matter how big or small—is meaningful. clean_body: | | | Thanks to supporters like you, our team at Their Future PAC met our big FEC goal after launching our first ad and 2024 endorsement. That’s a major development, so thank you! We’re working to elect a Kids First Majority in Congress—which means a majority that won’t be swayed by the gun lobby or massive polluters like big oil, and will work for a safer and healthier future for families and children. Every donation—no matter how big or small—is meaningful. If you didn’t get a chance to donate or you want to double down on your support, As we begin the third quarter since we launched our organization, I’m looking forward to keeping up our momentum. We’ve got a lot in store, and we’ll be sure to keep you posted. To stay updated on our work, make sure to follow Their Future on , , and subscribe to our . Thank you again for your support and for standing up for the promise of everything America can be. — Annie CEO and Founder, Their Future PAC Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions.
