**Ohio’s 9th Congressional District Targeted as Top Pickup for Republicans**
Peter,
Ohio’s 9th Congressional District is one of three races that the National Congressional Campaign Committee (NRCC) is targeting as potential pick-up opportunities in 2024.
Of the three targeted races, OH-9 is the only district that is trending positively for Republican candidates and where Republicans perform better with Donald Trump on the ticket for President.
With these trends in mind, it is important that the nominee be a strong supporter of President Trump and someone who can resonate with working-class voters in the suburbs of Toledo.
Last cycle’s nominee, J.R. Majewski, is the best positioned candidate in the Primary forOH-9 to turnout Trump voters and working-class swing votes.
In addition to his appeal with the most important swing votes in the district, J.R. Majewski has universal name identification after running last cycle. However, this cycle, J.R. will be able to tell voters the story about himself, his background in the nuclear power industry, and his military service without the false Democrat attacks from last cycle that have been proven false.
Not only will Majewski be able to re-introduce himself to OH-9’s voters, but he will also be able to tell the story of how Marcy Kaptur and the Democrat party illegally accessed his military records and lied about his service – a powerful message especially within our targeted voter demographic.
**BUT I NEED YOUR HELP!**

clean_body: Peter, Ohio’s 9th Congressional District targeted as potential pick-up opportunities in 2024 | | | | | Ohio’s 9th Congressional District Targeted as Top Pickup for Republicans Peter, Ohio’s 9th Congressional District is one of three races that the National Congressional Campaign Committee (NRCC) is targeting as potential pick-up opportunities in 2024. Of the three targeted races, OH-9 is the only district that is trending positively for Republican candidates and where Republicans perform better with Donald Trump on the ticket for President. With these trends in mind, it is important that the nominee be a strong supporter of President Trump and someone who can resonate with working-class voters in the suburbs of Toledo. Last cycle’s nominee, J.R. Majewski, is the best positioned candidate in the Primary forOH-9 to turnout Trump voters and working-class swing votes. In addition to his appeal with the most important swing votes in the district, J.R. Majewski has universal name identification after running last cycle. However, this cycle, J.R. will be able to tell voters the story about himself, his background in the nuclear power industry, and his military service without the false Democrat attacks from last cycle that have been proven false. Not only will Majewski be able to re-introduce himself to OH-9’s voters, but he will also be able to tell the story of how Marcy Kaptur and the Democrat party illegally accessed his military records and lied about his service – a powerful message especially within our targeted voter demographic. body:
It's time.

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d74ece2298254a99ab927c1adf1d32e7&_e=JXBeQdjzXFYgAhy7qhoIpRpCK4s-nKZhI4GX387CZDanLyJQvL-hJzuujRZny91QlKnYGXj__RteCE1pND6HjNhARAlm9uLsST8Mf04HZfU7Bz0B50d2LFkXcW43yGnwpoccUm7u5dG3pFa8wIsDiSsVMKxKSlVkuhBLi9O0f6RUCnR7orf2hKgPH_Ko_0s23L-IJzpRyNVN_I8iMzwtqPWjVGthdFEQ2fv5k4YKnek40zh9tV6oNqM5Oux3NUKUyDHsxhtHRVW-iH2S_MCRU8nS0ZwGHZh9OPQdw8EZLd-vOncWoOI4EVXzqEh9QF_h)
---
Friends,

**It 's time for an honest conversation. **

I recently missed my End-of-Quarter deadline AND the Democrats are outraising me.

**[BUT - we don't have to outraise them to flip the Senate red. I just have to close the gap and get more and more patriots like YOU involved in this grassroots movement.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d74ece2298254a99ab927c1adf1d32e7&_e=JXBeQdjzXFYgAhy7qhoIpRpCK4s-nKZhI4GX387CZDanLyJQvL-hJzuujRZny91QlKnYGXj__RteCE1pND6HjNhARAlm9uLsST8Mf04HZfU7Bz0B50d2LFkXcW43yGnwpoccUm7u5dG3pFa8wIsDiSsVMKxKSlVkuhBLi9O0f6S2e-WSlmh3iT8_Xntv5FSRxOuIru5wvt-2VUuizLKS0_qVr3ym7_7ikMnEWsIqUz8F4iDsymvRhSURnbiBVuYncUKI7FSBjTjyzJ6z6Nyof0oAZlrErJN7nqu0XptRYX0Lk43L2tZP6k4-rS7KOGV4)**

Let me be clear: this is still anyone's win despite the Democrats outraising me and other Republicans across the country last Quarter.

**[I am offering a 400% impact on every donation before the end of the day to gain major ground on the Radical Left!](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d74ece2298254a99ab927c1adf1d32e7&_e=JXBeQdjzXFYgAhy7qhoIpRpCK4s-nKZhI4GX387CZDanLyJQvL-hJzuujRZny91QlKnYGXj__RteCE1pND6HjNhARAlm9uLsST8Mf04HZfU7Bz0B50d2LFkXcW43yGnwpoccUm7u5dG3pFa8wIsDiSsVMKxKSlVkuhBLi9O0f6RtqRmBlEFNGGfQj8IQTKLrHvI-3RqlYwSc-X-J5fbM7aGSCNNUoNXK0BET9xh7C0TqespzhiyBoAoI46Zui1V0VZ4YZra6fSA9hGulPoa4E5Bge4Q69hTX9I7Ti5xrdZcmSva9RcJpranV0cHfqVRg)**

If there's one thing that I (a hillbilly) know how to do best, it's getting scrappy. I'm not going down without a MAJOR fight. I hope you aren't either. The Radical Left might be outraising us, but I KNOW that they have nothing to celebrate - and I'm determined to keep it that way in 2024.

**[One last shot to impact your donation 400%! I'm not going to offer this again for a while, so I really hope you choose to take me up on it!](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d74ece2298254a99ab927c1adf1d32e7&_e=JXBeQdjzXFYgAhy7qhoIpRpCK4s-nKZhI4GX387CZDanLyJQvL-hJzuujRZny91QlKnYGXj__RteCE1pND6HjNhARAlm9uLsST8Mf04HZfU7Bz0B50d2LFkXcW43yGnwpoccUm7u5dG3pFa8wIsDiSsVMKxKSlVkuhBLi9O0f6QsurWr-_22C5JWCew3Qun0wQ4JE2E4dstNqZhPcdeuOLp4XPCCZdmc_1EuIcsy8cn0rW-dy_q2S2SleBIktc5tzxZOug6sTsfnKZHS7XDT-PUNLhgUUjiJ9cMx368VKv2wDW3mqfy9zB09cEA8nVvZ)**

Best,

name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Each and every one of my supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Michelle Steel and her GOP friends in Congress have tied themselves up in knots. The GOP disarray of the last few weeks has left the House without a Speaker and unable to take action.

While families here in Orange County struggle to get by, Republicans can only focus on scoring political points.

[We urgently need a representative who will focus on our families and our issues in Congress. **We have every exciting news coming out of Pennsylvania from Governor Josh Shapiro →**

This is great news! Now, eligible voters getting a new driver’s license or ID will be automatically registered to vote.

**This is an important step in expanding our democracy and securing our elections.**

While extremist Republicans across the country try to pass voter suppression laws and keep vulnerable Americans out of our election process, I’ve been proud to support legislation that would make it easier for people to vote.

I know how important common sense solutions like automatic voter registration, vote-by-mail, and early voting are in allowing voters of varying backgrounds and abilities to vote.

**But I’m running in a toss-up district against MAGA extremists who want to make it harder for people to vote, so I need all the help I can get.[_Will you contribute to my re-election campaign to keep me fighting for voting rights and more in Congress?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71335469/431826568/-1389333689?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231010-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzA5N2MwNi1hODY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pw2WALfBv8gV0XruH7VJaAnNiX7gR4GXSZNh9-vZWBo=)**

clean_body: This is great news! Now, eligible voters getting a new driver’s license or ID will be automatically registered to vote. | = | Peter, We have every exciting news coming out of Pennsylvania from Governor Josh Shapiro → = This is great news! Now, eligible voters getting a new driver’s license or ID will be automatically registered to vote. This is an important step in expanding our democracy and securing our elections. While extremist Republicans across the country try to pass voter suppression laws and keep vulnerable Americans out of our election process, I’ve been proud to support legislation that would make it easier for people to vote. I know how important common sense solutions like automatic voter registration, vote-by-mail, and early voting are in allowing voters of varying backgrounds and abilities to vote. But I’m running in a toss-up district against MAGA extremists who want to make it harder for people to vote, so I need all the help I can get.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71336464/431827437/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQxZGViOWQtYTg2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zhURv1x0npiTw6URO9P7DXV8jFZ--P_GjR62TnRv9Y8=) Friend, I am horrified and saddened by the attacks in Israel, and the pain, fear, and collective trauma our Jewish community is feeling. I stand with Israel and all affected by this violence. I grieve for the women and young children living in fear, falling asleep through tears. I grieve for the pain of everyone mourning the silence from their families and friends overseas, unsure if they will ever hear their voices again. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71336466/431827438/-2056905129?utm_source=laura_friedman&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQxZGViOWQtYTg2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zhURv1x0npiTw6URO9P7DXV8jFZ--P_GjR62TnRv9Y8=&emci=f11ceb9d-a867-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=041deb9d-a867-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100) It was deeply moving to attend the beautiful vigil hosted by the Jewish Federation of Greater Los Angeles at Stephen Wise Temple on Sunday evening. It was touching to see members of our community gather to grieve and pray together for the people of Israel and all affected. I pray that there is still a pathway to peace and stability in the region. And I send all of my heart to everyone grieving right now. name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: Challenging the Narrative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
Our mid-month deadline is approaching.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=bb52e995d5&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# Challenging the Narrative
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Fellow Patriots, As the so-called “black face of white supremacy,” I’ve experienced firsthand how vicious the Left is when they’re advancing their identity politics. Democrats are blinded by their obsessions with race and gender, as evidenced by the decision by California Governor Gavin Newsom’s ridiculous decision to appoint Laphonza Butler, a radical leftwing activist and Maryland resident, as the state’s newest Senator. I’ve spent my whole life challenging the narrative that black Americans must toe the Democratic Party line, hoping to be rewarded with plush positions simply because we checked certain boxes. And now, our presidential campaign is challenging the narrative that only a career politician backed or self-funding billionaires can win the White House. [**That’s why I need YOU. We are approaching our mid-month deadline, and we’ve got to raise $100,000 by October 15th to meet our goal. Your donation of ANY AMOUNT helps us remain competitive in this race!**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=f3bb4029b9&e=0be619cbaa) Remember: it wasn’t too long ago that an unconventional candidate was considered a long shot and the next year went on to win the GOP nomination and the White House. That man? Donald Trump. And it can happen again. With your support, we can continue to challenge the narrative that only political insiders get to decide the direction of the country. We the People are still in charge, and we’re ready to restore America. [**So, I’m asking you: what can you give today to propel our campaign forward? This mid-month deadline is critical, and I’m counting on patriots like you to meet this important goal.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=0ad39417f8&e=0be619cbaa) Thank you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President
---

clean_body: Our mid-month deadline is approaching. | | | | | | | Challenging the Narrative | | | | | Fellow Patriots, As the so-called “black face of white supremacy,” I’ve experienced firsthand how vicious the Left is when they’re advancing their identity politics. Democrats are blinded by their obsessions with race and gender, as evidenced by the decision by California Governor Gavin Newsom’s ridiculous decision to appoint Laphonza Butler, a radical leftwing activist and Maryland resident, as the state’s newest Senator. I’ve spent my whole life challenging the narrative that black Americans must toe the Democratic Party line, hoping to be rewarded with plush positions simply because we checked certain boxes. And now, our presidential campaign is challenging the narrative that only a career politician backed or self-funding billionaires can win the White House. Remember: it wasn’t too long ago that an unconventional candidate was considered a long shot and the next year went on to win the GOP nomination and the White House. That man? Donald Trump. And it can happen again. With your support, we can continue to challenge the narrative that only political insiders get to decide the direction of the country. We the People are still in charge, and we’re ready to restore America. Thank you, Larry Elder GOP Candidate for President | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24 | 650 Town Center Drive, Suite 1500 Costa Mesa, CA 92626 USA No more emails? You can . Copyright © 2023 , All rights reserved._

body:
markagonzalez.com [markagonzalez.com]
Hi friends,
It has been an honor to serve as the District Attorney for Nueces County. With Governor Abbott’s recent appointment, that service is over in an official capacity. But, as the people of Nueces County who elected me twice know, my commitment to our state will not end.
I’m excited to hit the ground running as a candidate to represent Texas in the US Senate, and I’m looking forward to dedicating the time it’ll take to build a winning campaign.
Donate to Mark Gonzalez [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfortexas]
I wish DA Jimmy Granberry the best of luck. I can’t tell you it’ll be an easy job, but I can promise you it’ll be a fulfilling one serving Texans — the greatest people on earth.
Adelante,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105874/images/Mark%20signature%20file.png]

name: Roy Cooper
subject: We can curb the gun violence epidemic. We must.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Protecting our kids is a top priority.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71340031/431828759/823540626?refcode=ea.9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTE2MDRlZi1hYTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oywlag6xClh0E88tNaBLvtmX5b0Cb09iVUFp5SYQYeA=&emci=739d7b0c-a067-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — firearm deaths of children are spiking, and North Carolina’s kids are even more at risk. A new report recently showed that North Carolina was in the top five states with the biggest increases in gun-related deaths of children over the last few years. **This is unacceptable, Peter, and I’ve done everything in my power as governor to avert the crisis. But legislative Republicans in the grips of the gun lobby refuse to come to the table to take real action. In fact, the only action they’ve taken is to go backward by overriding my veto of a bill that eliminates the pistol permit system.** **[I’m once again calling on the GOP-controlled legislature to prioritize gun violence prevention. Add your name to join me>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71340032/431828760/747559482?refcode=ea.9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTE2MDRlZi1hYTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oywlag6xClh0E88tNaBLvtmX5b0Cb09iVUFp5SYQYeA=&emci=739d7b0c-a067-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** Look, we know what we need to do to curb the epidemic of gun violence. **We need to institute reasonable reforms like red flag laws and background checks — but the GOP and their special-interest gun lobby backers won’t have it.** Instead, they choose to ignore the problem and the threat to our kids. **[North Carolina’s children can’t solve this crisis themselves. We — their leaders — have to take action to protect them. If you agree, sign my petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71340033/431828761/747559482?refcode=ea.9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTE2MDRlZi1hYTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oywlag6xClh0E88tNaBLvtmX5b0Cb09iVUFp5SYQYeA=&emci=739d7b0c-a067-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71340034/431828762/747559482?refcode=ea.9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTE2MDRlZi1hYTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oywlag6xClh0E88tNaBLvtmX5b0Cb09iVUFp5SYQYeA=&emci=739d7b0c-a067-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9a1604ef-aa67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

Friend,
---
George Soros has been quietly funding a new generation of far-Left activists on TikTok - a platform that's beholden to the Chinese Communist Party - to manipulate the 2024 election.
---
_Documents reviewed by the New York Post revealed George Soros is paying an army of Gen-Z TikTokers to indoctrinate young voters with Marxist propaganda that pushes his left-wing causes and praises Joe Biden._
---

clean_body: We’re in a bit of a tight spot. | = Look, Peter — I’ve got good news and bad news. The good news: brand new polling shows this race in a DEAD HEAT — 48% to 47%. With just 28 days until Election Day, we have a clear shot at winning this thing. The bad news: we have a major gap between our fundraising projections and our campaign budget through Election Day. If we don’t raise $130,000 by the end of the month, we’re going to have to start taking a look at potential budget cuts. = | = I’m not going to lie, we're in a tight spot. Cutting back on operations right now means fewer TV ads, fewer yard signs, fewer volunteer materials — we’d have to drastically cut back the number of voters that we’re talking to. In a race this competitive, that could be the difference between winning and losing. Tate Reeves is pulling out all the stops to win this race. He and his good ole boy donor network are spending millions of dollars to lie about Brandon’s record everywhere they can. We’ve managed to go toe-to-toe with them, but are in serious danger of being overwhelmed if we don’t close this gap. = Thanks for your help, Isaac Lampner Finance Director, Brandon Presley for Governor | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. subject: Crouch Reaffirms Commitment to Advancing Indiana Mental Health Initiatives on World Mental Health Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Suzanne Crouch reaffirmed her commitment to improving mental health services for Hoosiers Tuesday on World Mental Health Day.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/crouch-reaffirms-commitment-to-advancing-indiana-mental-health-initiatives-on-world-mental-health-day?e=8f9fef7158)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=930ec1b151-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_10_07_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-930ec1b151-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Oct. 10, 2023

MEDIA CONTACT
Robert Vane
robert@veteranstrategies.com
Crouch Reaffirms Commitment to Advancing Indiana Mental Health Initiatives on World Mental Health Day

Indianapolis, IND —On Tuesday, Suzanne Crouch reaffirmed her commitment (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid0E8ksj9g1rUoYikiYuBs7hcWAJKMSvitfB8ByGEhgDTeAVkz75mjebNnWiKt5Pg5Gl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=930ec1b151-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_10_07_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-930ec1b151-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to improving mental health services for all Hoosiers as the world observes World Mental Health Day.

Suzanne Crouch has been an ardent advocate for mental health in Indiana. It's an issue that for Crouch, like so many, hits close to home. Her commitment to this cause is evident through her advocacy and her actions.

Couch established Indiana's Mental Health Roundtable (https://mentalhealthroundtable.org/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=930ec1b151-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_10_07_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-930ec1b151-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , she travels the state spreading awareness while sharing her family's own struggles with mental illness and addiction and has made significant efforts to expand mental health funding in Indiana.

This past legislative session, in a unique move for a Lieutenant Governor, Crouch testified in support of Senate Bill 1.

"I'm a strong advocate for mental health," Crouch wrotein a social media post (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid0awJxxDz6UrnwA8nCafkFyEecfCFCgA1UXpPYMtwheLASneZtJLu2G9nkMXdaQqndl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=930ec1b151-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_10_07_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-930ec1b151-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on Tuesday. "That's why I testified in support of Senate Bill 1, which puts $100 million toward funding Indiana's suicide hotline and mental health crisis teams. It's a crucial step in helping the Hoosiers who need it the most."
In 2021, she took a major step by establishing the Indiana Mental Health Roundtable (IMHR). This initiative aims to tackle one of Indiana's biggest challenges: the fact that 1 in 5 Hoosiers grapple with mental health challenges, yet many feel hesitant to seek help.

The IMHR (https://mentalhealthroundtable.org/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=930ec1b151-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_10_07_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-930ec1b151-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) acts as a catalyst for change by working to improve the mental health status of all Indiana citizens. This is achieved by supporting and promoting actions and initiatives throughout the state that break the stigma, strengthen the mental health delivery system, and enhance access and affordability of treatment options.

In a heartfelt social media post (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid0E8ksj9g1rUoYikiYuBs7hcWAJKMSvitfB8ByGEhgDTeAVkz75mjebNnWiKt5Pg5Gl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=930ec1b151-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_10_07_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-930ec1b151-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) commemorating World Mental Health Day, Crouch acknowledged the strides Indiana has made and her commitment to the work that lies ahead. She also encouraged Hoosiers to connect with their loved ones and directed Hoosiers in need of help to https://www.in.gov/bewellindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=930ec1b151-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_10_07_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-930ec1b151-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D.

"As your Governor, I'm dedicated to further improving access to mental health services for all Hoosiers," Crouch said in the post. "On #WorldMentalHealthDay, let's connect with loved ones and remember that help is just a click away."
On World Mental Health Day and every day, Crouch stands ready to champion the cause of mental health and improve the well-being of all Hoosiers.

For more information about Suzanne Crouch, please visit https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=930ec1b151-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_10_07_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-930ec1b151-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D.
###

============================================================
Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Hopping on a flight to DC but want to touch base
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Hey Peter, I'm at the airport heading back to DC and want to touch base. There's so much going on around the world right now, and people are rightly fed up with Washington’s inability to function.
We need to protect our national interests abroad. We need to fund the government. But without a Speaker, we can’t get anything done.
I want you to know that there are still public servants in Congress who are actually doing their jobs and looking out for your interests. There’s more of us than you may think.
We all know the people on the extreme right aren’t the ones with the answers. Solutions will come from coming together and finding bipartisan solutions.
I know it’s exhausting. There’s so much noise. But I remain hopeful for progress as the week unfolds.
I’ll keep you posted,
Wiley

In 2022, Republicans put up a slate of election-denying candidates for the office of Secretary of State in swing states across the nation.

But instead of turning their backs on Trump’s conspiracy theories, today’s GOP is embracing them even further.

clean_body: | | | | Will you take 2 minutes to share your thoughts? Peter, It’s time we get back to work. Before we can do that we need a new Speaker. That’s why I’m reaching out. | | | | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \-

name: me, Stefanie C. [2]
subject: checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friend, it's Stefanie from Team Gillibrand again.
---
Last month, I emailed a select group of supporters (including you!) about becoming a monthly donor to our grassroots campaign. We were thrilled to see so many people commit to defending this seat in 2024 with a monthly gift.
You see, monthly donors are the backbone of Kirsten's campaign, friend — they're the folks who she knows we can count on _every single month_ to power the most critical aspects of our campaign. From keeping the lights on at our campaign headquarters to competing with GOP ads on TV and radio, we couldn't do it without our committed monthly supporters.
**But unfortunately, I just finished running the numbers from last month, and we fell 23 monthly donors short of our goal.**
That's why I'm reaching out to you once again. **I noticed that you haven't taken the opportunity to become a monthly donor yet. And now, I'm personally asking you, friend:[_Please, will you take a moment right now to upgrade your support to a monthly gift? As one of our most reliable supporters, I'm really counting on your help to hit this goal — even just $5 a month will make a notable impact._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71348338/431833903/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode=jtk4498-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk5NzJmYi1hZjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sgQZF0KRdXO3o-By-t-uK4scGwIp-r9yNXWpWsoZp6s=)**
| | [Become a Monthly Donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71348342/431833905/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=1&refcode=jtk4498-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk5NzJmYi1hZjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sgQZF0KRdXO3o-By-t-uK4scGwIp-r9yNXWpWsoZp6s=)

Thank you so much,

Stefanie
Kirsten's Finance Director
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Stefanie C.**
Subject: I want to thank you
| | |
---
Friend, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. **First, I want to thank you, truly, for your support to Kirsten's campaign.** Kirsten and all of us on Team Gillibrand are so grateful for our grassroots supporters like you.
This campaign is seriously heating up — we're just a couple short weeks away from our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. That's why I'm about to ask you to become a Team Gillibrand Monthly Donor.

Please, let me explain why your monthly gift is so important _right now_ :
* Election experts across the board are warning that the 2024 Senate map is a "GOP dream," meaning **we could lose our pro-choice majority in the Senate.**

* **New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades**. With one of their MAGA extremists hinting that he'll challenge Kirsten, we _need_ to put up strong numbers for this quarter.

* Kirsten refuses to take a single cent from corporate PACs. That means **she's relying on grassroots folks like you** to compete with the GOP's megadonors.

The only way that Kirsten will be able to win in New York and defend our pro-choice Senate majority is with early, consistent support from grassroots supporters like you, friend. _[So please, will you commit to this fight by starting a monthly donation of just $5 to save our Senate majority and protect reproductive rights? Kirsten needs to know that she can count on you, friend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71348346/431833908/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode=jtk4498-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk5NzJmYi1hZjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sgQZF0KRdXO3o-By-t-uK4scGwIp-r9yNXWpWsoZp6s=)_
Thank you,

Stefanie
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71348351/431833911/1575385346?refcode=jtk4498-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk5NzJmYi1hZjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sgQZF0KRdXO3o-By-t-uK4scGwIp-r9yNXWpWsoZp6s=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: Friend, it's Stefanie from Team Gillibrand again. Last month, I emailed a select group of supporters (including you!) about becoming a monthly donor to our grassroots campaign. We were thrilled to see so many people commit to defending this seat in 2024 with a monthly gift. You see, monthly donors are the backbone of Kirsten's campaign, friend — they're the folks who she knows we can count on every single month to power the most critical aspects of our campaign. From keeping the lights on at our campaign headquarters to competing with GOP ads on TV and radio, we couldn't do it without our committed monthly supporters. But unfortunately, I just finished running the numbers from last month, and we fell 23 monthly donors short of our goal. That's why I'm reaching out to you once again. I noticed that you haven't taken the opportunity to become a monthly donor yet. **Every one of their lies, attacks, and disgusting witch hunts are all designed to CANCEL OUT _YOUR_ VOTE!**
---

With _TWO_ different polls now showing us CRUSHING Biden by 10 POINTS, the only question left to ask is:******_What witch hunt will come next?_******

...the greatest political movement in history – more than 74 MILLION dedicated patriots strong – that will **NEVER,****_EVER_****SURRENDER** our country to the Left’s tyranny.

clean_body: What will Crooked Joe scheme up next?| | | | | Patriot, I know it’s hard to imagine that after all you’ve witnessed Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats do to try and stop us – sham indictments, unjust arrests, and bogus trials – this is just the beginning. It’s no secret that the Left doesn’t like me very much, but their hatred of me alone is not what’s behind these schemes to try and destroy our America First Movement. The truth is: Every one of their lies, attacks, and disgusting witch hunts are all designed to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE! Which is why I am more than certain that even after FOUR sham indictments, arrests, and a mugshot of an innocent man, Crooked Joe is not about to call it a day. With TWO different polls now showing us CRUSHING Biden by 10 POINTS, the only question left to ask is:****What witch hunt will come next?** But Patriot, no matter what the Left throws at us, rest assured, I’ve never been more confident that we will prevail – just as we always have – because we have something the Radical Democrats NEVER will... ...the greatest political movement in history – more than 74 MILLION dedicated patriots strong – that will NEVER,**EVERSURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My decision / Kari Lake’s launch tonight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Besides the day we launched, this is probably the most important day of the race so far.
#
Friends,
Later tonight, Kari Lake will launch her campaign for United States Senate.
Besides the day we launched, this is probably the most important day of the race so far.
But hang on a minute. Put that aside for a second. Because right now, I want to talk to you about my decision to run in the first place.
When I made the decision to run for Senate in Arizona, it was to take back this seat from Kyrsten Sinema. Replace her vote in the Senate with someone who actually cares about the people of our state.
That was reason enough for me.
But now, Kari Lake is running. The MAGA Queen. Someone who has no problem lying, spreading misinformation — even calling for her supporters to commit violence on behalf of Donald Trump.
I lived through January 6th. I heard the shouts from the mob while I was on the House floor, barricading the doors and helping my colleagues evacuate to safety. I know what Kari Lake means for our democracy.
So today, this campaign is not just about getting another vote in the Senate. It’s not just about our priorities. It still is those things, but it’s about defending our democracy now, too.
And that is a lot of pressure. Trust me... I’m feeling it. I expect you are, too. But you are not alone in this fight. I’m with you, and thousands of others are, too.
Right now, a lot of them are making donations after Kari Lake jumped in the race. They’re hoping that you will join them. Because they know that is how we will win this race.
So please, I am asking you very humbly:
**[Can you please split a contribution between The Long Run and my campaign for Senate in Arizona? Lots and lots of people adding donations is the only way we’ll hold the Senate. That’s the only way we’ll defend it from Kari Lake.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.yaQa6D&refcode=em231010-1-t45&t=1&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Ruben Gallego and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.IinkEU&refcode=em231010-1-t45&t=20&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.Fbk8yM&refcode=em231010-1-t45&t=21&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.2P-E8A&refcode=em231010-1-t45&t=22&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.aty12d&refcode=em231010-1-t45&t=23&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.v4xGJp&refcode=em231010-1-t45&t=24&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.yaQa6D&refcode=em231010-1-t45&t=25&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
There’s an old motto in the Marines: “First to Fight.” That always stuck with me. And you have my word: I’m not going to back down.
I am proud to be in this fight with you. Thank you for your continued support.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=4917_196590_ln9fdf&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4917%2E196590%2Eln9fdf)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: our race by the numbers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=556%2E52803%2E2G2Kq2)

| | **May 9, 2023** That’s the day we launched our grassroots campaign for Maryland’s U.S. Senate seat, Peter. _**And since then, we’ve made history.**_ In just five months, we’ve earned the endorsement of more than 100 of Maryland’s most influential leaders, received support from the Democratic Party’s most recognizable figures, like Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock, and broke several of Maryland’s statewide fundraising records. **$3,200,000** In fact, our campaign has already raised more than **$3.2 MILLION** in just five months’ time, which is a direct testament to the _incredible_ strength of this small-dollar, grassroots team. With your continued support, we’ve been able to remain competitive with our self-funded, multi-millionaire opponent who’s investing tens of millions of dollars into his own campaign. **$10** But we’re not done yet, Peter. While we never may have the cash to match our uber-wealthy opponent dollar-for-dollar, we have already separated ourselves as the campaign with the most individual donors in this race. There’s strength in numbers—**[and that’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10 to support our campaign and prove you don’t have to be a self-funded millionaire to serve in the Senate.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7079?t=9&amount=10&akid=556%2E52803%2E2G2Kq2)** **November 5, 2024** With your help, that’s the day we’re going to win Maryland’s U.S. Senate seat and deliver on our promise to create better-paying jobs, bring down the cost of living for Maryland families, improve our healthcare system, and strengthen our kids’ education. This campaign has already accomplished so much—and that’s all because of on-the-ground supporters like you, Peter. But we can’t stop now if we’re going to win next November. **[So please, will you chip in $10 to continue spreading our message all across Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7079?t=10&amount=10&akid=556%2E52803%2E2G2Kq2)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | | [Chip in $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7079?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=556%2E52803%2E2G2Kq2)

name: David Hogg
subject: BINGO: Biden just delivered for young Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71350930/431836376/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ZGI4NS1iMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBD30_1j3bm5o83NlJ13tlNmPEVucbixeZ4gJN4ki54=&emci=0548e952-7d67-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ac14db85-b167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, Peter:

**President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.**

This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!!

I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: [_**Please split a donation of $25 today between Leaders We Deserve and the GA Dems to help carry this momentum forward and elect the leaders we deserve.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71350931/431836377/-2074411583?refcode=20231010.2_DH_10I&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ZGI4NS1iMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBD30_1j3bm5o83NlJ13tlNmPEVucbixeZ4gJN4ki54=)

**Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, Peter.**

**When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress.**

Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows.

The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!!

**And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement.**

In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden.

Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics

[_**Help us carry this momentum and get more life-saving sh*t done by splitting a donation of $25 between the GA Dems and Leaders We Deserve.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71350932/431836378/-2074411583?refcode=20231010.2_DH_10I&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ZGI4NS1iMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBD30_1j3bm5o83NlJ13tlNmPEVucbixeZ4gJN4ki54=)

We should celebrate this momentous victory, Peter — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon.

There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few.

There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country.

[_**If you’re celebrating this victory, but are ready for the important work ahead, please split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and the GA Dems to help fund our work.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71350933/431836379/-2074411583?refcode=20231010.2_DH_10I&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ZGI4NS1iMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBD30_1j3bm5o83NlJ13tlNmPEVucbixeZ4gJN4ki54=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

[Donate $250 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71350946/431836384/-2074411583?express_lane=true&refcode=20231010.2_DH_10I&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ZGI4NS1iMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBD30_1j3bm5o83NlJ13tlNmPEVucbixeZ4gJN4ki54=)
[Donate another amount >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71350950/431836385/-2074411583?refcode=20231010.2_DH_10I&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ZGI4NS1iMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBD30_1j3bm5o83NlJ13tlNmPEVucbixeZ4gJN4ki54=)

name: Trump Seal of Approval
subject: This should be at the TOP of your inbox.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
You really should see this.
You really should see this.

| [ ](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=effe840ae3c143f898102269a26333d3&_e=it-_TxAibD1nkkD5iETWz11KjDd1EgP0q5MZQjqhWVVQrta3ZC0X_MlY9pTS8GNf48_dz1nJXl4n8r48FlHj5AM88HyYofQ3aUYrZuoYdTG-3JDsWVtT5b-vAsMiGa6uR3_DcUB75nEcj_kouIAZW0lN6itqAgxoxZmWvfay0ouc9RU5ntRBnWpBRu2FHRiJCAY0YI1ZdjFGLnWj_Dd_pD3b2umbUgGIEcBuTH7EXIs1kCdze5pneifmtjtbzbqwQCtk6T-dP2H-Sad4Mv9pLp5os2qqMrKSDJn9QqPgwkJRqCu_Zd8xF_Jh-_73d_H6)

Friend,

We're personally reaching out to you regarding a touchy subject -- if there were an email in your inbox to read today, it should be this one.

To be honest with you -- the America First movement could be doing better. Millions of patriots nationwide voted for President Donald J. Trump in the 2016 and 2020 elections. The WORLD knows he's the most popular conservative candidate in the 21st century.

**Unfortunately, the groundswell of support we saw could be dying down. Over the past year, President Trump has been indicted and arraigned FOUR TIMES, his opponents are trying to take him out of the GOP primary, and Democrats proudly proclaim the America First movement is almost at an end.**

Additionally, President Trump's supporters are struggling to raise the $$$ necessary to win crucial races and fight back against the left and their radical donors.

**[We know $5 doesn't seem like a lot -- but if your $5 contribution could make a $50 IMPACT, the Democrats would be in BIG TROUBLE. ](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=effe840ae3c143f898102269a26333d3&_e=it-_TxAibD1nkkD5iETWz11KjDd1EgP0q5MZQjqhWVVQrta3ZC0X_MlY9pTS8GNf48_dz1nJXl4n8r48FlHj5AM88HyYofQ3aUYrZuoYdTG-3JDsWVtT5b-vAsMiGa6uR3_DcUB75nEcj_kouIAZW_BtxJbmwHOIALdQXDr1Ka0Ovo1Poe0396N2WumRWsYGtRbO75DiFLIQI-DesmgeceqODN-xBuOnyX-or6vCCt8BCR7pDNnuXK6W5LHoOLC43GD6UG_JOMmkSs5Z-BhVveFquMuHGdBotAiiGBGGinbRFVEkP_ZYC9XPJwwBVGV9)**

name: Right-Wing Media Alert (via Courier Newsroom)
subject: Trump is treating his court appearances like campaign events
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71352842/431837790/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0YzQwYzYtYjI2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4PlViiEuga3esThwdx-TcAg1tPNfxdJ8CfrSDtUzvYk=&emci=4311775f-a367-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=4e4c40c6-b267-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Donald Trump will spend as much time in courtrooms as he will on the campaign trail in 2024.
So it's not surprising that Trump is turning his court appearances into campaign events. This strategy was on display last week when Trump showed up in a Manhattan courtroom for his civil fraud trial despite not addressing the court and being under no obligation to appear.
**Trump knows what he's doing. Using his court appearances to seize media attention, Trump can continue to push the lie that he is the victim of a liberal political conspiracy to stop him from running again.**
**[If you’re ready to take action to stop Donald Trump’s dangerous lies and misinformation from spreading in 2024, will you show your support for our mission by pitching in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71352844/431837791/-932789545?refcode=em20231010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0YzQwYzYtYjI2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4PlViiEuga3esThwdx-TcAg1tPNfxdJ8CfrSDtUzvYk=)**
While many mainstream media outlets didn’t take Trump’s bait, right-wing media like Fox News went all-in on wall-to-wall coverage:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71352847/431837793/-932789545?refcode=em20231010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0YzQwYzYtYjI2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4PlViiEuga3esThwdx-TcAg1tPNfxdJ8CfrSDtUzvYk=)
While Trump bloviated to a wall of cameras, hosts on networks like Fox News and Newsmax amplified Trump’s bogus claims that the trial was part of some vast liberal conspiracy to deny him a second presidential term.
**The coverage was eerily similar to what we saw after the 2020 election when Trump and his surrogates used the right-wing media to push the “big lie” that Joe Biden stole the election.**
If the last two presidential elections have taught us anything, it’s that lies and propaganda can penetrate far beyond the audiences of the right-wing media who spread it.
It can spread to every corner of the Internet and our communities. And that’s what makes Courier’s work right now so important.
We founded Courier to bring high-quality journalism (i.e. the truth!) to communities stuck in “news deserts” where right-wing misinformation spreads. Our local newsrooms in nine critical battleground states are taking on Trump and the right-wing media, and they need your help.
**[By delivering our credible journalism to the online spaces where people get their news, we’re doing our part to keep our democracy strong in 2024. If you’re ready to help us fight back, will you chip in anything you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71352850/431837795/-932789545?refcode=em20231010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0YzQwYzYtYjI2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4PlViiEuga3esThwdx-TcAg1tPNfxdJ8CfrSDtUzvYk=)**
**[Donate ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71352853/431837797/-932789545?refcode=em20231010&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0YzQwYzYtYjI2Ny1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4PlViiEuga3esThwdx-TcAg1tPNfxdJ8CfrSDtUzvYk=)**
As always, thank you for your support!
Courier Newsroom

name: Katie Porter
subject: 9 months down, 5 months to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The high cost of housing is one of the issues I hear most about.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31235%2E3422442%2Eyx2VPR)
Derek, I can't believe it's been a full nine months since we launched our Senate campaign. Since launching, here are few things that have stuck with me:
1. **The high cost of housing is one of the issues I hear most about from Californians.** Many younger people worry they’ll never afford to purchase a home, or that they’ll have to leave our state to do so. We must use the power of the federal government to address high costs, rather than just blaming states and local governments.
2. **People are fed up with the status quo and where it’s leading us.** Whether it's union members demanding fair pay while their CEO makes millions, or students organizing to keep their schools safe from gun violence, I’ve been inspired by the Californians I’ve met who are eager to make a difference—and I’m ready to be their champion in the Senate.
3. **I’ve been so touched by all of the supporters who are putting their faith in me and our campaign.** Pundits have wondered if we have what it takes to go the distance and compete against tens of millions of dollars. But this grassroots team continues to step up, and whether you give your time or a few bucks, I am so appreciative.

I’m ready to stand up to special interests and corporations and take on the big challenges facing Californians and our country. But I need your help. 99% of our contributions are $100 or less—we truly count on every dollar. [**Can you chip in today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231010-2?refcode=EMAM10_2_LAU_20231010_V1_F&refcode2=31235_3422442_yx2VPR&akid=31235%2E3422442%2Eyx2VPR)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231010-2?refcode=EMAM10_2_LAU_20231010_V1_F&refcode2=31235_3422442_yx2VPR&akid=31235%2E3422442%2Eyx2VPR)
—Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM10_2_LAU_20231010_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=31235_3422442_yx2VPR&akid=31235%2E3422442%2Eyx2VPR)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=31235%2E3422442%2Eyx2VPR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=31235%2E3422442%2Eyx2VPR)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

body:
**** Mad believes in a government _by_ and _for_ the people, and that’s why she’s committed to being a solutions-oriented legislator in DC – even amid the chaos from her colleagues across the aisle.

From defending reproductive rights to creating an economy that works for all, Mad is determined to address the needs and challenges of Americans nationwide — exactly what MAGA Republicans are unwilling to come together to do.

**Peter, when it comes to the issues, what do _you_ want Congress to address? [Take Mad’s quick survey to let her know what matters most to you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71355023/431839489/211929619?refcode=10102023_md_survey_en_1&refcode2=31262e29-b467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTI2MmUyOS1iNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4O9KbmLGSQ1FOIblS5uEsYz_Y6KnBspWL87gWdj67uM=&emci=f3f3952c-a067-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=31262e29-b467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)** | | [ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71355024/431839490/211929619?refcode=10102023_md_survey_en_1&refcode2=31262e29-b467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTI2MmUyOS1iNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4O9KbmLGSQ1FOIblS5uEsYz_Y6KnBspWL87gWdj67uM=&emci=f3f3952c-a067-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=31262e29-b467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)

Mad is fighting in Congress every day for well-informed policy: She has led efforts to protect the rights of women and girls, to stop the scourge of gun violence, to safeguard our right to vote, and much more.

**[Let Mad know the issues that are most important to you by taking our quick survey right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71355025/431839491/211929619?refcode=10102023_md_survey_en_1&refcode2=31262e29-b467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTI2MmUyOS1iNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4O9KbmLGSQ1FOIblS5uEsYz_Y6KnBspWL87gWdj67uM=&emci=f3f3952c-a067-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=31262e29-b467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)**

Thanks,

Cole

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_

* Ousted a sitting Speaker of the House for the first time in history — from THEIR OWN party!

Self-interest. She’s the epitome of the angertainment industry. Last year, Adam Frisch nearly defeated Boebert. After a recount, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country. Adam could have won. He should have won. But the simple truth is that Adam was out-spent by Boebert and her Super PACs by millions and millions of dollars. Now, Adam is running again, and a brand-new poll shows Adam LEADING Boebert: 50% to 48%. Lauren Boebert and her Washington allies are already attacking Adam and trying to smear him with lies. name: Fair Fight
subject: Three anti-voter attacks we’ve faced this year in Georgia, and how we responded
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
In 2023, Georgia Republicans have been busy attacking our freedom to vote. So we’ve also been busy working to stop them. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71356032/431839843/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231010_f_democracythreats_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmJkNGNiYS1iNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ig0SC8M4-034u5YQrs-5T7q8byxb4ROipJv_5dRZD5o=&emci=1bbd4cba-b467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1fbd4cba-b467-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | In 2023, Georgia Republicans have been busy attacking our freedom to vote. So we’ve also been busy working to stop them:
1. When Georgia Republicans announced their plan to remove nearly 190,000 Georgians from the rolls in August, **we called and texted 49,266 impacted voters — connecting them with tools to maintain their registrations ahead of critical upcoming elections in Georgia.**
2. When Gov. Brian Kemp signed seven laws aimed at removing lawfully appointed Black and Democrat members from county Boards of Elections (BOEs) in May, **we deployed our Democracy Watch volunteers to push back against extremists’ anti-voter agenda in BOE meetings and help ensure the appointment of the first Black female chair in Fulton County.**
3. When Georgia Republicans attempted to pass harmful anti-voter bills during the legislative session this Spring, including attempts to eliminate ballot dropboxes and make it easier to throw out mail-in ballots, **we mobilized pro-voter activists to contact their representatives urging them to vote “no” and ultimately helped defeat 7 of these bills.**

Whether you’ve spoken out or chipped in to fuel our work to combat anti-voter extremism, or you’re new to the Fair Fight team, thank you for everything you’ve done to make these actions possible. And it’s no coincidence that Georgia Republicans are making every effort to restrict our freedom to vote in 2023 — because they see this as an opportunity to weaken our democracy for the upcoming pivotal election in 2024. [**To ensure that Fair Fight can continue to combat extremists’ anti-voter schemes with the full force of this pro-voter movement — just as we have throughout 2023 — will you make a contribution right away?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71356033/431839844/1686671392?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231010_f_democracythreats_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmJkNGNiYS1iNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ig0SC8M4-034u5YQrs-5T7q8byxb4ROipJv_5dRZD5o=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71356034/431839845/1686671392?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231010_f_democracythreats_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmJkNGNiYS1iNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ig0SC8M4-034u5YQrs-5T7q8byxb4ROipJv_5dRZD5o=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71356035/431839846/1686671392?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231010_f_democracythreats_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmJkNGNiYS1iNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ig0SC8M4-034u5YQrs-5T7q8byxb4ROipJv_5dRZD5o=)

clean_body: In 2023, Georgia Republicans have been busy attacking our freedom to vote. So we’ve also been busy working to stop them. | | | In 2023, Georgia Republicans have been busy attacking our freedom to vote. So we’ve also been busy working to stop them: 1. When Georgia Republicans announced their plan to remove nearly 190,000 Georgians from the rolls in August, we called and texted 49,266 impacted voters — connecting them with tools to maintain their registrations ahead of critical upcoming elections in Georgia. 2. When Gov. Brian Kemp signed seven laws aimed at removing lawfully appointed Black and Democrat members from county Boards of Elections (BOEs) in May, we deployed our Democracy Watch volunteers to push back against extremists’ anti-voter agenda in BOE meetings and help ensure the appointment of the first Black female chair in Fulton County. 3. When Georgia Republicans attempted to pass harmful anti-voter bills during the legislative session this Spring, including attempts to eliminate ballot dropboxes and make it easier to throw out mail-in ballots, we mobilized pro-voter activists to contact their representatives urging them to vote “no” and ultimately helped defeat 7 of these bills. Whether you’ve spoken out or chipped in to fuel our work to combat anti-voter extremism, or you’re new to the Fair Fight team, thank you for everything you’ve done to make these actions possible. And it’s no coincidence that Georgia Republicans are making every effort to restrict our freedom to vote in 2023 — because they see this as an opportunity to weaken our democracy for the upcoming pivotal election in 2024. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for all your support, The Fair Fight Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. subject: re: Trump’s latest ATTACK on Jack Smith!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
please don’t let us down!
| **🚨 BREAKING 🚨
Trump Escalates Attacks on Special Counsel Jack Smith** Donald Trump has been threatening and attacking Special Counsel Jack Smith for indicting him for his crimes — even calling Smith _“deranged!”_

**We _refuse_ to sit by while Trump spouts his nonsense, so we’re sending Jack Smith a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Jack Smith now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54686?t=6&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54686?t=7&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4)
---
TO: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_Thank you for all your hard work defending our democracy!_**

After Trump tried to OVERTURN President Biden’s victory and incited the deadly January 6th insurrection, we feared he would NEVER be held accountable.

Thanks to you, we’re one step closer to finally booting Trump out of politics for good. **_IT’S ABOUT TIME!_**

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for indicting Donald Trump for his treasonous crimes! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54686?t=8&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54686?t=9&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11097%2E878179%2EOS7Eu4)

From North Carolina to New York, Black women leaders like Letitia James are leading the charge to call out far-right corruption and bring Donald Trump to justice.

This is one of THE most important jobs in the country right now — but for her bravery, AG James is facing VICIOUS smears and __attacks steeped in racism and misogyny_._

[Letitia James is not backing down — but she needs to know we’re with her at this PIVOTAL moment. name: Greg Casar
subject: This is exactly the kind of leadership South Texas needs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am proud to stand by Michelle
Hey Peter,
I want to share a bit about my good friend, Michelle Vallejo, who is fighting to represent TX-15 — the most competitive district in the state — in Congress.
Michelle comes from a big family of immigrants, farm workers and entrepreneurs. She is hard-working and community-oriented, and I know that these qualities are exactly what we need to take back the U.S. House and flip Texas blue.
Michelle is committed to fighting for a better future for ALL of us — including you, Peter — because she sees every day how hard everyday Texans are working just to scrape by.
[**I'm proud to stand by Michelle in her race to represent South Texas in Congress, but she needs all the help she can get. We’re at a critical moment for the future of Texas. In South Texas, Monica De La Cruz makes a lot of promises — but meanwhile in Congress, she supports devastating cuts, from slashing veterans’ health care to taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security.
On top of that, Monica De La Cruz supports a total, nationwide ban on abortion care – taking away Texans’ right to choose what to do with their own bodies.
**There has never been a more crucial time to flip Texas Blue and take back the U.S. House — and that work begins in TX-15. Texans everywhere need an advocate who will stand up for working people, reproductive rights, and fight for a better future for all of us.**
I know that Michelle Vallejo is undoubtedly the best person for the job. If we want to regain our majority in the House and turn Texas blue, Michelle is exactly the person we need to get behind.
[**I look forward to working with Michelle in Congress to build a better future for the people of Texas. Will you step up now by making a split donation of whatever you can afford between my campaign and Michelle’s campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71358452/431840992/1638619281?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2U0NWU2YS1iNjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOzeTjcejWW2R3ggZhDsYxATvYPWd1DXWzwHcfQbxeo=#)

clean_body: I am proud to stand by Michelle Hey Peter, I want to share a bit about my good friend, Michelle Vallejo, who is fighting to represent TX-15 — the most competitive district in the state — in Congress. Michelle comes from a big family of immigrants, farm workers and entrepreneurs. She is hard-working and community-oriented, and I know that these qualities are exactly what we need to take back the U.S. House and flip Texas blue. Michelle is committed to fighting for a better future for ALL of us — including you, Peter — because she sees every day how hard everyday Texans are working just to scrape by. =# =# **=# We’re at a critical moment for the future of Texas. In South Texas, Monica De La Cruz makes a lot of promises — but meanwhile in Congress, she supports devastating cuts, from slashing veterans’ health care to taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security. On top of that, Monica De La Cruz supports a total, nationwide ban on abortion care – taking away Texans’ right to choose what to do with their own bodies. There has never been a more crucial time to flip Texas Blue and take back the U.S. House — and that work begins in TX-15. Texans everywhere need an advocate who will stand up for working people, reproductive rights, and fight for a better future for all of us. I know that Michelle Vallejo is undoubtedly the best person for the job. If we want to regain our majority in the House and turn Texas blue, Michelle is exactly the person we need to get behind. =# Thank you for joining me in the fight to protect South Texas from extremism, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=#** | ****** ---|---

clean_body: If we want to win this race, we need YOU, Peter. | | | Peter, we’ll get straight to the point. Is there anything we can say to convince you to make your first donation to keep Joe and Kamala in the White House as we approach the six-month anniversary of the launch of our reelection campaign? What if we told you that our extreme MAGA opponents are threatening to take away the rights we’ve worked so hard to secure? What if we told you that our fundraising goals are not arbitrary? In fact, they help us determine when we can air ads across the country, scale up our organizing efforts, and more. So we have to ask: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Your donation -- $5, $10, $25, whatever you can afford -- is incredibly important to this campaign. Because when thousands of donors like you pitch in, that number adds up and allows us to secure the resources we need to reach as many voters as possible ahead of 2024. Thank you in advance for taking the time to donate. You’re incredibly important to this team, Peter. \-- Team Biden-Harris

name: Ron Johnson
subject: This could be the end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats are just demolishing us. We can fix the problem, but we need you involved, now. | Peter - I’m baffled.

Democrats are outraising us 3-1 every single month.

I don’t know how they do it, or why we struggle so hard to compete.

What I do know is that it’s a problem that must be rectified sooner rather than later.

Now that summer is over and things are quieting down, it’s my sincere hope that things start to turn around for us. Because if they don’t, we’re in for a world of hurt.

With just 14 months to go until the critical 2024 election, we need your assistance now more than ever. Flipping the Senate is my number one goal – but it’s going to be expensive. I know what it’s like to run in a contested race with an opponent raising millions each month.

I don’t want our 2024 candidates to have to go through what I did – scraping the bottom of the barrel for donations. [**That’s why I’m asking for you to chip in $1 dollar today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d0c76cb8fd32430999d6d6a4e9155f39&_e=g75Gh_FDbaU6FtK82ujD9fTVvwqX9lcDG5BJ4IFD0EwiWTWkYfWktQVKX8d6TBFi__2-p_lNR4acJby_xY64JjWcnu5uYqY46c9l7NZSuFTebkGCvbOLnUZ9mqLaz7Y1ZUaGUyLLeU87SWi2G38GZIcThyML4nBRz50ipOjbXDpZ5m0RpjMd08MjGeW29yYkQ2A-2zNV0jTetz_FPAHSZzIx0nf4Kg0pfFQx5YMAtIFF7wPIiQzBsntIutKsZp2XPYi2G4lCCiupMJlCBNdNRfeYfWCfazOmXgYqGZ9ggBkhPdcrwACqgvC028x2OERHs-Z9aWPt-xa0aqpFxfjt_AXSMXLhwUQ0jP3rh_bfs88gt9IfEVn40968RRvmcFD_iyqndBFVNP0aSDlJ9k4iNwALdAd-N33uwEm8-mr7FiEkSetii42x53QPZk57Xxom)

| | Peter, Glenn Youngkin and his careless administration have removed an **unknown** number of people from the Virginia voter rolls. Some Virginians were mistakenly classified as felons in the voter roll which effectively denied them the right to vote. At this time The Youngkin Administration has made no effort to meaningfully correct this error. **It is important that ALL Virginians check their voter registration status before casting their vote. ** Early in-person voting has started and vote-by-mail ballots have been sent out. You can check your registration status [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71359284/431842726/-1497054117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTI1M2E1ZC1iODY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s-d00_UZhz6mqxPneHh8dJ7OaP-1CSPdAPBHjho5RvA=&emci=53408a7f-a367-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=59253a5d-b867-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6782597).

name: Andy Beshear For Governor

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We're just days away from Andy and his opponent, Daniel Cameron, facing off in their first-ever debate! Exciting news, Peter: We're just days away from Andy and his opponent, Daniel Cameron, facing off in their first-ever debate!

This is a huge moment for our campaign. It marks one of the first times that Kentuckians will get to hear firsthand about their plans for Kentucky's future.

We know Andy will focus on the record-breaking progress we've made and his plans to continue fighting for the issues that matter most to Kentuckians. We can expect Daniel Cameron, on the other hand, to say anything to try and deceive Kentuckians.

**We want to show Andy we have his back before he takes the debate stage. That's why we set a goal to get 10,000 new grassroots contributions before Thursday's debate to send a message that Kentuckians are on Andy's side.[Can we count on you to chip in to Andy's' re-election campaign to help us reach our pre-debate goal? It would mean the world to Andy to know he has your support before he faces Cameron on
