clean_body: We're just days away from Andy and his opponent, Daniel Cameron, facing off in their first-ever debate! Exciting news, Peter: We're just days away from Andy and his opponent, Daniel Cameron, facing off in their first-ever debate! This is a huge moment for our campaign. It marks one of the first times that Kentuckians will get to hear firsthand about their plans for Kentucky's future. We know Andy will focus on the record-breaking progress we've made and his plans to continue fighting for the issues that matter most to Kentuckians. We can expect Daniel Cameron, on the other hand, to say anything to try and deceive Kentuckians. We want to show Andy we have his back before he takes the debate stage. That's why we set a goal to get 10,000 new grassroots contributions before Thursday's debate to send a message that Kentuckians are on Andy's side.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, Team Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

name: Michael Bennet
subject: New attacks against my bipartisan bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101023_Americas_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101023_Americas_act]
Team,
I’ll work with anyone in Congress to address the issues that matter most to Americans because I believe in compromises that lead to progress.
That’s why I joined Bill Cassidy, the Republican Senator from Louisiana, to work on the Americas Trade and Investment Act. As China’s influence in Latin America and the Caribbean continues to grow, this bill will strengthen our ties with democratic countries in the Western Hemisphere and grow our economies together. Most of all, it will bring jobs back to the United States.
This bill is a win for America. But Donald Trump is attacking it on social media.
Trump’s fear-mongering and partisan games are nothing new. But, last week, he went out of his way to attack our bill that will bring jobs back to America. He would rather make up lies than make progress for the American people.
Friend, as Trump continues to attack this common-sense bill, we need your help more than ever to show the great public support behind it.
Will you become a citizen co-sponsor of the Americas Act now? Every signature helps prove that Trump’s baseless attacks aren’t working, and helps us bring back jobs to the United States. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101023_americas_act]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101023_americas_act]

Thank you. Let’s keep making progress for the American people.
Michael

body:
Sheriff Richard Mack Stands with Us! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c52678790952/major-endorsement-alert?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=7f0435bdbb&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Peter:
---
| | I hope this message finds you well. Today, I am thrilled to share some exciting news that has invigorated our campaign and further solidified our commitment to the conservative values we hold dear.

Sheriff Richard Mack, a true constitutional champion and the founder of the Constitutional Sheriffs and Peace Officers Association, has officially endorsed our campaign! As you may know, Sheriff Mack was a plaintiff in the landmark Supreme Court case, Printz v. United States, standing up for states' rights and the Tenth Amendment. His unwavering dedication to upholding the Constitution is truly commendable.
---
| [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=0ed6ac6184&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| This endorsement is not just a testament to our campaign's momentum but also a clear indication that our message is resonating with staunch defenders of the Constitution.

But friends, while endorsements like these give us a significant boost, we need more than just words to win this race. [**We need resources**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=250a036eca&e=54a81bd33c). Our opponents are already gearing up, and we must be prepared to counter every move they make.

Can I count on you to make a special contribution today in honor of this major endorsement? Whether it's [$5, $50, or $500](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=bed06119fe&e=54a81bd33c), every dollar will go directly towards amplifying our message and ensuring that the values Sheriff Mack and so many others believe in are represented in Congress.

Together, with your support and the backing of principled conservatives like Sheriff Mack, we can and will bring real, conservative change to Nevada's 3rd Congressional District.

Thank you for being a part of this journey. Let's keep the momentum going!
---

name: TNDP
subject: Marsha, Taylor, and Peter
body:
In the words of Taylor Swift, let’s say this to Marsha Blackburn: We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71359706/431843783/-1940790846?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20231010_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDM3ZDNlZC1iODY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBwq6iJSFbWtSmEyhq143q3ULWUir8bNVwYhTPAEJUk=)
---
Peter — In 2018, pop sensation and Tennessee based-singer Taylor Swift posted the following to her millions of Instagram followers: | _Running for Senate in the state of Tennessee is a woman named Marsha Blackburn. As much as I have in the past and would like to continue voting for women in office, I cannot support Marsha Blackburn. Her voting record in Congress appalls and terrifies me. She voted against equal pay for women. She voted against the Reauthorization of the Violence Against Women Act, which attempts to protect women from domestic violence, stalking, and date rape. She believes businesses have a right to refuse service to gay couples. She also believes they should not have the right to marry. These are not MY Tennessee values._
* * *

clean_body: In the words of Taylor Swift, let’s say this to Marsha Blackburn: We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together. | = Peter — In 2018, pop sensation and Tennessee based-singer Taylor Swift posted the following to her millions of Instagram followers: | Running for Senate in the state of Tennessee is a woman named Marsha Blackburn. As much as I have in the past and would like to continue voting for women in office, I cannot support Marsha Blackburn. Her voting record in Congress appalls and terrifies me. She voted against equal pay for women. She voted against the Reauthorization of the Violence Against Women Act, which attempts to protect women from domestic violence, stalking, and date rape. She believes businesses have a right to refuse service to gay couples. She also believes they should not have the right to marry. These are not MY Tennessee values. = Just as we’ve been saying — Marsha Blackburn does NOT represent Tennessee values. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = For the past several years, Marsha Blackburn has been a disgrace to Tennessee. Why Chris Christie:
---
---
Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: A'shanti Gholar, Emerge
subject: Peter, Democratic women can do the impossible.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71359764/431844129/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1307-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4MDYzMDExLWI5NjctZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EE1112Vh2iW8Fxu_vb3yDy1tYTk4LXIAAKKWOGhhoHI=)
---
Peter, Democratic women can do the impossible.
Since I became a part of Emerge in 2006, I’ve seen women step up to run for office and succeed when polls and pundits said they didn’t have what it takes. **From building new Democratic trifectas to achieving the FIRST majority-women legislature in the nation (in my home state of Nevada), Emerge women are making history and reshaping politics as we know it.** And we’re just getting started.
Right now, it’s no exaggeration to say the strength of our democracy is fading. But Emerge continues to rise to the occasion by recruiting, training, and empowering Democratic women to run, win, and fight for our essential rights and our communities. And with a stellar **71 percent win rate in 2022 alone** , alums of our political training programs are making an impact at every level of office in 45 states and U.S. territories. **That’s not a fluke, Peter – it’s a movement.**
**That’s why I’m so hopeful about what we can accomplish in 2024 and beyond.** Because every year (for the past 20 years), Emerge is building a bench of bold Democratic women with the skills and support they need to win up and down the ballot, push back against the broken GOP’s agenda, and achieve a democracy that works for all our communities.
With **over 1,200 Emerge women in office right now and over 175 more on the November ballot** , our ranks of trailblazers, fierce fighters, and committed community advocates are growing state by state. But our movement needs you, Peter. Your support is what powers our work to transform politics and ensures that Emerge can be there for every woman daring to speak out and claim a seat at the table.
**[So if you’re ready to see more bold Democratic women in office and achieve a truly inclusive democracy for the FIRST time, please show your support with a donation to Emerge today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71359766/431844133/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1307-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4MDYzMDExLWI5NjctZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EE1112Vh2iW8Fxu_vb3yDy1tYTk4LXIAAKKWOGhhoHI=) Every contribution helps expand our programs to help women run for office, win critical races, and deliver for all our communities. **
Thank you for being a part of our women-led movement,
A’shanti Gholar
President, Emerge
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ZShko813aE2PbaayjFt-qw2?unsubscribedata=12LAUshLaYFqImcOldpyw5MaBZBalcqRCf3xu7pbI6nEz4sI0PXTCMAuGzi2Q1q37j8LZB%2B0J1SL0SPJyTzIazPJeXgW%2FxF6wKgMs7JTPoD3isnOky7P8ipJY%2Bl8StKI6VWUOUGkzn6qy8BmJxkpgB5RIFYPI%2F54rN%2ByUefkOv3k9VHug3xMJ0Etyq%2BRfx3tc5Bfgn20JJY%2BA7s7cjH1v0iLzb5Q03cmE7BAnoM%2BVc2NBzy8G5zEHXWnO9M42hPC2lhoadjV14R2ZJE1ag9OxPIlSVlr8V9fDHqds5BkHKfnLmLybXL4dx%2FFATlXfsE6YnQ1NJfQAqXVwpi8TpmtHq8rhgLm%2BYgbcHPZEE5QscCCMsUMUF6JzwScMjGOB%2FJOxYmw%2BcHKlP9yU0VOMcs6hzRqLTfpwhhAuXQ0WwW8JA8%3D) off all our lists instantly. body:

#

$1, Peter.
That's the contribution Ruben Gallego is asking you to make before Kari Lake officially kicks off her campaign for Senate in just a few hours.
Yes, just $1.
$1 because we cannot let Kari Lake become a United States Senator.
$1 because she will launch with the support of the entire MAGA-right, including Donald Trump.
$1 because this is how we fund our campaign — and it all adds up FAST when lots of people are chipping-in.

clean_body: From book bans to budget cuts, extremists like Beth Van Duyne are hellbent on attacking schools. Now more than ever, we need leaders in Congress who will advocate for our students, teachers, and public schools. = | = From book bans to budget cuts, extremists like Beth Van Duyne are hellbent on attacking schools. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: As we all watch the unfolding events in Palestine and Israel with grief, we want to start by sending our most heartfelt condolences to the families, friends, and loved ones of the Israeli and Palestinian people who have been murdered, attacked, and injured this weekend.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As we all watch the unfolding events in Palestine and Israel with grief,
we want to start by sending our most heartfelt condolences to the
families, friends, and loved ones of the Israeli and Palestinian people
who have been murdered, attacked, and injured this weekend. Over 1,600
people in Israel and at least 765 people in Gaza have been killed by this
violence — an overwhelming amount being innocent civilians.

Now is the time for our leaders in Congress to be clear-eyed about our
moral values and belief in the equal application of human rights laws to
all Palestinians and Israelis suffering right now. No civilian’s life is
more precious than another’s and our shared goal should be towards a path
of peace and liberation for all people there.

This did not just begin this weekend — it is a direct result of decades of
Israeli military apartheid rule that has occupied the West Bank and turned
Gaza into an open-air prison where Palestinians rarely have access to
clean water, food, or electricity as a result of the Israeli military’s
air, sea, and land blockades. Since the ascension of Israel’s most extreme
right-wing government over the last year, the atrocities against the
Palestinians, expansion of illegal settlements and settler violence, and
calls from Israeli government officials for genocide have been
overwhelming — yet met with silence from countries like ours.

The United States’ complicity in the Israeli government and military’s
decades of human rights abuses and international law violations cannot be
understated. As long as we continue sending blank checks to the Israeli
military, without any conditions, we are greenlighting the ethnic
cleansing of the Palestinian people. We are proud of the courageous
leaders we have sent to Congress who remain unflinching in their
dedication to peace and justice in the region, and are unwavering in their
calls to hold the fascist right-wing government of Israel accountable for
their continued occupation and apartheid.

As the White House and Congress have already begun warning us of their
intention to escalate this militarily with further funding for the Israeli
military, we call on all progressive leaders to denounce knee-jerk
militarism that will only lead to more civilian deaths and greenlight the
extremist Israeli government’s desire to collectively punish all
Palestinians for the actions of Hamas and turn Gaza into a “deserted
island.”

We know that a path towards peace does not begin with funding further
military violence and the occupation that triggered these tragedies. We
urge a de-escalation and an end to the Israeli military occupation of
Palestine that provoked these attacks.

Now is the time to remember the lessons of the failed wars in Iraq and
Afghanistan and call for diplomatic action and an end to US-funded
military violence — for the sake of all Palestinians and Israelis.

In this together,

Justice Democrats

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, As we all watch the unfolding events in Palestine and Israel with grief, we want to start by sending our most heartfelt condolences to the families, friends, and loved ones of the Israeli and Palestinian people who have been murdered, attacked, and injured this weekend. Over 1,600 people in Israel and at least 765 people in Gaza have been killed by this violence — an overwhelming amount being innocent civilians. Now is the time for our leaders in Congress to be clear-eyed about our moral values and belief in the equal application of human rights laws to all Palestinians and Israelis suffering right now. No civilian’s life is more precious than another’s and our shared goal should be towards a path of peace and liberation for all people there. This did not just begin this weekend — it is a direct result of decades of Israeli military apartheid rule that has occupied the West Bank and turned Gaza into an open-air prison where Palestinians rarely have access to clean water, food, or electricity as a result of the Israeli military’s air, sea, and land blockades. Since the ascension of Israel’s most extreme right-wing government over the last year, the atrocities against the Palestinians, expansion of illegal settlements and settler violence, and calls from Israeli government officials for genocide have been overwhelming — yet met with silence from countries like ours. The United States’ complicity in the Israeli government and military’s decades of human rights abuses and international law violations cannot be understated. As long as we continue sending blank checks to the Israeli military, without any conditions, we are greenlighting the ethnic cleansing of the Palestinian people. We are proud of the courageous leaders we have sent to Congress who remain unflinching in their dedication to peace and justice in the region, and are unwavering in their calls to hold the fascist right-wing government of Israel accountable for their continued occupation and apartheid. As the White House and Congress have already begun warning us of their intention to escalate this militarily with further funding for the Israeli military, we call on all progressive leaders to denounce knee-jerk militarism that will only lead to more civilian deaths and greenlight the extremist Israeli government’s desire to collectively punish all Palestinians for the actions of Hamas and turn Gaza into a “deserted island.” We know that a path towards peace does not begin with funding further military violence and the occupation that triggered these tragedies. We urge a de-escalation and an end to the Israeli military occupation of Palestine that provoked these attacks. Now is the time to remember the lessons of the failed wars in Iraq and Afghanistan and call for diplomatic action and an end to US-funded military violence — for the sake of all Palestinians and Israelis. In this together, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

body:
Well Peter,

Halloween’s only a few weeks away, and just like a scary movie villain, Kari Lake just keeps coming back. If there’s one thing we know how to do, it’s defeat movie monsters like Kari Lake and MAGA Republicans who come up with ghoulish policies – but we won’t make it to the end of this spooky sequel without your help. Can you pitch in $10.31 today to help?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_101023_karilake&amount=10.31]

Here’s the good news: we’ve seen this movie before. We know how to beat Kari Lake because Raquel helped out-organize her last time.

And we know that Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District is going to be instrumental in beating her again. Making sure our community shows up and votes is how we will beat Kari Lake once again, win Arizona for President Biden, and make sure we all wake up from this MAGA nightmare.

And Raquel Terán is the best candidate to make sure that happens. Between Raquel’s nearly 20 years of organizing experience and our opportunity to make history by electing Arizona’s first Latina to Congress, we know that our campaign will get out the vote.

But it takes money to hire staff, train volunteers, and get out the vote. Can you chip in $10.31 now to make sure we have the funds? But it takes money to hire staff, train volunteers, and get out the vote. Can you chip in $10.31 now to make sure we have the funds?

Now, we must ensure that we flip the Senate in 2024. We must remain vigilant in defending our conservative values and stopping the Radical Left’s failed policies. With your help, we have what it takes to stop the Democrats’ woke ideology. | Radical Leftists have been pushing their agenda for far too long, and it’s time to put America back on the right track. We need your help to do this. Your support is essential in this fight. We must remain united and continue to defend our values. Anyone who watched the first two debates saw how the Establishment came for me.

I will not back down from shouting TRUTH regarding our plan to revive American excellence. I will not back down from the revolution we need to enact to course correct the path Joe Biden and Democrats have put us on.

Fellow American, I can't do this alone. I am counting on people like you who are sick and tired of Washington to join me in this movement.

**[Please chip in $6- _the polling increase we saw since the debate_ - in the next 15 minutes to help us build to next November.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3f7f4fbd867f4144be1d89ac84470cb9&_e=fw2PzUFzvjwtImaq5ooPDQXh5ufhjQKcY3nHc41yQ1cj_lxSrQoahUWNibQhw6w8GMId3n7Ook5DSwwFwKlV7au7TyqMr0VBixRJF3ozJ3673Z0bpKQEc2cgkI7inh4wsrRB6ksjazrtmuxeXbC2Mr5gonoZOFCr4gCpj0DjqQUnKypFsnZNg5sjuT-v9Q1XJcAgyieq_D5QKYQeZEJGSvRfQks46buENr2dfmvEj2FgKFPIpsq7opm_zH7KDd_uH7Y1h4ifT2ic0sZQZWrCSDNpQYsbSHWTxL7zaHZFD7vQtPAz0PJ62Cpz9g9gJXDdecbcEorWfU0OKIGsYP0-1_NSMsCsFI5VdGe5I_88IaHqCL6HZqR8irJ8tYutiXSuGgbwIOdldpoO1Fbvn6ZApkDTxOkzITgZt3VkMT7Bi9U0XC0JWTLpiQc8RjhlkyZ8qEuSp_HPP1JvfwKO2WwftQ%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Democrats DOMINATE on facts, but not the narrative. Time for OFFENSE.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
47 million out of 49 million jobs created since Ronald Reagan left office created by Democrats.

13.9 million jobs created during the Biden administration. That’s almost 7x more than the last three Republican presidents combined.
47 million out of 49 million jobs created since Ronald Reagan left office were created by Democrats.
Democrats vs. Republicans on jobs? It's not even an interesting debate.
The only thing interesting is the thing the last three Republican presidents have in common: recessions.
Democrats DOMINATE on the facts, but not the narrative. We’ve gotta change that. Please watch this:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2941?t=1&akid=1609%2E4767699%2EGnzpmn)
Offense.
Offense.
Offense.
That's what we are doing with the Campaign for Democracy.

name: Sarah Lane Pierle
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss The Nation’s article on Jane and her work with the PAC last week.

| Hi, it’s Sarah with JanePAC. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss The Nation’s article on Jane and her work with the PAC last week.

It’s hard for me to say what my _favorite part_ is, but I wanted to highlight this part:

**“...[These candidates] don’t get a lot of volunteers or media coverage. But we come along, and __we can triple [the money] they’re raising__ and bring in the media and get volunteers and __really make a difference.__ ”**

I wanted to highlight this part for you because it was a good reminder for me about what we’re all here for - _to make an impact in as many elections as possible._

**With your support, everyone on our team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is hard at work to support the most crucial climate races across the country.[_Will you contribute $10 today to help us keep up our strong momentum and elect climate champions at every level of government?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71360491/431846857/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231010-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhOWZmMDk1LWJjNjctZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kb-c1wLtjPRxz4Z_yUNLeFrAp19yvl0ai_t5S7VHKv8=)**

Jane Fonda here. Today, The Nation reported on an important conversation I had during Climate Week about my work with the PAC. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it and to share some thoughts with you.

I’ve dedicated the rest of my life to this crucial movement, and I couldn’t be happier to count you as an ally in this work. As we rally our people-power to take to the streets and vote out fossil fuel allies, I find myself becoming more hopeful with each passing week. And thanks to your ongoing support of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, _**I’m having a ball electing climate champions up and down the ballot across the country.**_

For far too long, the fossil fuel industry has maintained a stranglehold on our political system, and during the 2020 election, they poured in more than $139 million to keep their political allies in offices, setting back key climate progress, and hampering key legislation on climate at every level of government.

**That’s why the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to electing leaders who are not beholden to the influence of Big Oil and other corporate polluters.** It won’t happen overnight, but I know that together we can grow to be a $100 million PAC and continue to elect federal and state legislators, city councilors, county commissioners, mayors, and more who are willing to fight for a livable future for all of us.

[_**Will you contribute $10 today to join our movement to keep up our strong momentum and elect even more climate champions?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71360506/431846873/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231010-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhOWZmMDk1LWJjNjctZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kb-c1wLtjPRxz4Z_yUNLeFrAp19yvl0ai_t5S7VHKv8=)

clean_body: I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss The Nation’s article on Jane and her work with the PAC last week. | Hi, it’s Sarah with JanePAC. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss The Nation’s article on Jane and her work with the PAC last week. It’s hard for me to say what my favorite part is, but I wanted to highlight this part: “...[These candidates] don’t get a lot of volunteers or media coverage. But we come along, and we can triple [the money] they’re raising and bring in the media and get volunteers and really make a difference. ” I wanted to highlight this part for you because it was a good reminder for me about what we’re all here for - to make an impact in as many elections as possible. With your support, everyone on our team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is hard at work to support the most crucial climate races across the country.= | = Read the rest of Jane’s message here: = = | = Jane Fonda here. Today, The Nation reported on an important conversation I had during Climate Week about my work with the PAC. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it and to share some thoughts with you. I’ve dedicated the rest of my life to this crucial movement, and I couldn’t be happier to count you as an ally in this work. As we rally our people-power to take to the streets and vote out fossil fuel allies, I find myself becoming more hopeful with each passing week. And thanks to your ongoing support of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, I’m having a ball electing climate champions up and down the ballot across the country. For far too long, the fossil fuel industry has maintained a stranglehold on our political system, and during the 2020 election, they poured in more than $139 million to keep their political allies in offices, setting back key climate progress, and hampering key legislation on climate at every level of government. That’s why the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to electing leaders who are not beholden to the influence of Big Oil and other corporate polluters. It won’t happen overnight, but I know that together we can grow to be a $100 million PAC and continue to elect federal and state legislators, city councilors, county commissioners, mayors, and more who are willing to fight for a livable future for all of us. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell together, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. clean_body: Target on our backs | | | | | Did you see this, friend? The National Journal just named NJ-07 as one of the Last cycle, New Jersey’s seventh district was 1 of JUST 5 districts that decided the balance of power in our nation’s capital, and dealt a striking blow to the national Democrats as one of their most loyal foot soldiers was booted from office. But it all restarts NOW. We MUST HOLD THE LINE to keep the Majority in 2024! The Extreme Dems will stop at absolutely nothing to flip NJ-07 back to blue—but we won’t let that happen. More Dark-money groups, out of state resources, and attention from across the nation are now knocking at our door. We cannot delay—the fight has begun. We need to be ready. Not tomorrow. Not next week. Today. Thank you & together, let’s HOLD the House! —Team Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. We support Democrats in the biggest battlegrounds like Pennsylvania, Nevada, and Arizona, but we can’t do it alone. = | = | = 2024 won’t be an easy fight, which is why it’s so crucial for us to build a strong foundation now. Republicans spent millions across the country during last year’s midterm elections, so we must prepare for whatever comes our way. = | = | = – Fight for Progress * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. | Dear Patriot, The world is falling apart. When I was in office, America had strong leadership, and a strong America is critical for our world. Now, not only is our great nation in decline, but the world needs American leadership more than ever. Our leaders are weak and our nation is lost without my guidance. Remember when we had peace, a strong border, and a GREAT economy? I do!

name: Murray, Patty
subject: My journey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I never thought I'd become a politician
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71360943/431848379/254407035?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk152-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDdiYmM1YS1iZjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvnqv4sNs6AP_j-Ko_CS4bw6NzelMWS95sYNSUYGYDQ=)
---
Hey, Peter – it's Patty. I'd like to tell you a little bit more about my journey to becoming one of the highest-ranking female Senators. It's a longer email, but I hope you'll take the time.
The truth is, I never thought I'd become a politician. Back in the 80s, I was a working mom and had enough on my plate as it was! That changed when local officials wanted to cut my kids' preschool program. I wanted to save it, so I packed up my kids and drove more than one hundred miles to our state capitol. That's when a male legislator told me I couldn't make a difference because I was **"just a mom in tennis shoes."** Well, I laced up those tennis shoes and fought back!
I jumped into action, organizing a coalition of 13,000 parents, and we successfully saved the preschool program. **That's when I realized government can make a meaningful difference if elected officials understand the needs of working moms and their families.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71360944/431848380/254407035?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk152-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDdiYmM1YS1iZjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvnqv4sNs6AP_j-Ko_CS4bw6NzelMWS95sYNSUYGYDQ=)
_**A lot has changed since that legislator told me I'm "just a mom in tennis shoes," but one thing is the same: I'm still fighting for working families.**_
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71360945/431848381/254407035?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk152-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDdiYmM1YS1iZjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvnqv4sNs6AP_j-Ko_CS4bw6NzelMWS95sYNSUYGYDQ=)
---
After I helped save that preschool program, I served on the Shoreline School Board and was elected to the Washington State Senate in 1988. That's when I got another big push to run for higher office. **Watching how Anita Hill was treated during the Clarence Thomas hearings, I felt like no one in those hearings was representing my voice and asking the questions that I would have.**
So that year, I announced my campaign for the U.S. Senate and was elected alongside three other women. Back then it was such a huge step forward for women in politics that they called 1992 **"The Year of the Woman." **
During my time in the Senate, I've been able to make so much progress for working families – even in an increasingly divided government. I've learned that you can find common ground with just about anyone – if you start negotiations from a place where you are willing to listen to one another, you can get results. That's how I was able to negotiate a budget to save our country from economic disaster when no one thought we could, and make progress on everything from protections for pregnant workers, to passing a bipartisan mental health package.
**None of this work would be possible without you, and your neighbors and friends who have championed my campaigns over the years. I can't thank you enough for always having my back.**
**[If you would like to support my work today, please make a $5 donation now. It's the best way to help Democrats keep our Senate majority, take back the House, and continue fighting for everything from affordable child care to abortion access and voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71360946/431848382/254407035?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk152-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDdiYmM1YS1iZjY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvnqv4sNs6AP_j-Ko_CS4bw6NzelMWS95sYNSUYGYDQ=)**
Thanks for reading,

Patty Murray
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=q9EzBD3X2tuY9pQcpsmvdSjbhKZ%2FxeoR8H9jr6NkZLWDzckE4LuT5o4r%2BTOvZ6DZ7M2SYynKsCPb8GismGYNX2EUEfK%2FBGQ%2FMNyXL3va9KuFoY%2BGkuaD5Xr4WAf6FTslqNA1R01r7IczdS%2BtBJkHvVm42Lr%2FAgBKx1yrYv2r60PcxbtMkBMj0VP7%2BF3TfT1vKLTwR3VbTzAlbojpKo5TglCyrAfx3iAZtbUYUQJpiNnuzQGL85Wi%2BlFY9mKRgJfDEK6DX1vZ9gM9P0wANeNG7UzOFYNYRUh7Mglv%2F9Ptc1HOdSCsyMAXi%2BCA66GA0XnHQFkzjZd%2BoVWX%2FNJ6W%2Fdn1ER2IAUAhFXMV4JQws0eJEsKFR5SylrkB1gpMBW3jAVbixZ8aZ3Tmf7Uwh9ew112h%2FP32LpnvKguurMzfJOJX%2FT6JANl7fhvgWqciJH5DP5y) People for Patty Murray
PO BOX 3662
Seattle, WA 98124

If only those in power had any interest in the truth, perhaps we would have a fighting chance. If you enjoyed this article, please LOOMER UNLEASHED, where I will continue to piss off the elitist political establishment by speaking the TRUTH. name: Wes Moore
subject: The chaos in Washington
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71361656/431850917/1666406465?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThjODE4Ni1jMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4PEj8MydBYooibzciofmmufHGqvfjVSmcbh-OIZSzCI=)
Friend, The chaos of what is happening at our nation’s capitol has me asking once again: **Who are House Republicans serving?** From extending the possibility of a government shutdown by only 45 days instead of passing a clean budget to ousting their House Speaker without a clear intention of choosing someone else fit for the job, these political games are harming all of us. Instead of putting the interests of the American people first, Republicans in Congress are playing tit-for-tat to force an extremist agenda most Americans oppose. This isn’t true leadership or service. True service is about putting the interests of the folks who elected us to best represent them in elected office first. It shouldn’t be about political power or games. The people of Maryland and across the nation deserve a functioning government. [**If you agree, please add your name to our petition calling on House Republicans to end the political games and keep the government open.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71361657/431850918/2077584827?source=em20231010-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThjODE4Ni1jMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4PEj8MydBYooibzciofmmufHGqvfjVSmcbh-OIZSzCI=&emci=a68c8186-c167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a98c8186-c167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485) | [Add your name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71361659/431850920/2077584827?source=em20231010-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThjODE4Ni1jMTY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4PEj8MydBYooibzciofmmufHGqvfjVSmcbh-OIZSzCI=&emci=a68c8186-c167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a98c8186-c167-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Beyond Fossil Fuels Town Hall with Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, you're invited!

On Tuesday, Oct. 17th, leading climate champions U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna will join Our Revolution’s LIVE Virtual Town Hall to organize for a world beyond fossil fuels, prevent backyard drilling in California, and fight for environmental justice for all.

Click here to RSVP for this special event! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231010_INV_leekhannatownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1011&akid=4770%2E5885482%2EFMvP-1)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231010_INV_leekhannatownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1012&akid=4770%2E5885482%2EFMvP-1

RSVP HERE! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231010_INV_leekhannatownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1013&akid=4770%2E5885482%2EFMvP-1)

We’ll also hear from Californians whose lives have been directly affected by fossil fuels, and activists working to fend off Big Oil’s attempt to overturn SB1137, which the state legislature passed to ensure all oil and gas drilling is set back at least 3,200 feet from homes, schools, hospitals, nursing homes and more.

We hope you’ll join us at this important LIVE town hall event, which kicks off at 7pm PT/10pm ET on Tuesday, Oct. 17th! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231010_INV_leekhannatownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1014&akid=4770%2E5885482%2EFMvP-1)

The clock is ticking on the climate crisis. Each of the past three years has been the hottest year on record, and fossil fuel production is having horrible impacts on people’s health in real time today.

We need to move beyond fossil fuels before we lose everything. Every day, we witness the terrible evidence of our government’s failure to mount a resistance to fossil fuel corporations. Changing this will take all of us.

RSVP today for Our Revolution’s Beyond Fossil Fuel Town Hall with Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, and climate activists around the country! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/OR_townhall_leekhanna_2310/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231010_INV_leekhannatownhall_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1015&akid=4770%2E5885482%2EFMvP-1)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Allred even used his position in the U.S. House of Representatives to help the organization receive $1 million in federal taxpayer money. This is wrong. _Peter, this does NOT represent the values of Texas Republicans, independents, and even the vast majority of Democrats in our state and our Nation. _ It’s WOKE INSANITY that borders on name: Supreme Court Update
subject: “This is a victory for all Americans”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

**Did you see the good news, team?** | **NPR:
“Supreme Court rejects Alabama's defiance in voting case”**
---
**First,** over the summer, the Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s congressional map for violating the Voting Rights Act and ordered lawmakers to draw a new map that fairly represented Black voters.

**Then,** despite these clear instructions, Alabama Republicans openly refused to comply with the Supreme Court’s ruling and instead submitted a second map that still violated the VRA.

**But the federal courts didn’t waver.** Instead, a federal district court again rejected Alabama’s latest discriminatory map, and ordered a special master to draw new, fair districts. Then, the Supreme Court denied Alabama Republicans’ subsequent request to skirt their responsibility to draw a fair map. And just this week, that same federal district court ordered the special master’s fair map to be used for the upcoming 2024 election.

**Now, this decision could have ramifications for fair maps across the country.** In fact, so many maps could be redrawn that, according to _FiveThirtyEight_ , “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.”
[**_The NDRC is fighting to end gerrymandering – and we won’t rest until we’ve secured fair maps in every state. Will you rush a donation now to support our work nationwide?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71362050/431852299/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231010_FR_10i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4YTU3N2Q1LWMyNjctZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P3oReaRDNHaJOyMZPCZMtocENzMSnFvSL3LDq_1Hidw=)

clean_body: | Did you see the good news, team? | NPR: “Supreme Court rejects Alabama's defiance in voting case” First, over the summer, the Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s congressional map for violating the Voting Rights Act and ordered lawmakers to draw a new map that fairly represented Black voters. Then, despite these clear instructions, Alabama Republicans openly refused to comply with the Supreme Court’s ruling and instead submitted a second map that still violated the VRA. But the federal courts didn’t waver. Instead, a federal district court again rejected Alabama’s latest discriminatory map, and ordered a special master to draw new, fair districts. Then, the Supreme Court denied Alabama Republicans’ subsequent request to skirt their responsibility to draw a fair map. And just this week, that same federal district court ordered the special master’s fair map to be used for the upcoming 2024 election. Now, this decision could have ramifications for fair maps across the country. In fact, so many maps could be redrawn that, according to FiveThirtyEight , “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.” = = Team, victories like this one wouldn’t be possible without supporters like you. But the truth is that our work is far from over. As many as 19 congressional districts across 11 different states could be reshaped ahead of the 2024 elections – more than enough to swing control of the House. Will you join the fight for fair maps with an urgent donation to the NDRC? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Sepi Shyne
subject: A huge win for workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Team,

The members of the Writers Guild of America ratified a new contract after nearly five months on strike.

This contract is proof that when we stand together, we can win real victories for working people. It includes better pay, stronger protections, and more security for writers. Plus, it sets a powerful example for workers across the country.

Even so, the fight for economic justice is never over. Over 150,000 members of SAG-AFTRA are still on strike, and in the Midwest, nearly as many autoworkers are striking. From coast to coast, working people are standing up and demanding living wages, good healthcare, and the ability to retire with dignity.

Friend, I was proud to support the WGA strike from the very beginning, and I stand in solidarity with workers everywhere. In the richest country in the world, we can afford to build a good life for everyone.

Thank you for being part of this movement, friend. I'm proud to be in this fight with you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231010_ss_labor_l1]

Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231010_ss_labor_b1]

With gratitude,

— Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=76b13f44-c367-ee11-9937-00224832eb73]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=76b13f44-c367-ee11-9937-00224832eb73]

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71362216/431852786/353820487?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231010_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzQ2MDdlMi1jNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryyg5EmM94Bm1dNuPCWOUKtcbqiHaRMN4jg3R4fEIAs=) Cheers, folks! This is Senator Jon Tester from Montana. I wanted to make sure I caught you up on where our campaign stands before you log off for the day — and maybe even grab a beer for yourself after a busy one! You all know how much I hate asking for money, but this is serious: **According to my team, we need a surge of donations to reach our October mid-month fundraising goal before next week’s deadline.** **[Before I get into why this deadline is so important, can I count on you to split a donation of just $5 — the price of a beer (a Montana beer, folks, not one of those $12 DC beers), to help us reach our fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71362217/431852787/353820487?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=5&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231010_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzQ2MDdlMi1jNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryyg5EmM94Bm1dNuPCWOUKtcbqiHaRMN4jg3R4fEIAs=)** | [SPLIT $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71362218/431852788/353820487?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=5&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231010_PM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzQ2MDdlMi1jNDY3LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryyg5EmM94Bm1dNuPCWOUKtcbqiHaRMN4jg3R4fEIAs=)

Our mid-month fundraising goal is critical to making sure we have the strongest fundraising numbers possible in our public FEC report we file at the end of each quarter.
Hitting this deadline also allows us to respond to incoming attacks from national Republicans and Mitch McConnell, who are determined to buy Montana’s Senate seat because they know that if they win in Montana, there’s almost no chance that Democrats hold the Senate majority.
The point is, we’re building a grassroots campaign that’s stronger than any of the Republicans' dark money groups. **But that takes resources, and if we want to get ahead, I need you to chip in so we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal.**
**[I’m counting on your help to set us up for success and ensure we have the resources to keep our momentum. Do you think you can split a donation between my campaign and Tina Smith’s? clean_body: We’re building a grassroots campaign that’s stronger than any of the Republicans' dark money groups. | = Cheers, folks! This is Senator Jon Tester from Montana. I wanted to make sure I caught you up on where our campaign stands before you log off for the day — and maybe even grab a beer for yourself after a busy one! You all know how much I hate asking for money, but this is serious: According to my team, we need a surge of donations to reach our October mid-month fundraising goal before next week’s deadline. = | = Our mid-month fundraising goal is critical to making sure we have the strongest fundraising numbers possible in our public FEC report we file at the end of each quarter. Hitting this deadline also allows us to respond to incoming attacks from national Republicans and Mitch McConnell, who are determined to buy Montana’s Senate seat because they know that if they win in Montana, there’s almost no chance that Democrats hold the Senate majority. The point is, we’re building a grassroots campaign that’s stronger than any of the Republicans' dark money groups. But that takes resources, and if we want to get ahead, I need you to chip in so we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks, folks. Enjoy your evening (and that beer if you’re feeling so inclined). Jon Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

[](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=40ff286fa8&e=8edd2b8f7d)
**URGENT/ URGENT/URGENT URGENT/ URGENT/URGENT**
**Re: Biden Must be Legally and Peacefully Removed Now Before a Worldwide Holocaust Results!**
Dear Fellow Patriot:
**Joe Biden must be legally removed as so-called president now!**
We have, just in the last few days, witnessed just how worthless, braindead and criminal he is! After Hamas’ attack on Israel, it took White House staff over 5 hours to even get him out of bed during a crisis.
The risk of leaving Biden in office has thus become even more evident and urgent with the massacre of thousands and counting including women and children by Hamas in Israel, which is the direct result of Biden’s appeasement of Iran, the mastermind behind this horrific Holocaust-like event, where even the heads of babies were chopped off by these less than human barbarians.
Having been bribed by Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, for which your Freedom Watch has convicted and sentenced Biden through a citizens grand jury and citizens court to 20 years in prison, as well as for his negligent homicide in Afghanistan, we have now called upon law enforcement to have him arrested! **To the contrary, the Republicans in Congress have just been playing political games, while appearing on Fox News to raise more money.**
[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=4d95de7cd4&e=8edd2b8f7d)
**As just one example, the Republicans just complain about our open border, which is allowing terrorists to run across now threatening our nation, particularly now that there is war in the Middle East. The risk to our citizens is now acute and dangerous!**
**THERE IS THE RISK OF ANOTHER 9/11 AND EVEN WORSE!**
Ask yourself this fellow patriot: why have the Republicans not impeached Biden or sought other means to get rid of him? They could, themselves, send the Capitol Police to arrest him for his crimes, as the right of citizens arrest exists in the District of Columbia when there is probable cause that a felony crime is being or has been committed.
But the Republicans want to leave him in office to have a weak, braindead and criminal moron to run against in 2024. Their own political interests trump We the People’s interests to a safe and secure country!
Biden has not just been bribed by Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, he has undoubtedly been bribed in one manner shape or form by Iran.
It is time to remove him legally and peacefully before this nation experiences what Israel has just experienced, but even worse!
[**Please donate to Freedom Watch with tax deductible contributions to support having Biden legally incarcerated and removed NOW before it is too late.**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=62079d3e12&e=8edd2b8f7d)
Please listen to the embedded podcast of today about removing Biden and provide your generous support and prayers that this braindead criminal will be peacefully and legally removed from power before the same fate that Israeli citizens have experienced happens to your loves ones by leaving this dishonest and corrupt bribed loser in power to rule over this nation and the world.
**If you care about your children, grandchildren and loved ones and do not want to see them suffer the same fate at what just happened in Israel, please step up to the plate and support your Freedom Watch, the People’s Justice Department!**
[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=d8e3f75f78&e=8edd2b8f7d) Yours in Freedom and Liberty, Larry Klayman, Esq.Chairman and General Counsel Freedom Watch, Inc.[www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=7f7069c309&e=8edd2b8f7d)[leklayman@gmail.com](mailto:leklayman@gmail.com) OR asher.andersonfw@gmail.com**P.S. TIME IS SHORT. PLEASE SUPPORT FREEDOM WATCH, INC.** [**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=f1fa60079a&e=8edd2b8f7d)

body:
We’re so proud of this, Peter.
#
Peter — this was our average online donation last quarter:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38535?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt)
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you in Missouri + all across the country, we’ve built a record-breaking people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley, elect Lucas Kunce, and take back this U.S. Senate seat for working Missourians.
Whether you responded to an email like this one, saw one of our Facebook ads, got one of our texts, or even just visited our website, this kind of small-dollar support plays a critical role in setting our entire campaign up for success — especially considering Lucas’ commitment to rejecting donations from corporate PACs and Big Oil + Big Pharma execs.
Lucas + our whole team are so grateful for your support, Peter. **But here’s why we still need your help:**
National Republicans and corporate mega-donors are doing everything they can to keep Missouri’s Senate seat under their thumb. Last quarter, we even learned that they put more than **$1 MILLION** into a brand new Super PAC to prop up Hawley’s campaign and fund even more desperate attacks about Lucas.
So if we’re going to be able to continue fighting back and getting Lucas’ message in front of every Missouri voter between now and Election Day, we have no choice but to keep up this grassroots momentum. **That’s why we’re asking:**
**[Will you chip in $26.07, $15, or anything at all toward our grassroots movement today, Peter? Lucas is proud to run a truly people-powered campaign — and it wouldn’t be possible without your help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38535?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38536?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt) [Contribute $26.07](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38536?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=26.07&t=4&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt) [Contribute $35](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38536?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=35&t=5&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38536?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38536?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38536?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38535?refcode=em20231010-3959&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3959%2E614464%2Euf7Kkt)
